name: Team Chrissy
subject: We’ll get right to it
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69023022/424839306/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NThkOTQ4MS01YTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rr0xutX7RCp6ETVYf7w8m7x4DHoHjNyyCYMUgPMglDI=&emci=9430dbbb-9b42-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=758d9481-5a48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)
---

Derek, this is the last time we’ll reach out about supporting Chrissy’s $5,000 end-of-month fundraiser. We know you’re busy, so we’ll get right to it:
Here are three reasons your donation today matters so much:

**1\. It lets Chrissy focus on her work in the House.** Her job isn’t on the campaign trail – it’s in the House, where she’s fighting for the issues that matter most to PA-06.

**2\. It builds Chrissy’s defenses for whatever threats may come,** without having to depend on dark money like some campaigns do.

**3\. It allows Chrissy to fight back against far-right smear campaigns** so that she can counter their spin tactics with cold hard facts.
A winning movement isn’t built in a day. It takes strategic investments, planning, and a whole bunch of early grassroots support – _especially_ in non-election years like this one. To stay on track, hitting this end-of-month goal is critical – **but right now, we’re still short. So, please:**
**[Derek, will you give $25, $5, or whatever you can to help Chrissy meet her crucial end-of-month goal? Your donation today will power Chrissy’s important work and lay the foundation for victory in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69023023/424839307/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NThkOTQ4MS01YTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rr0xutX7RCp6ETVYf7w8m7x4DHoHjNyyCYMUgPMglDI=)**
Thank you for being such an important part of this fight,

Team Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69023024/424839309/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NThkOTQ4MS01YTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rr0xutX7RCp6ETVYf7w8m7x4DHoHjNyyCYMUgPMglDI=&emci=9430dbbb-9b42-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=758d9481-5a48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485). name: Wiley
subject: reaching out before it’s too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Peter - this is my final email before tonight’s deadline. We’re almost where we need to be. But we’re not there yet.
Like everything we’ve accomplished so far, it will take us working together to reach our goal. Can you chip in just $1 or anything you can afford to help us get there and leave the “summer slump” behind for good? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-eom?refcode=230831-email-2&amount=1]
Thanks so much, Peter.
Wiley

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Ready to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
The House is in recess and I'm itching to get back to work. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69023303/424840065/1333415586?refcode=EM_FR_230831Recess_MK_90DO_5_G_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGE0NWNhNS01YTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJ7jr_m_NaHF6KHhXZdcpsIeI0JV2xkXX91SpFyxEyU=)
---

The House is in recess and I've spent the last few weeks on the ground in Northwest Ohio hearing from you about what our communities need.

But there's lots to get done and I'm itching to get back to Washington to work on our most pressing issues.

**Up first:**_taking on Jim Jordan's threat of a government shutdown if his list of extreme budget demands isn't met._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69023304/424840066/1333415586?refcode=EM_FR_230831Recess_MK_90DO_5_G_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGE0NWNhNS01YTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJ7jr_m_NaHF6KHhXZdcpsIeI0JV2xkXX91SpFyxEyU=) I know a government shutdown would be disastrous for the thousands of hard-working families I represent. **I'm fighting every day to ensure critical programs remain funded, but extreme Republicans continue to hold us back.**

subject: really quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Maxwell again. I just wanted to reach out with a quick update before the end of the night.

We’re only $1,755 short of our End of Month goal. I just pulled out my phone and did the math, and that means I only need 65 more supporters to chip in $27.

We’re so close! I know we can get there, but we only have 4 more hours until my midnight deadline. So please, can you chip in $27 before the end of the night?

Here’s a link where you can make a donation. I’ll be keeping an eye out for yours! Steve,
Our Republican Majority in the House of Representatives is hanging on by a thread...
My Republican colleagues and I are effectively outnumbered in the Senate...
And with Joe Biden in the White House, our backs are against the wall...
These next few months will mean all the difference in the world for our campaign, our party, and the future of our country.
_**We’re at a crossroads,**__**Steve**_ _**.**_

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | \---- Did you happen to see Senator Cassidy’s note below,** Friend? We’re coming down to the wire for this month’s fundraising goals, and after a slow summer, every dollar counts. Please take a moment to read Senator Cassidy’s message below. Thank you, Steve G. – Bill Cassidy for US Senate, Finance Team \----- Forwarded Message ----- From: Sensitive Request (via Senator Bill Cassidy) <mailto:info@cassidyforlouisiana.com "info@cassidyforlouisiana.com"> To: Steve G. -- Finance Team, Bill Cassidy for U.S. Senate Sent: Wednesday, August 30, 2023, at 11:30 AM Subject: We’re at a crossroads... Steve, Our Republican Majority in the House of Representatives is hanging on by a thread... My Republican colleagues and I are effectively outnumbered in the Senate... And with Joe Biden in the White House, our backs are against the wall... These next few months will mean all the difference in the world for our campaign, our party, and the future of our country. We’re at a crossroads,Steve . After a strong first half of the year, donations have slowed**dramatically** this summer... If you've saved your payment with WinRed, your donation will process automatically. | | | | | | | Thank you for all of your support, Steve. It does not go unnoticed. Sincerely, Bill Cassidy, M.D. | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. We love seeing these signs dotting windows, storefronts and yards all across the state. They’re a simple but fundamental part of our plan to reach out to voters.
**That’s why we’ve set a goal to blanket all of Mississippi in yard signs.** Brandon is going to all 82 counties in the state—and he’s bringing signs with him wherever he goes.
But with so many people looking to get a sign, we need grassroots supporters to help us sponsor our next big order. Our team has set a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight—that money would cover volunteer materials, TV ads, and yes, yard signs.
**[We can’t do this without you, Peter. Use this link to sponsor a Brandon Presley for Governor yard sign before our first monthly deadline of the general election in just a few hours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69024139/424847370/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.e784bfab-5c48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e784bfab-5c48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTc4NGJmYWItNWM0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5-ws10Fa_8ZGDePy0vQiPOtkUdBt1QoPfX8W51OxzFQ=)**

clean_body: We’re working on getting yard signs out to every corner of the state. | = Peter, I wanted to introduce myself. My name is Conner Smith—I’m Brandon Presley’s Political Director. That means I’ve been spending a whole lot of time on the phone with supporters from across the state. One thing I keep hearing: We need more yard signs. These signs have been in such high demand, we can’t keep them stocked! = = | = We love seeing these signs dotting windows, storefronts and yards all across the state. They’re a simple but fundamental part of our plan to reach out to voters. That’s why we’ve set a goal to blanket all of Mississippi in yard signs. Brandon is going to all 82 counties in the state—and he’s bringing signs with him wherever he goes. But with so many people looking to get a sign, we need grassroots supporters to help us sponsor our next big order. Our team has set a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight—that money would cover volunteer materials, TV ads, and yes, yard signs. = Thank you for all your help getting Brandon’s message out there. Conner Smith Political Director, Brandon Presley Campaign | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

body:
| I wanted to email you one last time ahead of my end-of-month deadline tonight.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3647%2E5257348%2E2bW49i)
Derek, I wanted to email you one last time ahead of my end-of-month deadline tonight.
Amidst Donald Trump and the GOP’s attacks, I remain focused on one thing: Delivering for the people of California. Californians deserve a leader who will fight for them and get results — which is what I’ve done my entire career.
I’m ready to take our fight to the halls of the United States Senate, but I can only do it with your help. We need a big grassroots movement to share our message on affordable housing and homelessness, making the economy work for everyone, and preserving our democracy.
**You can donate through this personal link:**
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/elect-adam?refcode=AugustDeadline](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230831_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3647%2E5257348%2E2bW49i)**
Thank you for your support,
Adam

body:

| | Patriot,

---
I was checking to see who hasn’t donated yet before tonight’s end-of-month deadline – and as of the last time I checked the roster, I didn’t see your name.
---
But do _not_ get me wrong, Patriot..._
_
---
... _I am certainly not trying to make you feel pressured into making a contribution._
---
And if you can’t donate right now because of the sinister Crook in the White House who’d rather wrongfully ARREST his leading opponent than lift a single finger to help our _own_ citizens, then just hit the back button, and go about your day. _I mean it._
---
**I’m only reaching out, because I know that many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it’s always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. People must see the clock ticking down to midnight and decide this is the moment to take action.**
---
_So, if that describes you, Patriot, then now is your chance!_
---
_August has been an eventful month, to say the least... Two sham indictments, two wrongful arrests, a mugshot intended to make me look like Public Enemy #1, and even more proof that Crooked Joe is orchestrating it all from the White House as evidence of his own real crimes piles up! So, if you can give, I trust you know that your support has never been more critical to our mission to SAVE AMERICA!_
---

But do not get me wrong, Patriot... ... I am certainly not trying to make you feel pressured into making a contribution. And if you can’t donate right now because of the sinister Crook in the White House who’d rather wrongfully ARREST his leading opponent than lift a single finger to help our own citizens, then just hit the back button, and go about your day. I mean it. I’m only reaching out, because I know that many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it’s always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. People must see the clock ticking down to midnight and decide this is the moment to take action. So, if that describes you, Patriot, then now is your chance! August has been an eventful month, to say the least... Two sham indictments, two wrongful arrests, a mugshot intended to make me look like Public Enemy #1, and even more proof that Crooked Joe is orchestrating it all from the White House as evidence of his own real crimes piles up! So, if you can give, I trust you know that your support has never been more critical to our mission to SAVE AMERICA! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Kim?=
subject: 🧑‍🎓✏️ Let's end the student debt crisis!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/climatechange-13910266?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=85953f1f7c&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | Dear friend:

Yesterday, I took to Twitter to comment on the ongoing student debt crisis and to highlight the importance of electing officials who stand up for constituents rather than the financial institutions that back their campaigns. 📚💲
---
| The beginning of this month marks the expiration of pandemic-era financial protections for student loan borrowers. Interest on Federal loans begins accruing on September 1st, and payments will resume for about 44 million Americans in October. The promises made by the Biden administration to borrowers have fallen far short of their mark—$20k in Federal loan forgiveness is now off the table, and the administration has instead focused on providing (slightly) more affordable repayment options. The Supreme Court blocked Biden’s executive order, ruling that an expansive debt cancellation program must be approved by Congress. This is why it’s so incredibly important to make sure we elect representatives who support Student Debt Cancellation. And, looking forward, we also need to elect people who will fight for free Public College in the future. Unfortunately, we can’t always rely on what our reps say and do while they’re campaigning. That’s why it’s important to follow the money. During his campaigns for State Assembly in 2014 & 2016, my opponent received thousands of dollars in donations from lobbying groups associated with for-profit institutions that prey on working-class people hoping to further their education. More recently, during his Congressional campaigns in 2017 and 2020, he received thousands of dollars from Navient, which at the time was one of the largest student loan payment collectors. In fact, Insurance and Financial Institutions are his second-largest category of donors—why would we believe he has any real interest in debt relief for Americans? I believe that Congressional Representatives should be beholden to the citizens they represent, not the giant corporations that bleed money from the economy to enrich shareholders.

I have never taken and will never take a dime from financial institutions—or any corporate donors at all. Today is the August end of month fundraising deadline, and that is why we need 853 more people to sign up to become monthly $34 donors to reach our goal. By making a secure online contribution through [https://davidkimforca.com/](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=d30bcab897&e=fee98d637f), you can become an essential part of our campaign, fueling our efforts for change. Can we count on you? [Click here to contribute!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=074b7234b5&e=fee98d637f) 💪🌟

Together, we can shift the paradigm of power back into the hands of people!
---

Friend,
I was checking to see who hasn't donated yet before tonight's end-of-month deadline - and as of the last time I checked the roster, I didn't see your name.
But do _not_ get me wrong, Friend...
_... I am certainly not trying to make you feel pressured into making a contribution._
And if you can't donate right now because of the sinister Crook in the White House who'd rather wrongfully ARREST his leading opponent than lift a single finger to help our _own_ citizens, then just hit the back button, and go about your day._I mean it._
**I 'm only reaching out, because I know that many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it's always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. People must see the clock ticking down to midnight and decide this is the moment to take action.**
So, if that describes you, friend, then now is your chance!
_August has been an eventful month, to say the least ... Two sham indictments, two wrongful arrests, a mugshot intended to make me look like Public Enemy #1, and even more proof that Crooked Joe is orchestrating it all from the White House as evidence of his own real crimes piles up! So, if you can give, I trust you know that your support has never been more critical to our mission to SAVE AMERICA!_

name: Moms Against DeSantis
subject: Hours Left to Stop DeSantis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
I would not be bothering you this late if this was not so important. But, as a concerned mom and citizen, I am writing to you because we are at a critical juncture. We have just hours left until our August fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we urgently need your support to stop Ron DeSantis from taking his dangerous policies to the national stage.
DeSantis has already enacted a six-week abortion ban, anti-Black legislation, anti-immigrant policies, and anti-LGBTQ+ laws . His decisions have turned Florida into a sanctuary state for hate and violence. Just recently, the devastating racial violence in Jacksonville served as a heartbreaking testament to the repercussions of DeSantis’s agenda.
And now, he has set his sights on the presidency. We must act to keep him out of the White House.
Please, time is of the essence. Your contribution, whether $5 or $50, will empower us to fight against DeSantis’s toxic policies and protect the vulnerable communities most impacted by his decisions. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Let’s stand up to DeSantis. Let’s make sure his policies don’t become America’s policies.
Thank you for your support.
RUSH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

clean_body: [] Peter, I would not be bothering you this late if this was not so important. But, as a concerned mom and citizen, I am writing to you because we are at a critical juncture. We have just hours left until our August fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we urgently need your support to stop Ron DeSantis from taking his dangerous policies to the national stage. DeSantis has already enacted a six-week abortion ban, anti-Black legislation, anti-immigrant policies, and anti-LGBTQ+ laws . His decisions have turned Florida into a sanctuary state for hate and violence. Just recently, the devastating racial violence in Jacksonville served as a heartbreaking testament to the repercussions of DeSantis’s agenda. And now, he has set his sights on the presidency. We must act to keep him out of the White House. Please, time is of the essence. Your contribution, whether $5 or $50, will empower us to fight against DeSantis’s toxic policies and protect the vulnerable communities most impacted by his decisions. [] Let’s stand up to DeSantis. Let’s make sure his policies don’t become America’s policies. Thank you for your support. RUSH A DONATION [] Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #momsagainstdesantis P.S. We have until midnight tonight to meet our fundraising goal. Every dollar you contribute is a step towards a safer, more inclusive America. Don’t wait—donate now. Hello – do you have a quick minute to chat?
Fundraising for our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert has slowed down quite a bit in August, and we need to raise $500,000 before our end-of-month deadline if we’re going to win and kick Boebert out of Congress.
**But my team just checked, and we’re still $12,398 short of what we need to hit our critical August goal.**
[**Can you chip in $5 or more to my campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert before our end-of-August deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight? I’d be so incredibly grateful for any amount you can afford to give.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69024897/424864258/1610638071?refcode=em20230831pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ff9631cb-6048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk2MzFjYi02MDQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTkZcQn4y0GmlQ9W7DYsk87Ded3Xrm4A3Mn8PiQrnK8=)
Too many elected officials (Lauren Boebert) spend all their time trying to make headlines, sell books, and fuel the angertainment industry by peddling crazy conspiracy theories.
**That’s not me. I ran for Congress because the people of Western and Southern Colorado have been forgotten by their “representative,” Lauren Boebert.** She only cares about promoting herself – rather than working on the issues that would actually better the lives of the people in our district.
[**We came so close to defeating Lauren Boebert last year. After the recount was finished, I lost by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69024898/424864259/1610638071?refcode=em20230831pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ff9631cb-6048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk2MzFjYi02MDQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTkZcQn4y0GmlQ9W7DYsk87Ded3Xrm4A3Mn8PiQrnK8=)
I’m already back on the road in my red pick-up truck. Last year, my son Felix and I clocked over 24,000 miles crisscrossing the district and meeting with voters. This time, we’re working twice as hard.
**This race is being called a “toss-up,” and the latest poll shows we have the slimmest of leads over Boebert. But I can only keep doing this work and kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress if grassroots donors like you give right now.**
[**So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever amount you can afford – before our end-of-August deadline at midnight tonight – to help defeat Lauren Boebert? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69024899/424864260/1610638071?refcode=em20230831pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ff9631cb-6048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk2MzFjYi02MDQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTkZcQn4y0GmlQ9W7DYsk87Ded3Xrm4A3Mn8PiQrnK8=)

clean_body: do you have a quick minute to chat? Hello – do you have a quick minute to chat? Fundraising for our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert has slowed down quite a bit in August, and we need to raise $500,000 before our end-of-month deadline if we’re going to win and kick Boebert out of Congress. But my team just checked, and we’re still $12,398 short of what we need to hit our critical August goal. = Too many elected officials (Lauren Boebert) spend all their time trying to make headlines, sell books, and fuel the angertainment industry by peddling crazy conspiracy theories. That’s not me. I ran for Congress because the people of Western and Southern Colorado have been forgotten by their “representative,” Lauren Boebert. She only cares about promoting herself – rather than working on the issues that would actually better the lives of the people in our district. = I’m already back on the road in my red pick-up truck. Last year, my son Felix and I clocked over 24,000 miles crisscrossing the district and meeting with voters. This time, we’re working twice as hard. This race is being called a “toss-up,” and the latest poll shows we have the slimmest of leads over Boebert. But I can only keep doing this work and kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress if grassroots donors like you give right now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am so humbled to have the support of people like you. Thank you for everything you do. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Not a plea for money — a real reason to give
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=SLocOV4z1BKA7LS2Tg480%2FuJ%2FRWY8Oy3a8l8X4x9%2BX5zQTxdQdix9I5UP6IQwoIX%2BlkPB2ukcxsJ4vlCS2RSHRTwadroNvoDjyNreb9fX9wQZbtBUF65L8pwAy4jefryf2iNRPgFJLd8iCzDL%2BGOO5hVF8oH3Ek7TPVFWWaZJgOOUTNY9WK%2BVjhIivwqnOtTTKH5HHMYUQqDadVtIXjk8IeUamjM3LtHOxB6q%2BUKe1%2BkcLb6DFgYc0fQofZysjqN%2FjydI0jOUtVSERlnX8ko6YcqCjjEAR0m1wwl1Ifm7KoLASadOxjtphCFwvg0Sj%2BJnLyBBWmEOexP4ZQuT7%2B2zE2Enln5YgqVAFiTMgp7VBxuo3qc1b0UlWjp7uSefOmzsxLFvxYruTRaQO6vXDjvEZLDvvFdSxzL7TiaLe4z0Ho%3D)
---
| |
---
Amigos, I am so excited to share this major update:

I recently requested over $31 million for New Mexico community projects — including renovating the Boys and Girls Club facility in Las Cruces, a food pantry in Hatch, and repaving I-10. **Right now, all 15 projects have been allocated funding in the House!** Negotiations are still ongoing, but in a Republican majority, I am proud of this work so far.

This was a **big** priority for me going into Congress. **Our previous representative refused to request any federal community project funding and New Mexico’s 2nd district lost out on millions in investments.**

**But thanks to your help in 2022, we flipped this seat blue with 50.3% of the vote.**

**Now, we’re in a rematch next year in what is being called a toss-up race.**

Here’s the catch: if this election was just about who fights harder for New Mexico, then we could win in a landslide. But **Kevin McCarthy is all-in for my far-right extremist opponent and he’s just announced more attack ads against me.** We’re competing with a landslide of negative advertising, and we need the resources to compete.

**[Team, my August end-of-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight and we’re just 8% short of our goal. We need the resources to counter McCarthy’s attack ads and get out the word about the good work I’m doing in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Amigos, I am so excited to share this major update: I recently requested over $31 million for New Mexico community projects — including renovating the Boys and Girls Club facility in Las Cruces, a food pantry in Hatch, and repaving I-10. Right now, all 15 projects have been allocated funding in the House! Negotiations are still ongoing, but in a Republican majority, I am proud of this work so far. This was a big priority for me going into Congress. Our previous representative refused to request any federal community project funding and New Mexico’s 2nd district lost out on millions in investments. But thanks to your help in 2022, we flipped this seat blue with 50.3% of the vote. Now, we’re in a rematch next year in what is being called a toss-up race. Here’s the catch: if this election was just about who fights harder for New Mexico, then we could win in a landslide. But Kevin McCarthy is all-in for my far-right extremist opponent and he’s just announced more attack ads against me. subject: BREAKING - Public school punishes kid for Gadsden Flag patch

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUEAW1ZgqFgovTPBOAG6MYFnDjWTi7qszErcdionFtsuINDyBZDEzzqwFypXD97FNMweP9fHsdMaWy-mqdQ8gSoPakWFh8ZZy-pL1DnoeSw9jtKlSAFt5zHIemHFYVIqJ40Sa2pLbVu_wFyMNgkrqqE64Q3VmKiRLaSZ8stP1dQXA "Tuttle Twins")

Peter,

On Monday, a public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUDsibSlbV94vDbGFJ6vj-yjdNQ2wxaZEMnGXIBBUfpGfXdC3YAVUi-pVXv0HkZZ_J-d1C7RReSTP50PKCapMi9gcY9xP87lQRHuPzzYz5EANCnLbeiqYYAtsjPPLugx0ZaK7uqfyZKUn-SvuCiM9KFUR2ibYu3TmEuJTQY9Qtr6S)
But the director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believes that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and is "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! (In an emergency meeting yesterday, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!)

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

**What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden?**

_We can._

I created the Tuttle Twins books to teach kids the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government. And I want to reach more kids like Jaiden to teach these ideas that are under threat in many schools.

**My mission is to distribute 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books to schools, libraries, and families this year. We need more Jaidens. I am urgently emailing you to ask for your help with this goal. Every $10 raised helps distribute a new book.**

[Can you donate $10, $20, or even $100 today and help distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUMkjw_JCVjKnu5zQH5ZYxlJ_PM1ZhGKPKgnzqUsJRZzmmUafY179c8YB2jclOahUuGbRo-_W3N09tQNA51Xw_0ZMf7DwfcpKy-Z4TE72m7-8DOxCJg4HxI9NHvTq-x0Avl7zriTAn_kVTi3sk5cUmHF0A854gT0GLj-CNoUIBMml)

I had the fortune of breaking Jaiden's story; he's an avid reader of my Tuttle Twins books, which teach kids what their rights are and why they should stand up for them -- just like Jaiden now is. So he and his mother reached out to ask for help highlighting what the school had done to him.

But one thing we can do now is inspire millions more kids to believe in the ideas of liberty.

While I can't control what schools teach, I can do the next best thing - bring the ideas of liberty to libraries, schools, and families.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUPYdVV727i7Npqk8-mrWXTt8hkahd331G_bzyf9wnERthY5yi6NGuzDKHGcI9WIAytZEmc-OOKiBDR1foDycUUiqhtyESlB2r9do70ZJ26I3pCCSuj-19n5_mZHkyKewRM78E_E_OhyFD-LQGxxqitBTyG4BTHE7Oxn7dcwDHnyR)

Since I started the Tuttle Twins in 2011, we have distributed over 5 MILLION copies globally!

Freedom is popular with the younger generation. But it is our duty to bring them pro-liberty books and resources to conceptualize these ideas.

[Here is how we plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUAMbcScM3fNGseptRA8BRVmaNoTKQK_8DikV0-rG6MEO8cbPBwjajmYPOoCINVXL2P4itDRZVdLVEfL3xDDksY7UPJD9zthg3TReygMxulEc4OTvV3H7WUNAp_SZ03OFrfHNBl0WyPTRWpW33tdOYCWnc6EOYrODuDXFCUY3eMoE)

1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history can receive copies for education at home.

2. The Libertas Institute plans to place copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.

3. To do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. **It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**

[Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUEynKefIZ31x-eD6SAATOTBuXV6ULCJk3tqcVj8rW3YSb91cTbaCc93oVGbzGrLS2OiXtrJn-aWxG2nW7--ONE3GhKX_551Uxj55P0bJKVI6BErL1-avgdDrKEm4sz7EmdPKqlwpUbi7IOGtON5_bfwZGihJLcMi_ibrzJ0CINq1)

[Donate](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be0d896d97974432a5526258aa93cae1&_e=iiYgUjFbkK8UBP5cfpRee7GmO1YwPL04LS-hW0ThQKqSemi-zfJ0qrGIaU1N0Ol3L-ppFeg_9QjSDmfG6ZoVUAMkeUOXdyWX2nM1_dAj3SMPIQ1jdKeLN4T-CsKmbhhqQd-suwjOx1hoot8QAn_IS-sTIlK6PGVufiWHmtzF7O1ISXs5_-uM9h7LHFgcfSleCy00ng1atLQa2h-ZxJXdE_lWEX9ha8PXL_I4aiaNKT7tjO6gxMmghWD4pufkHqAd)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents often tell me about some of the great conversations they have with their kids after they read the books together. The Tuttle Twins series also encourages entrepreneurship and teaches critical thinking skills you won't find discussed in many classrooms.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young freedom fighters to defend our rights.**

Thank you for your support!

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed. Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! (In an emergency meeting yesterday, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!) Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: a few hours away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
I am sure you’ve been receiving a lot of emails recently, but I wanted to reach out as we are only a few hours away from our August end-of-month deadline.

I know November may seem far away, but mail-in voting in New Jersey starts in just three weeks. And if these candidates want to win, they will need to start spending on lawn signs, letters, postcards, door hangers, websites, media ads, and MORE.

This is what it takes to defend our children’s education against the threat of partisan culture wars. We have only a few hours left to reach our $50k goal for this month, and we need your help for a final push.

Can I count on you to chip in before midnight tonight? Here’s a personalized link to use:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfd-2308?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230831_FR_EOM_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_EOM.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfd-2308?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230831_FR_EOM_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_EOM.3]

Thank you for standing with us,

Tom
Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

name: Vivek
subject: One last message in August
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I wanted to reach out one last time before August is over...
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=1ba6469ffc3e464aaad233e6ce24d99e&_t=PyA8NRmQ3RZMvja41SFhg0fKGLvcleW9JffJp0ldN4ev-XXz2QdaVl-vKkCVbBpaLuccUIi1zjyEAgNvpxQLJNfsaAzTx1zsSbENE7tZrZI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=1ba6469ffc3e464aaad233e6ce24d99e&_t=PyA8NRmQ3RZMvja41SFhg0fKGLvcleW9JffJp0ldN4ev-XXz2QdaVl-vKkCVbBpaLuccUIi1zjyEAgNvpxQLJNfsaAzTx1zsSbENE7tZrZI%3D)

|

Fellow American - I know it's getting late. August is almost over.

We've had one of the most important months of our campaign. We showed the DC establishment what this campaign can do.

name: Steven Horsford
subject: The right to vote is sacred
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Friend, the right to vote is precious, almost sacred.**

But across the country, Republicans are launching a coordinated attack on the right to vote – _and too many Americans face discrimination as they go to exercise this most precious right._

Just this year, seven states enacted 10 laws making it harder to vote. Florida created a police force to brutalize those seeking to exercise their most fundamental rights. North Carolina passed archaic and racist voter identification laws. Texas has even made it a crime to help voters cast a ballot.

Our democracy has never been under greater threat. But I know if we can build a true grassroots movement, we can defeat those who play political games with our democracy – **_and we can fix what they’ve broken._**

[**So friend, I’m humbly asking for your support. Can you split a $10 gift between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to defeat anti-voting extremists and restore our democracy? Every dollar will go towards electing pro-democracy Democrats.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52315?t=6&akid=10257%2E878179%2EP51Qk3) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Steven Horsford and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52316?t=7&akid=10257%2E878179%2EP51Qk3)

I’m proud to fight for voting rights every day in Congress. Thank you for being with me.

_\--Steven_

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

[](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=e922c50853ba4fe09b22908d2a0d8939&_e=nFfXm7R5KZOsy5HdiZdodEhzTH2fOuOuoL5Fxx7zjaE5G9ReQqOMD07ncHC_AYFfWRQkamsoDBMhpguy2f6ZkuxGHKQFjHlkaktL0Lq2eOBz6kiYTGmLVvVOFi-fPD5gge1GpBdaNlFJEPnETtCw146KrAQXjFwnCaPo19HwPLNxXBTqKhR7zVeMPuV0jnTDmyhDXbrWQwoYKSqrJINBMbVLyhvz6NactNcu6pML1vwZZ58mxMjiLoOKZxDUxsxBjINipSJ9cwD8bjSPT99ptXw1KWyNMJ_cg2j_5LSMXevYIMUCcBsytC5q5RYWZRptK7tjmapak-NZZO-8DDhyFjDwLi_LqwrPsUYAQ9ev4tKgPyrveMYePdZQx8rF6Bym)
---
Peter,

Adam Schiff just sent out a fundraising email with this subject line:

_**“I led the hearing that revealed much of the evidence that is the basis of Trump’s fourth indictment”**_

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

Since we’re still falling behind

I know it’s late so I’ll get right to the point, Peter: With just a few hours left before the deadline, it looks like my campaign will fall short of our mission-critical end-of-month fundraising goal. I can’t emphasize enough how important it is for us to hit this goal — as I write this, our opponent is raking in _millions._ While we don’t need to match him dollar-for-dollar, we DO need to hit our goals through Election Day to beat the odds and win this race. We have thousands of voters we still need to contact, and missing this goal will force us to make strategic cuts right when we should be going all-in. I’m counting on you, so please, chip in anything you can before the midnight deadline: name: Sara (personal)
subject: Before you sign off for the long weekend…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, something has been on my mind, so I’m sending this quick note and a final ask before you sign-off for the long weekend -
My opponent has made a few appearances on Fox News lately - giving him a platform to spread his anti-science, pro-Trump opinions more widely.
Let’s be clear: His policies and views are entirely too extreme for this district. He opposes abortion under all circumstances, wants to overturn marriage equality, and believes climate change is a hoax.
But it’s exactly this kind of free airtime for extremists in recent years that has propelled candidates like Trump to the top, regardless of whether their views reflect their constituents or not.
To make sure I’m prepared for next November — no matter how much free airtime my opponent gets — will you pitch in a few dollars to help build a strong re-election campaign?
Click here to donate whatever you can to close the gap in our end-of-August email fundraising goal (less than $600 left to raise by midnight tonight!). [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Reaching this goal is critical to help my team map out what a successful campaign looks like and decide early on where to make strategic investments - like putting campaign staff on the ground to reach every voter and engage directly in our communities.
The more we can reach our goals and build up our resources, the closer we get to defeating my extreme opponent, unseating MAGA Republicans in districts all across the country, and flipping the House in 2024.
Thanks for anything you can do to support my campaign - I appreciate it.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]

To make sure I’m prepared for next November — no matter how much free airtime my opponent gets — will you pitch in a few dollars to help build a strong re-election campaign? Click here to donate whatever you can to close the gap in our end-of-August email fundraising goal (less than $600 left to raise by midnight tonight!). [] Reaching this goal is critical to help my team map out what a successful campaign looks like and decide early on where to make strategic investments - like putting campaign staff on the ground to reach every voter and engage directly in our communities. The more we can reach our goals and build up our resources, the closer we get to defeating my extreme opponent, unseating MAGA Republicans in districts all across the country, and flipping the House in 2024. Thanks for anything you can do to support my campaign - I appreciate it. -Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
---
| | Peter,

Tonight is our [August fundraising deadline,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69025686/424878293/1658679775?amount=10&refcode=JK_EM_FR_WL_230831_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGQ0MzkzMGEtNjg0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GjhvayC2SRDeG4UVXcMmB9Mvpp-QzKbt5pJH_oZK0Wc=) and I wanted to take this opportunity to reach out to you personally about why it’s so important we hit every one of our goals.

My team and I set a goal to raise $5,000 before the end of the month to make sure we have the resources we need to keep up our momentum. This is an ambitious goal, but I know we can do it with your support.

Hi there, it’s Andrea. This is not the email I was expecting to write tonight.
I just got off the phone with my Campaign Manager and found out that we are still pacing $709 behind on tonight’s end-of-month fundraising goal. With our election really heating up, this is not the month to fall short of a fundraising goal.

That’s why I’m coming to you personally. Is there anything you can pitch in before the month ends at midnight? Every single dollar makes a difference. name: Liz
subject: ready to fight for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/MYVOZ4KcDEWY9i98RJm9xg2?unsubscribedata=BQM%2FUzh5u1hweUqVH2dG%2FKBLBuQQ5gs1sg7gITyr5xnHxV4sl0p3fXEvFEOCwFJZ%2FuFxSgTMvi5OLRSiOqxPiVJAXojZoZ3t2gIOi1Ksv8loUtwIw1r6%2BdRJl8QJAcJep%2BKRbKuKRpK0Tu6MlnV8G95VooOxDasgeW9gP%2Bze9x2qa6tNa8err9MPDyUp17WbC5ouWeQXeKj1FGR36SZ7lscHxI2ws6LplhW6OpsKtr%2FM%2F0fsREQlXepM4KfCOg2pc%2BIQuvRtfWCdJ69uyDYJBhqKp%2B%2BZAse8D%2BNwHhgG5%2FsfXvI2%2F93INMyrAg6uJCZbZxtrIZyF5mi9%2BEagHypYlM9N68%2BtMWnSNPE4f9Wqz%2BwdHkCz182nsJjFi5JljhbiwIBuxKNABjAATIm0%2FALen0PhIJ1McouqnkXeoEfMa4iUQuATYGDVj1%2Fz8BIKHIam]

# [#]
Peter,

I wanted to reach out as we approach our end-of-month deadline tonight. Trust me, I dislike these fundraising deadlines as much as the next person. But when we have so much on the line in 2024, and I would be lying if I said this wasn’t important.

As a mother, I understand the need to make sure our children don’t grow up in a world where gun violence is the norm. But instead of taking action, our GOP leaders are too busy banning books while refusing to enact common-sense gun safety legislation.

As a small business owner, I know how critical our local businesses are – and how critical it is to fuel our local entrepreneurs, making sure they have the resources to succeed.

And as a woman, I know how necessary it is that we codify reproductive freedom into federal law. While Mike Lawler and his GOP colleagues are trying to control our personal healthcare decisions, I am ready to fight and protect the rights of women and girls across the country.

Like all of you, I’m sick and tired of leadership that refuses to protect us, and that puts extremism and political stunts over the needs of our district. I am ready to flip this district and be the leader you deserve, but I need your support.

Peter, this is why these deadlines are so important . If you’re able, can you stand with me before our August deadline tonight by chipping in? Here’s a personalized link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwg-fr-2308-abt?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwg-fr-2308-abt?amount=]

Thank you for all of your continued support,

Liz
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwg-fr_footer] DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwg-fr_footer][https://secure.ngpvan.com/g_p2NY9XEEy8HMoak6V-mg2] VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/g_p2NY9XEEy8HMoak6V-mg2]
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom with a lifelong commitment to public service. Liz served on her local school board overseeing over a $100 million budget, working to improve school facilities and finding common ground to get things done for our kids. Liz is running for Congress to make the Hudson Valley more affordable, help small businesses thrive, and always fight for women’s rights.
PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY

clean_body: Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, I wanted to reach out as we approach our end-of-month deadline tonight. Trust me, I dislike these fundraising deadlines as much as the next person. But when we have so much on the line in 2024, and I would be lying if I said this wasn’t important. As a mother, I understand the need to make sure our children don’t grow up in a world where gun violence is the norm. But instead of taking action, our GOP leaders are too busy banning books while refusing to enact common-sense gun safety legislation. As a small business owner, I know how critical our local businesses are – and how critical it is to fuel our local entrepreneurs, making sure they have the resources to succeed. And as a woman, I know how necessary it is that we codify reproductive freedom into federal law. While Mike Lawler and his GOP colleagues are trying to control our personal healthcare decisions, I am ready to fight and protect the rights of women and girls across the country. Like all of you, I’m sick and tired of leadership that refuses to protect us, and that puts extremism and political stunts over the needs of our district. I am ready to flip this district and be the leader you deserve, but I need your support. Peter, this is why these deadlines are so important . If you’re able, can you stand with me before our August deadline tonight by chipping in? Here’s a personalized link: = [=] Thank you for all of your continued support, Liz [] DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom with a lifelong commitment to public service. Liz served on her local school board overseeing over a $100 million budget, working to improve school facilities and finding common ground to get things done for our kids. Liz is running for Congress to make the Hudson Valley more affordable, help small businesses thrive, and always fight for women’s rights. PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY PO BOX 733 GOLDENS BRIDGE, NY 10526 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] .

name: Team Lucas
subject: Our midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re just 87 donations away from hitting our most ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal yet
#
Hey Peter,
**We’re 87 donations away from hitting our August fundraising goal.** So now, we’re counting on top supporters like you to help us close the gap.
**[Can you rush $10 or whatever you can toward our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate before midnight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36001?refcode=em20230831-3671&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3671%2E614464%2EGiia5J)**

---
We have a real chance to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — and Lucas Kunce is building the grassroots movement to make it happen. With $0 from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, he’s running a record-breaking, people-powered campaign to replace Josh Hawley and take back power for everyday Missourians.
National Republicans know our movement is a threat to their grip on this Senate seat too, so they’re coming at Lucas fast and early with attacks. GOP mega-donors and corporate elites even put $1 MILLION into a new Super PAC to tear Lucas down.
**That’s why your support _right now_ is so critical, Peter.** Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your early contribution helps us stay prepared and continue proving the strength of our grassroots campaign.
**[So please, can you rush a donation of absolutely any amount toward our August goal before midnight tonight? This is our most ambitious end-of-month goal yet, so we have a real opportunity to show everyone that we have what it takes to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36001?refcode=em20230831-3671&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3671%2E614464%2EGiia5J)**
**[RUSH A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36001?refcode=em20230831-3671&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3671%2E614464%2EGiia5J)**
Thank you so much,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230831-3671-footer&t=11&refcode2=3671_614464_Giia5J&akid=3671%2E614464%2EGiia5J)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: WA Republicans: can we count on your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
With the leadership of Chairman Jim Walsh, our state party is going to start fighting again, we are going to take the fight to the Democrats...

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

| | **This is the last email we’ll send you about our end-of-month deadline.** Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 81% of our end-of-month goal. But here’s the thing:
* There is **ONE HOUR** left before our August deadline.
* We still need to raise **$40,000** if we want to hit our goal.
* And as the fight for battleground Virginia intensifies, we need the strength of dedicated Democrats in your community to help steer our party toward victory.

When we launched our TRIPLE-MATCH offer last week, something incredible happened. _Thousands_ of Democrats joined our movement to defeat extreme Republicans. Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 81% of our end-of-month goal. body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Our records indicate that you tuned in to watch last Wednesday
night's Republican Debate, Friend. Can you please take a moment
to submit your opinion?

The Republican Party has made it our mission to reach out to
every patriot in every corner of the nation to see who they want
to lead our Party's ticket in 2024.

Please see below:

Voter Information

Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Straw Poll Status: NO SUBMISSION

Who do you plan to support in the 2024 Presidential Primary?

Donald J. Trump of Florida

Ron DeSantis of Florida

Mike Pence of Indiana

Nikki Haley of South Carolina

Tim Scott of South Carolina

Vivek Ramaswamy of Ohio

Chris Christie of New Jersey

Asa Hutchinson of Arkansas

Doug Burgum of North Dakota

Francis Suarez of Florida

Larry Elder of California

Will Hurd of Texas

Someone Else

We're putting plans in place for next year's Republican
National Convention, where we will formally nominate our Party's
presidential contender. Knowing where patriots like yourself
stand is of the utmost importance for our Party.

Thank you in advance for taking the time to respond to our
Official Republican Presidential Straw Poll.

We look forward to seeing your submission,

GOP Presidential Polling Commission

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=y4RU33OXuV3WkpSi_CjDmHzUqcRLzoDtXpAWYA0bg_4J-oXQ7ybC_T3uHGTDtsJ8PyzKAGTkUGCTKu6v4oqu14gYygk1__L4nvCoXAAeZT-Ph_32bjTZvBOQYs7LisKorEmrEcJ4SHz4BivwACIMi6c_agw_gVg54otlylrawhi2V7wQWfaG7dNeHma4IIlPj5ebCXHj3iIVxSV1rYTt8rliE4zcVXxWimvpAQyEAqGznv3MZofl0uXtdB7NI_KXyUGYQZiR_1xJ4Ox2pGNXDPpB94j3gCce-m2LvR_zOO47aFfbHWHaVDOsG12lqrdRsNaeRUOrR3RzwwhicP5wLSfbkNdKuZ62Vxb2D8Yk0jdA3aKMDp8gWAoyO37TQ6EAbKmpnB6Fb8xkFMJuMi4XymFkyfb_aM1LkDneNo0Vw1U%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=y4RU33OXuV3WkpSi_CjDmHzUqcRLzoDtXpAWYA0bg_4J-oXQ7ybC_T3uHGTDtsJ8PyzKAGTkUGCTKu6v4oqu14gYygk1__L4nvCoXAAeZT-Ph_32bjTZvBOQYs7LisKorEmrEcJ4SHz4BivwACIMi6c_agw_gVg54otlylrawhi2V7wQWfaG7dNeHma4IIlPj5ebCXHj3iIVxSV1rYTt8rliE4zcVXxWimvpAQyEAqGznv3MZofl0uXtdB7NI_KXyUGYQZiR_1xJ4Ox2pGNXDGCd7Gov0uYlW18x0epm6NsSRw5lXHdY_gx4J9JQ6NPUdjJm7Wi9C2_5-0QQBzUnzMCzKFj47Kk9IKdKpdE3kW6mWiimkVOjydUG2xgQjnGsUdVZ0REhVw7UiTvB8WhWNI3QyVNZoZ0xhphXBe-1itE%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=y4RU33OXuV3WkpSi_CjDmHzUqcRLzoDtXpAWYA0bg_4J-oXQ7ybC_T3uHGTDtsJ8PyzKAGTkUGCTKu6v4oqu14gYygk1__L4nvCoXAAeZT-Ph_32bjTZvBOQYs7LisKorEmrEcJ4SHz4BivwACIMi6c_agw_gVg54otlylrawhi2V7wQWfaG7dNeHma4IIlPj5ebCXHj3iIVxSV1rYTt8rliE4zcVXxWimvpAQyEAqGznv3MZofl0uXtdB7NI_KXyUGYQZiR_1xJ4Ox2pGNXDEZLrUYGk2Gd-z-KuRevhmTz2MTqv5HTy88o5kNaE_YHG3pRIRK9-uk-jAXB4Wpo1XF8sg999FyjGceIYvQ1ggibutyDMMKwzqYVjYuCBqqmARsIDigMXPtAIjKLdKh38fu0tvtv1G-ig2r5Ml5K3xI%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=y4RU33OXuV3WkpSi_CjDmHzUqcRLzoDtXpAWYA0bg_4J-oXQ7ybC_T3uHGTDtsJ8PyzKAGTkUGCTKu6v4oqu14gYygk1__L4nvCoXAAeZT-Ph_32bjTZvBOQYs7LisKorEmrEcJ4SHz4BivwACIMi6c_agw_gVg54otlylrawhi2V7wQWfaG7dNeHma4IIlPj5ebCXHj3iIVxSV1rYTt8rliE4zcVXxWimvpAQyEAqGznv3MZofl0uXtdB7NI_KXyUGYQZiR_1xJ4Ox2pGNXDGSAKgut66Yja3lAmBLf9LJfuZmUFa9zlOJ7roZjN6Bbrf0mudh0sz2xD27HwO-ALtBI7jJDbRbHYSkrMfGSgIElih-LE_w5Qzks3ZJNh_xHXZMwZGcQmGbLHwxgrr8m-vmfzEpkzz0YTMSxL1TD0aM%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=y4RU33OXuV3WkpSi_CjDmHzUqcRLzoDtXpAWYA0bg_4J-oXQ7ybC_T3uHGTDtsJ8PyzKAGTkUGCTKu6v4oqu14gYygk1__L4nvCoXAAeZT-Ph_32bjTZvBOQYs7LisKorEmrEcJ4SHz4BivwACIMi6c_agw_gVg54otlylrawhi2V7wQWfaG7dNeHma4IIlPj5ebCXHj3iIVxSV1rYTt8rliE4zcVXxWimvpAQyEAqGznv3MZofl0uXtdB7NI_KXyUGYQZiR_1xJ4Ox2pGNXDH5t7IfBIBfbUjO18Pb8kQcrwKMywt3ssRoDQtmAh3Hp_jbkLM4T5RnipD5oyvHDTv7hKv6xJAiCspYWd8QySUMdm-9wX7io-hu4P-ngcMKljrnto21_2s6RK8caow90bvzNswTEoS_Shs8sUE28Vwk%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_t=7aXOl6H-cjPn0ez3Z9BiM04GIwVsu5efkicncLM-4-whn5RhqdKdK1pllzUYiwUIeMKR0VeiS8Iag-Q_vQhwRmlJN8w924O8AelCLIN7P9-pJNo91SPw5V9GqJPwYoic7z8S2aWTy_NB_3HTtYyAZnoBO5ycQHFd3Vw9z0KdgN0%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=ZdlA3kZ-BrllBDcd-eQlNJnzX6b77CCk0PXdoFvWl5KHUM5M0V-WjTVpyRzs17d4ptmphagglpAh2uDs3s8MnOL79JtgU9KsGN3CuAzoMtYKAt9hV7Sivb88wgeCoHTYjV4FwaCa567M-YXi1V0TN8gcZXoz4APfsbe7yhGQInQy3Rx9B3NNRix8lh5C2q8iBEfRZSJraZQBaq84ho7rki4K8e23pVSyWOXlyGeeqhvvFv_DnLTmbIxE4bLtZCYjvCBQh_l-qwAOceXV0JOi0xHy4JVhxXAdclqI_NlhYOY%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2a7eb135b764046905e113343a401e1&_e=y4RU33OXuV3WkpSi_CjDmO4sE8s_P0LTEEig0FQdEbscUYOQ-OzGRVoWUZilqqzLp6v9csm6w5M2Y2Dq2lmnYaAyj4x2u3mpXCwsbjSOmzJnjfF6Rs4CqiqD82keMIHv-fih_JV7tdfEu2w_LdlfXI9Dp6pWcz0DVL6SVz77FGBDjUWFTZ4tDSqjk9ABQj_8cK4pAkpkjixGTeruUeQJyVSmyyZmchefHyAI3-qGCOQ%3D)_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Thousands have gotten their copy -- will you claim yours?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next level? If so, I have a special offer for you. **I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book,_How We Win!_** Thousands of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._7jA)
---
| | **That's right -_ANY AMOUNT!_ Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of shipping.** [**Click here to get yours before we run out of copies!**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.readactnews._UFIQ)
---
Until now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make gifts of $100 or more. But frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that selective. As far as I'm concerned, if you care about this movement even a little -- even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I need to get this valuable book into your hands. [**If that's you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.**](http://trk.readactnews.) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. You see, after _ELEVEN YEARS_ at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ criss-crossing the country... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... **... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen.** We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** But to do it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to arm you with this book today.
---

---
And remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America...we're DOING IT! But we can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission. That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a donation of any amount to Turning Point USA. [**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America.**](http://trk.readactnews.)

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Immediate Action
body:
Peter,

We stand at a pivotal juncture with less than 9 hours to go.

Radical socialist agendas are testing Long Island and New York State's very fabric, and I'm reaching out to urge you to understand the profound implications of this fight.

Help me fight back. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Immediate+Action+Email]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Immediate+Action+Email]

Kevin Thomas, one of my radical opponents, and his cohort have the support of several state senators who, to our collective dismay, have pushed for dangerous legislation such as bail reform and other questionable criminal justice endeavors. Notably, these senators have drawn the ire of an impressive coalition of 23 police unions, the very guardians of our communities, for their reckless actions.

Your immediate action is critical. Your last-minute contribution – be it $10, $25, $50, or any other amount – will provide the resources we need to counter these radical ideologies and ensure the safety and prosperity of our state. CHIP IN NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=second+button&utm_campaign=Immediate+Action+Email]

This is our defining moment.

As we make our final stand, let's remind Kevin Thomas and his enablers that Long Island and New York State will not be swayed by extremism.

With a coalition of 23 police unions standing against such dangerous policies, it's evident where the trust of our communities lies.

Time is of the essence, and the stakes couldn't be higher. Your steadfast support is our bedrock. Join by chipping in $10, $25, $50, or ANY AMOUNT and let's ensure our values triumph.
