name: Jennifer Grossman
subject: Why are kids alienated and confused?
body:
Too many young people are feeling confused, anxious, and alienated.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb84ir3phl070luivm0caiefad32mp7s4r8njoe8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)
Friends,

Have you talked to any high school or college students recently? Too many young people are feeling confused, anxious, and alienated. Support for capitalism is at an all-time low, even among young Republicans!

Cancel Culture, identity politics, and moral relativism are smothering the spirit of Generation Z. Teens and twentysomethings are disoriented by a culture in which victimhood is valorized, conformity is expected, and envy is encouraged.

**And here 's something to really wake you up. A recent poll at the University of Texas showed that 18% of college students are okay with _using violence_ to stop speakers from campus.**

The college professors on our faculty recount how each new class of freshmen arrives on campus markedly less mature than their predecessors. Instead of welcoming hatchlings ready to take intellectual flight, administrators find themselves incubating fragile, fearful eggs, insulating them with the Styrofoam of speech codes that further extends the expiration date of adolescence.

**Death of the human spirit is what all forms of nihilism and socialism do to individuals. Everyone likes to say we 're living in 1984, but I think we're closer to Ayn Rand's dystopian vision, found in her much earlier novella _Anthem_.**

_Anthem_ delves into the destructive nature of collectivism and the dehumanizing effects of a society that suppresses individual thought and initiative. Does this sound familiar?

The challenge: to restore an America that prizes individualism, reason, and achievement, we must get to the root of the problem. That means going beyond reforming a policy here or rolling back a regulation there. We must deal with the fundamentals, the values that inform our society.

It's time for people on the right to realize this cold truth: **There is no winning in politics unless you win culturally and philosophically. Politics is downstream of culture and culture is downstream of philosophy. **
**⬇️⬇️ THE SOLUTION ⬇️⬇️**
The Atlas Society is undertaking a major project to win the cultural battle. You will be shocked by how popular this is. We are turning Ayn Rand's famous stories into graphic novels and bringing them to new audiences: including the largest Comic Cons around the country, libraries from coast to coast, homeschool groups, and even prisons.

**_Last year, we distributed 75,000 copies of our graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand 's _ANTHEM_ and _Red Pawn__!**

_The demand is exceeding our supply, so next year we are upping this distribution goal to 100K copies of our graphic novels to new audiences across the globe. _

**[I am asking for your support to reach our fundraising goal of $50,000 online. Every $10 raised helps us distribute five new graphic novels. Can you please send an urgent donation of $10, $50, or even $100 to The Atlas Society and help us bring these crucial novels to a new generation?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zer6m5psf5qplea86dduab9692bep6imgvmj6r98_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)**
[Donate >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf9g0lq6evmept3eqd8nj58bcuekjpm6sccg0e1o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq2s5l6mi32sdk6pqqcttm6iqj2t7nk1q3b91m65qbfctnkvin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df2c1h6co34s1i669bhemrtcdtjm5qj7cblsgp3fpjnmlp7cd9nqorr2d9lsub1fkak2pbt0l0nq9b5fkj0cv8h9djhe9qb4dbheko2c5tgeiqjcsh1k8gn48n24hhm9pj5cdh62pr4c8iv0)
**Why a graphic novel?**

Here's another shocking statistic...

Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

Graphic novels are the only genre among young people where readership is _growing_ -- Young Adult graphic novels were the fastest-growing publishing category in recent years. NPD BookScan reported that YA graphic novels had a growth of 62% in sales in 2019 alone. Driving that growth are the millions of young Americans flocking to Comic Cons every year.

Our mission is to bring the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through a variety of vehicles. This includes animated videos, graphic novels, social media, and both virtual and live events.

Ayn Rand impacted the lives of millions during a time when communism controlled half of the planet. Ayn Rand's fiction has been the most effective "gateway drug" to liberty, which is why CATO Institute founder Ed Crane deemed Rand the "all-time greatest recruiter for the liberty movement."

Communism isn't so "open" anymore. Collectivism and grievance politics have found new homes in identity politics and "woke" culture. _Now, the younger generation needs to hear about the philosophy of man as a heroic being, with reason as his only means of survival, and productivity as his noblest activity_.

Friends, to be frank with you... The success of The Atlas Society depends upon YOU. We receive our funding from patriots, small business owners, and independent thinkers across the country making online donations.

I'm counting on your help.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 in the next 2 weeks. Please rush your support today to help me distribute 100,000 graphic novels to young Americans. ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z961b7o41psanvr3norj8ui6nuo1l7qab15ndvq0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)
[Donate $10 & Distribute 5 Graphic Novels](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zthi0lac47p3npmcj23p9ldjar840tkg4n1ecmh8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)

[Donate $20 & Distribute 10 Graphic Novels](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgo1de85chncn8jc721krt1o1ra3jrs9siedqmr8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)

[Donate $50 & Distribute 25 Graphic Novels](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhv2idad0pjtjd6rhpnaei148cul65km5p1me89g_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)

[Donate $100 & Distribute 50 Graphic Novels](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0okck2kj1sfsuq1i5v70p6l9ghe46pn3vnt4t2o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)

[Donate $250 & Distribute 150 Graphic Novels](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt97q3iub9pgrcn6ou0t89si496svmmcbudk33m8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)

[Donate $500 & Distribute 300 Graphic Novels](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqimqm1j9is023knkgjshb2u215t4lc0n43go9q8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)
Ayn Rand said, "Art is the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal."

We are using art to communicate the ideals of reason, individualism, productivity, achievement, and FREEDOM.

I hope you will join me on this adventure to transform the mindset of the next generation so that they can reach their highest potential, in a free and rational future.

Thank you,

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society

**P.S. Here 's a sneak peek from inside our _ANTHEM_ : The Graphic Novel.** With your help, I plan to distribute 75,000 copies to young people this year--and 100,000 copies in 2024. [Please donate $10 or more to help me distribute the graphic novel today](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkh98jcs1kj0o7is1lv1bc6bijv5jhe3iev0ju30_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs).

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaolalea5uucuvobul136edb1bb5cuk0ib85hki0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68or0c1gecoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zncu0ocmli5slvav12g6dpeuoqoerobrc0brip18_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7chh2bs)_

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Why South Carolina took a chance on me
body:
It’s been a journey.

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

When I was sworn in as the first female governor of South Carolina over 12 years ago, it was one of the greatest honors of my life.

_But, winning this race didn 't come easy..._

>From the day I launched my campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against me. I was the least known candidate and the least funded. I was told I was too brown, too female, and too young. I was the outsider and the underdog, but that didn't stop me.

Just months before the primary, I was polling in fourth place, but I never gave up. **South Carolina took a chance on me, and I won.
**
It wasn't the first time South Carolina took a chance on me. When I ran against a 30-year incumbent for the state legislature, some people said I didn't stand a chance. But the people of my district heard my message and knew I would fight for them. They took a chance on me, and I won. Then, I proved I deserved to be there and they reelected me.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5bfdn0erdnsrbpj9roriq0prh91ej267i12sjhg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7c9h2bs)
---

I've never lost a race. Being the underdog hasn't stopped me before, and it's certainly not going to stop me now. But I need people like you to take a chance on me just like the people of South Carolina did. I need your support to pull this off. **[Please pitch in a generous contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my fight to be your next President.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1qp7fdsgkuk29u58ta9ggdcpgjcvcv5ep79nhpg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7c9h2bs "Please pitch in a generous contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my fight to be your next President.")**

_**South Carolina took a chance on me**_ because they saw we shared the same values - a love of country and a determination to defend it. They knew I would fight for them and make their voices heard. I would put people over politics. I would fight for the values our country was founded on... _And that 's exactly what I did. _

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvpqb5mtuhu7j7oguncd2ndilup97l153dpe2v8g_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7c9h2bs)
---

My dedication to stand for America was instilled in me from a young age. I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came here legally. Growing up the only Indian family in a small southern town, we faced stares and judgment. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But over time, people learned to move past our differences and focus on what made us the same.

It wasn't always easy to navigate being a brown girl in a black-and-white world, but my parents taught me that even on our worst day, we were blessed to live in the greatest country on earth.

I ran for governor to make sure every South Carolinian could experience the freedom, hope, and opportunity America has to offer.

**When I won, I proved I deserved to be there. **

I never backed down from my fight to make our state stronger and stand for freedom. I went against the status quo and fought for legislation that actually made a difference in all areas from government transparency, to voter id laws, to the economy, to our fighting for our children's education.

The lessons that I've learned throughout my lifetime are the lessons that I will carry with me everywhere I go. America is always worth fighting for, and I will do everything in my power to protect the values she stands for.

That's why I am continuing my fight to stand for America as I run to be your next president. But it is going to take all hands on deck to defeat Joe Biden and put our country back on track.

**[It's up to us to make it happen. That's why I need to know, will you take a chance on me just like the great state of South Carolina did?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1kgfs6fjijh6f9p2sj71mtneahmd3i6hmlfr370_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7c9h2bs "It’s up to us to make it happen. That’s why I need to know, will you take a chance on me just like the great state of South Carolina did?")**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm8pu8mr4uod7cl8buafr222vpu5kut95lls6nuo_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob7c9h2bs)

Thank you for believing in me and having faith in our future.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjumc403ndmhe2kg43qjhkn5m286jqe3cfvvk73g_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob6cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfjh50j291dht40tl7n51hb2eh93kbkl3v6a4g7g_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob6cth2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhvubitjs6828dctd7bgp9to7cdfr8dhd8ut46u8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob6cth2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z41gkpasncilm63fqvonjrb28sgpqs7u7t4qulh0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob6cth2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zholmcimpl6872k5i799fmm1cqah782uo215dfqo_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm4ob6cth2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pro Life Update

body:

The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Why South Carolina took a chance on me
body:
It’s been a journey.
| |
---
| | |
Friend,

When I was sworn in as the first female governor of South Carolina over 12 years ago, it was one of the greatest honors of my life.

_But, winning this race didn’t come easy ..._

From the day I launched my campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against me. I was the least known candidate and the least funded. I was told I was too brown, too female, and too young. I was the outsider and the underdog, but that didn’t stop me.

Just months before the primary, I was polling in fourth place, but I never gave up. **South Carolina took a chance on me, and I won.
**
It wasn’t the first time South Carolina took a chance on me. When I ran against a 30-year incumbent for the state legislature, some people said I didn’t stand a chance. But the people of my district heard my message and knew I would fight for them. They took a chance on me, and I won. Then, I proved I deserved to be there and they reelected me.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22911%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tuO5MvsLAHPAsFOytomGbw&sysid=1)
---

I’ve never lost a race. Being the underdog hasn’t stopped me before, and it’s certainly not going to stop me now. But I need people like you to take a chance on me just like the people of South Carolina did. I need your support to pull this off. **[Please pitch in a generous contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my fight to be your next President.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KZmagAkrn1U6Eb%2bgNkKWTw&sysid=1 "Please pitch in a generous
contribution of $25 or more to help me fund my fight to be your next
President. ")**

_**South Carolina took a chance on me**_ because they saw we shared the same values - a love of country and a determination to defend it. They knew I would fight for them and make their voices heard. I would put people over politics. I would fight for the values our country was founded on... _And that’s exactly what I did. _

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22911%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tuO5MvsLAHPAsFOytomGbw&sysid=1)
---

My dedication to stand for America was instilled in me from a young age. I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came here legally. Growing up the only Indian family in a small southern town, we faced stares and judgment. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But over time, people learned to move past our differences and focus on what made us the same.

It wasn’t always easy to navigate being a brown girl in a black-and-white world, but my parents taught me that even on our worst day, we were blessed to live in the greatest country on earth.

I ran for governor to make sure every South Carolinian could experience the freedom, hope, and opportunity America has to offer.

**When I won, I proved I deserved to be there. **

I never backed down from my fight to make our state stronger and stand for freedom. I went against the status quo and fought for legislation that actually made a difference in all areas from government transparency, to voter id laws, to the economy, to our fighting for our children’s education.

The lessons that I’ve learned throughout my lifetime are the lessons that I will carry with me everywhere I go. America is always worth fighting for, and I will do everything in my power to protect the values she stands for.

That’s why I am continuing my fight to stand for America as I run to be your next president. But it is going to take all hands on deck to defeat Joe Biden and put our country back on track.

**[It’s up to us to make it happen. That’s why I need to know, will you take a chance on me just like the great state of South Carolina did?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22913%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iB3lhSzk4%2ba2O1K1%2bdhsGA&sysid=1 "It’s up to us to make it
happen. That’s why I need to know, will you take a chance on me just like the
great state of South Carolina did?")**

But, winning this race didn’t come easy ... From the day I launched my campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against me. I was the least known candidate and the least funded. I was told I was too brown, too female, and too young. I was the outsider and the underdog, but that didn’t stop me. When I ran against a 30-year incumbent for the state legislature, some people said I didn’t stand a chance. But the people of my district heard my message and knew I would fight for them. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I'm an outsider
body:
My parents weren’t political when I was growing up.

| |
---
| | |
Friend, My parents weren’t political when I was growing up. Growing up, I learned independence by refusing to be an outsider in my own community. I learned integrity by watching my parents succeed in America. I learned compassion by feeling how much ignorance hurts and seeing how understanding heals. | | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ppYGLLS6QwiaBdlyQGdk7g&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I never thought of a life in politics. It was a world I knew nothing about and didn’t care about. From what I could see, politicians were people on TV who claimed to be working for us but too often seemed to be busy promoting themselves. In school, being in student government or even taking a political science class was never for me. Instead, I thought I would have a future in business. I always loved numbers, and in the world of business, numbers tell stories that are fascinating to me.

That’s how I got my start. When I was 13, I started doing the books at my mom’s store. When I returned to our family business, after earning an accounting degree, I learned how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away.

My mom told me not to complain but do something about it.

So, I did.

That’s when I ran for state legislature. I didn’t know that you weren’t supposed to run against a 30-year incumbent. But being the underdog didn’t matter to me. I wanted to fight to make a difference.

So, I reached out to every person I could. I told them why I wanted to work for them. I won. I immediately got to work. I fought for government transparency, stood up to reckless spending, and worked for the people of my district.

Then I ran for governor. I was the underdog once again, but I fought and won. I challenged the status quo in the state house and as governor and fought for legislation that would make a difference, from transparency in government and voter ID laws, to strengthening the economy and championing education.

I’ve worn many hats throughout my life. I’m an accountant, a mom, a proud wife of a combat veteran, the daughter of immigrants who came here legally, and a strong conservative. I’ve served as governor and UN Ambassador.

Most importantly, I’m a proud American who knows our best days are yet to come if we unite to save our country. _**[Will you join me in this fight?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675372%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xeubWMAQ3Wg6pSwhoq6nvA&sysid=1 "Will you join me in this
fight?")**_

---

clean_body: My parents weren’t political when I was growing up. | | | | | Friend, My parents weren’t political when I was growing up. Growing up, I learned independence by refusing to be an outsider in my own community. I learned integrity by watching my parents succeed in America. I learned compassion by feeling how much ignorance hurts and seeing how understanding heals. | | | "JOIN MY TEAM" I never thought of a life in politics. It was a world I knew nothing about and didn’t care about. From what I could see, politicians were people on TV who claimed to be working for us but too often seemed to be busy promoting themselves. In school, being in student government or even taking a political science class was never for me. Instead, I thought I would have a future in business. I always loved numbers, and in the world of business, numbers tell stories that are fascinating to me. That’s how I got my start. When I was 13, I started doing the books at my mom’s store. When I returned to our family business, after earning an accounting degree, I learned how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. My mom told me not to complain but do something about it. So, I did. That’s when I ran for state legislature. I didn’t know that you weren’t supposed to run against a 30-year incumbent. But being the underdog didn’t matter to me. I wanted to fight to make a difference. So, I reached out to every person I could. I told them why I wanted to work for them. I won. I immediately got to work. I fought for government transparency, stood up to reckless spending, and worked for the people of my district. Then I ran for governor. I was the underdog once again, but I fought and won. I challenged the status quo in the state house and as governor and fought for legislation that would make a difference, from transparency in government and voter ID laws, to strengthening the economy and championing education. I’ve worn many hats throughout my life. I’m an accountant, a mom, a proud wife of a combat veteran, the daughter of immigrants who came here legally, and a strong conservative. I’ve served as governor and UN Ambassador. Most importantly, I’m a proud American who knows our best days are yet to come if we unite to save our country. "Will you join me in this fight?" | | "JOIN MY TEAM" I’m running for president because I know Americans deserve better. It’s time for a new generation of leadership to come in, step up, and reverse the damage that the Left has created. Winning is only possible with a strong team of grassroots supporters by my side. If you have even $5 to spare, it will make an important difference. "Will you chip in just $5 or more today to help me win this fight for our nation’s future?" My very best, | Nikki Haley | | "JOIN MY TEAM" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdr4b1obmnvkq2nq4kmrmh6e8c71hasqdrejqlf0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znpfqg5o9p7afrhs5207i6lj47kcm9cv0842jgro_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmigqlsjroig9vt2gp349t4il5of30vcjipaltuo_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znb1e6b8uspc3alp0k83q09mbnutougp8rqar13o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zltutoubd42g0fmeksqmj4v48sflg64seniisso0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhhqopnfunsckf1vkbaqul26th6mk8j118q7nrn0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj5h8961e8u4g9qppvdr63ji61414mmjs9ak24d0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zihuijj13c4ldvfgkelsg5part2ivrf4aj6en97o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqjtct1pjs0c2f0mvpufrrm744bpdanmu00crpg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zus93sm01v3k94r9lg653su1i73t6pdisk40jibg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2et3gpqmlveo1qtnmpqj5skjmgbbuu1iiln0p38_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8oi6h0mpv101e2nh49v94pgii7a23jq4ld8m048_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zflnsi4go7es5jqj0vhgl3gi28proj2076l0f210_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdl1m02scbvvbsn6kd20hb4o2ct7d4od24lvl9tg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb48fccs2hk7fqvvof9bfs6qr4v0atr9i7ne35lo_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0drr8hs1druti232t0hu38e77k8rfu9a2bth3l0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmimppe3g32skmbof2jl4k2gf8osrklradhrrnr0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztmm88ql8rnjpqiu64549u4662fdh8t4tiftb9ag_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgfft6gan7am61n2retf71mgevhqnsnrf61vgfm8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
---

body:

| |
# **Financial Freedom in America**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-fLNxOeMg)
---
Fellow Patriot, THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of **_The College Scam_** \-- have you? [**If not, I want to send you your very own copy when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to TPUSA today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Yes -- ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of shipping. [**Just click here to get your copy!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
The Left is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities, brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX DOLLARS. Turning Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help. [**That's why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._-4ows4HHpUqj9iQ) We want to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned Americans as we can! I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people with their toxic "woke" ideology. [**But we're not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in _The College Scam_ , and I want to send you a copy as a special thank-you for your support.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-0fyZszWyqg)
---
[Get Your Copy](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
When you read _The College Scam_ , you'll learn: \- My 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge of whether or not it's a good investment for students OR taxpayers \- The real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness \- How the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists. Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's intensity to present my case against the College Cartel. This book has a phenomenal **_4.7 out of five stars on Amazon_** , with glowing reviews like:
> _"Charlie Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about this, he adds more valuable information." -- Susan_

> _"Charlie absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep doing what you are doing!!" -- Michal_
And there are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken college system. Are you one of them? Are you ready to arm yourself with the knowledge and the strategy that will help us dismantle the College Cartel? [**Then please -- let me send you a copy of The College Scam right now. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a few dollars, to Turning Point USA.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Get Your Copy](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
When you claim your copy, you get the best of both worlds: You'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! Join the thousands of Americans who have already taken advantage of this limited-time offer, and learn how you can join the fight against the College Cartel today. **Claim your copy of The College Scam and help us defend America's future!** Thank you for your support,
---
Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjQ0LTUxZmM4NDY0OThlNzQxMTBhODBjMmFlM2RmODc2NDM4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/wBlLeHqxhil8zLXLZiT8Hg) to unsubscribe.

name: Jennifer Grossman
subject: A radical graphic novel is red-pilling kids
body:
Too many young people are feeling confused, anxious, and alienated.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt2ok638a10sj5ntbr8q2irb80bjpsiu7fua375o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
Friends,

Have you talked to any high school or college students recently? Too many young people are feeling confused, anxious, and alienated. Support for capitalism is at an all-time low, even among young Republicans!

Cancel Culture, identity politics, and moral relativism are smothering the spirit of Generation Z. Teens and twentysomethings are disoriented by a culture in which victimhood is valorized, conformity is expected, and envy is encouraged.

**And here 's something to really wake you up. A recent poll at the University of Texas showed that 18% of college students are okay with _using violence_ to stop speakers from campus.**

The college professors on our faculty recount how each new class of freshmen arrives on campus markedly less mature than their predecessors. Instead of welcoming hatchlings ready to take intellectual flight, administrators find themselves incubating fragile, fearful eggs, insulating them with the Styrofoam of speech codes that further extends the expiration date of adolescence.

**Death of the human spirit is what all forms of nihilism and socialism do to individuals. Everyone likes to say we 're living in 1984, but I think we're closer to Ayn Rand's dystopian vision, found in her much earlier novella _Anthem_.**

_Anthem_ delves into the destructive nature of collectivism and the dehumanizing effects of a society that suppresses individual thought and initiative. Does this sound familiar?

The challenge: to restore an America that prizes individualism, reason, and achievement, we must get to the root of the problem. That means going beyond reforming a policy here or rolling back a regulation there. We must deal with the fundamentals, the values that inform our society.

It's time for people on the right to realize this cold truth: **There is no winning in politics unless you win culturally and philosophically. Politics is downstream of culture and culture is downstream of philosophy. **
**⬇️⬇️ THE SOLUTION ⬇️⬇️**
The Atlas Society is undertaking a major project to win the cultural battle. You will be shocked by how popular this is. We are turning Ayn Rand's famous stories into graphic novels and bringing them to new audiences: including the largest Comic Cons around the country, libraries from coast to coast, homeschool groups, and even prisons.

**_Last year, we distributed 75,000 copies of our graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand 's _ANTHEM_ and _Red Pawn__!**

_The demand is exceeding our supply, so next year we are upping this distribution goal to 100K copies of our graphic novels to new audiences across the globe. _

**[I am asking for your support to reach our fundraising goal of $50,000 online. Every $10 raised helps us distribute five new graphic novels. Can you please send an urgent donation of $10, $50, or even $100 to The Atlas Society and help us bring these crucial novels to a new generation?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeuekc40aqb04o8bev9bd2fvrrl02rtojvcprbq0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)**
[Donate >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaemve0u42bldcap46lmlm10vbqbi36ukceq9n3g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq2s5l6mi32sdk6pqqcttm6iqj2t7nk1q3b91m65qbfctnkvin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df2c1h6co34s1i669bhemrtcdtjm5qj7cblshhm0o316vj7fdbieoqjflhnm4qjbpsm2v8l85inq1a1fkimav960puh2ir72sjkm8qn2t9g4obr0t5l6pp238h1e8he4933cjj6aor3c1h68oh5u)
**Why a graphic novel?**

Here's another shocking statistic...

Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

Graphic novels are the only genre among young people where readership is _growing_ -- Young Adult graphic novels were the fastest-growing publishing category in recent years. NPD BookScan reported that YA graphic novels had a growth of 62% in sales in 2019 alone. Driving that growth are the millions of young Americans flocking to Comic Cons every year.

Our mission is to bring the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through a variety of vehicles. This includes animated videos, graphic novels, social media, and both virtual and live events.

Ayn Rand impacted the lives of millions during a time when communism controlled half of the planet. Ayn Rand's fiction has been the most effective "gateway drug" to liberty, which is why CATO Institute founder Ed Crane deemed Rand the "all-time greatest recruiter for the liberty movement."

Communism isn't so "open" anymore. Collectivism and grievance politics have found new homes in identity politics and "woke" culture. _Now, the younger generation needs to hear about the philosophy of man as a heroic being, with reason as his only means of survival, and productivity as his noblest activity_.

Friends, to be frank with you... The success of The Atlas Society depends upon YOU. We receive our funding from patriots, small business owners, and independent thinkers across the country making online donations.

I'm counting on your help.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 in the next 2 weeks. Please rush your support today to help me distribute 100,000 graphic novels to young Americans. ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbdv7mgf4hv641tg71t28qjmpin4dt17ce3uvbe8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
[Donate $10 & Distribute 5 Graphic Novels](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpsikjijriqqpf0ebtbo16hm2v9sko8dj44gllr8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $20 & Distribute 10 Graphic Novels](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6abibca391skua9d96b9j4sotpdbnpa400cv388_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $50 & Distribute 25 Graphic Novels](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlvvugld2149p9m5t070br24130gb5aleikl69i0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $100 & Distribute 50 Graphic Novels](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8hnfh55m98qhooijnm08digdjbrjb908o9dmvo_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $250 & Distribute 150 Graphic Novels](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zigedqlog1egl7sk63rj61fs1govpoarldfpk70g_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $500 & Distribute 300 Graphic Novels](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze7ccut169inoob6bhadu8f2u0ev39dhgodt8hq8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)
Ayn Rand said, "Art is the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal."

We are using art to communicate the ideals of reason, individualism, productivity, achievement, and FREEDOM.

I hope you will join me on this adventure to transform the mindset of the next generation so that they can reach their highest potential, in a free and rational future.

Thank you,

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society

**P.S. Here 's a sneak peek from inside our _ANTHEM_ : The Graphic Novel.** With your help, I plan to distribute 75,000 copies to young people this year--and 100,000 copies in 2024. [Please donate $10 or more to help me distribute the graphic novel today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3lm7lfp2k0hiiabmmfoaa02h9l0i9cmenb57n0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs).

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjas843g2ru9skk8pnju7cf4lq27o6hnev5c5bno_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chhm0o30sjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5e10n1rs4otaksh06lbasmceim026mgb6dhi7cg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm6o32chh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztkjin31mcp6rtvir11ers02eesbct5f3a4nbs30_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4spim6or0c9i649fg)

name: Kathryn Cantwell
subject: Fwd: (HTML VERSION): Final Sprint
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BERBRICK FOR CONGRESS**
body:
__
Getting down to the brass tacks...| | | [](https://walterberbrick.com/?&emci=051ba2b0-bb48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=)
---
| | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/berbrick-for-congress-1?)
---
| |
# #TeamBerbrick ALL HANDS ON DECK
---
Dear Friends, I hope you saw my email yesterday sharing how well Walter Berbrick did in his final debate, which is airing on Channel 10 WJAR today at 4pm. We were seen as the underdog, but with a low voter turnout, we have reached over 15,000 voters with our mailers, knocked on over 2,000 doors, have seen website traffic escalate, purchased $5,000 in social media ads, made over 3,500 calls and six rounds of text messages and been on every media outlet in the district. You and I know we need real leadership in Washington and Walter is the only candidate with the right credentials, **but he and I and Rhode Islanders are counting on YOU!** Many Rhode Island voters still **do not know there is an election** the Tuesday after a major summer holiday. **As part of #TeamBerbrick, can Walter count on you to give your time this weekend to see us over the finish line?** **_Whether you have volunteered in the past or not, please fill out this form so we can easily coordinate volunteers_ for the maximum voter outreach possible. [https://forms.gle/FcUbxpET9xMet7QS8](https://forms.gle/FcUbxpET9xMet7QS8?&emci=051ba2b0-bb48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=)** It is easy to drop flyers with a list and sharing why you support Walter Berbrick and making phone calls from anywhere in the U.S. from the comfort of home. What will you do to get Walter Berbrick to Congress? For any questions, email Kate [ kate@walterberbrick.com ](mailto:kate@walterberbrick.com "kate@walterberbrick.com")or call/text [401-447-0346. ](tel:4014470346 "tel:4014470346") **We want to encourage everyone to make dinner plans at Incred-A-Bowl where you can order an amazing dinner and celebrate election results with us starting at 8pm election night. 1075 S. Broadway, East Providence, RI 02914.**
---
|
---
| |
# **Berbrick starts ad campaign**
---
Our campaign is hyper-focused to meet voters, increase our name recognition, and meet people where they are and live. Since last we spoke, three mailers have launched and this week we begin our social media ad buy on Facebook and Instagram. Friends, this is the time **we need you to start sharing why you support Walter and sharing our donation link with your networks.** Will you match or help raise funds today? Let’s win this!
---

**_The FBI and DOJ have been caught SPYING on me while I led the Russiagate investigation. This DIRECT interference in our investigation was an UNLAWFUL attempt to sabotage our constitutional oversight mandate_!**

When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

The Durham Report has fully corroborated these findings and flat-out stated the FBI had zero basis to launch any investigations into President Trump or his campaign.

This made me the target of radical politicians, the Fake News media machine, and even the Deep State itself.

Worse, I witnessed the Deep State hunt down America-First patriots and FBI whistleblowers with expensive and baseless legal actions.

Why?

To punish anyone not aligned with the Establishment's agenda.

This is why I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides financial assistance to everyday Americans that have become the victims of the Deep State while EXPOSING the lies and corruption of our own government.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7b5cr437mlmc691t62bjfmlhbhr5fe36norpl6o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zogf5p8mpblsaa7kfakv2pn4lk0ucvr3gfba6p80_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfuojs502d90irucsj2rap0dikpe5hcbpnvbnagg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zep3eis0qvaqif22nns9vt7tslnp62laar3d25j0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0m6kj52s4l0ka5avjjpbaal7j3l1kneuc109818_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn69kkato56og29dcpllpgc40j5g155ctmu4d6cg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrgph44u8oqd6umqkfla1mjkjjlhhtk7j0524ip8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "Never Give Up: Donate now!")
_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkuqah5u3crm9ur2v2gjpddhl6kfnbfsirq1977o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clhm9or2cdh2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22937%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5XkLiNWhsdMFNUCBDvxWsQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22938%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hwHac8RcLU8DL53R9nddzA&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22939%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TfkOxs4I%2fgmwbRpo7xh07w&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22930%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DrfVI6Ipo3aU7Si9M7eFyQ&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22931%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VDyUOQUAMXU9N8xeTXP%2b1w&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. That is why I’m writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Donald Trump may be out of the doghouse after this massive plan was announced
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 01, 2023

Donald Trump may be
out of the doghouse after this massive plan was announced

Trump is currently in a
dogfight for the battle of the presidency with Joe Biden. Current
polls show them neck and neck.

And Donald Trump may be out of
the doghouse after this massive plan was announced.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Donald Trump admitted to
the unthinkable saying just two words

Former President
Trump has been playing nice for too long. Now he's on the
offensive.
➞ Continue Reading

BREAKING: A Republican
presidential candidate just dropped out of the race

Running for president
is not for the faint of heart. This candidate realized that
rather quickly.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump's 2024 hopes
may be crushed after this latest attack

Trump has been
fighting tooth and nail against radical Democrats. But now he's
going to have to fight even harder.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: Fwd: Immediate Action!
body:
Hi Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw Anthony's email below.

Our campaign is nearing a vital fundraising deadline. Our state's values and safety are at risk, and every bit of assistance can make a profound difference.

Can you chip in?

DespositoForCongress.com/donate [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=plain+link&utm_campaign=Fwd+Immediate+Action+Email]

Sincerely,

Team D'Esposito

------- Forwarded Message -------

From: Anthony D'Esposito

Date: Thurs, Aug 31, 2023 at 3:10 PM

Subject: Immediate Action

To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

We stand at a pivotal juncture with less than 9 hours to go.

Radical socialist agendas are testing Long Island and New York State's very fabric, and I'm reaching out to urge you to understand the profound implications of this fight.

Help me fight back. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Fwd+Immediate+Action+Email]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Fwd+Immediate+Action+Email]

Kevin Thomas, one of my radical opponents, and his cohort have the support of several state senators who, to our collective dismay, have pushed for dangerous legislation such as bail reform and other questionable criminal justice endeavors. Notably, these senators have drawn the ire of an impressive coalition of 23 police unions, the very guardians of our communities, for their reckless actions.

Your immediate action is critical. Your last-minute contribution – be it $10, $25, $50, or any other amount – will provide the resources we need to counter these radical ideologies and ensure the safety and prosperity of our state. CHIP IN NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=second+button&utm_campaign=Fwd+Immediate+Action+Email]

This is our defining moment.

As we make our final stand, let's remind Kevin Thomas and his enablers that Long Island and New York State will not be swayed by extremism.

With a coalition of 23 police unions standing against such dangerous policies, it's evident where the trust of our communities lies.

Time is of the essence, and the stakes couldn't be higher. Your steadfast support is our bedrock. Join by chipping in $10, $25, $50, or ANY AMOUNT and let's ensure our values triumph. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Fwd+Immediate+Action+Email]

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstrbncou7jrdr620ivdp66ukm3futlvh1fd0ja8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaop2eu9gj3u6fb042jnuob0midoolg3q5v4mamg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm067ishjslbdvhms1miovfvnleth0dhe9euh2go_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5g91suib6qcnftper91unacpddb7te54mp00tlo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjm11gi7tjiih87b6qnr6ota4qjfm9f2f2lc6l30_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za34svohfg5u7c2j5tg6omh3rv7km9lk3nrlnu6o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjlf15s1ct7bktce4e153oo7nfgknbaud10smff0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Hi, it’s Ann.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrf4cv4uuu97faa3lehbd6jkcdbtbueo4gvvgl7o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)
---
**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdoe8ul8fb9uvhrd2cr41cfftgl7dnvssdvf7ca0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcqrki92d4cs6vao1h4rqhfuuhmuk5q1rup7rsog_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don’t stand up today, America’s destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That’s why I’m hoping and praying that you’ll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6hqkqmv9bbs64cipv6odup0mbaopoi028ma6ua0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6c5h2bs)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. God Bless You, Ann Coulter, On Behalf of the 1776 Project PAC
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4gghel53a86vd2juul9obklkd7gmd0idqjmvh90_rp22sh2s8i66p76cljmcoj6cph2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

body:
Donald Trump’s court proceedings in the Georgia election case will be televised and live-streamed, the judge said Thursday, following precedent in the Fulton County court system. No trial date has been set yet.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# FRIday, SEPT. 1, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today marks the 84th anniversary of the start of World War II. Germany invaded Poland on Sept. 1, 1939, prompting France and Britain to declare war. [Here's the Times front page that day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72OtCAUQJ8GOg3ciz8UFF8z3XztlgbkoneDYpSMmbffzNZbn5OTnK_n9PSceV_--41cTWXyc-UXTco2ugGcQEaXiIBQktO9xa4flUG5uhjibDyM8xB0Mtoba0Mi1SGOIaYYJDtQgMoqrWxncGhjGrsRrcaeBgQFwiiKXMvZfhfe60opv8uLznYum8xurfW4BP4T8BDwuO-7LXtd-Yr-_TEEPI611HJ9YDlzbG5_NsxNoIX3S54uHjfnzFc_CKOWzXP-Ldc_P38CAAD__yOSVPA).

Today is our first-ever _Feel Good Friday _down in The Rotator section, and to make sure we nailed it on the first try, we included the only thing absolutely guaranteed to make you feel good -- puppies. Golden Retriver pups are perfect, and we hope your Labor Day weekend is too! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQgOGnsbdG5zvHsQdvqFtZGaNLcmkP2TUKpoi3R2Kl6y_9w_d2mS-sRe_XV66S-95mXrs-ZIZ0ciekGe2WdxEUspJdSDSGCJ7sLccJfESJntcQWHhxK7AEtyxJIieymhGQIIGDNHqahm2PY6TkKMhECGg8yKa9HcN703u_yV5-2kOOYW3Vlvw_GjwbOn_1aujFgz3y9vGtpehnmIyHa2Utf29_KvkNAAD__1jjSWU) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u9CAQAJ8GurOWXf9AQfE17u6qT0ppYVjOJPg42ehQ3j5K0qafGWnersvVpZwe95vb2dZYFudrevEC5qIuSAvKYCMzMkm2ajQ0jBp6kpvFqI1anV89BaUxuIFXHiIY5Vdt-lEmi4AEBhSYoaepC1EPmoyikSdCQNEDh1TL0b2X9Kgbx_xZXnx0vuwy263W5ynon8BZ4Nxa66LzvJby8Q0InP9vPP8aN26nwFkeNjxbyjmd4yR6uO8u5Z9a_fPtKwAA___WWU_B).
