---
## Trump's Georgia Case to be Streamed on YouTube
**Donald Trump 's** court proceedings in the Georgia election case will be [televised and live-streamed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskEFrgzAYQH9NvEViosYccigDRwfajXUbPUk0X2xKNGJipf9-dOedHw8e76fpGmWdncdWTSCj8Z0aor1DRwTOMGUdTbQ0ABRYAjIrBSvKiuQsuUqW9UpwVRhWikIrk5GeCyaAK9JnFa8SKymhjAiSEVHkjKfaVEXFRMZK4IwSinIC2ka_pjdv53gF4x7-Dms6-Clx8hrjEhA7IFojWu_7nqrb8GSI1ot3NtohIFqbzUU_49umR8BBPQKO6zYtePDbGvGy-gFA23kMeLfO4R5wBAd3G0AjWr-2X-c2P18O3y8f_PjenE7t-XgpP98aROtklXp5WjaUHOVknJR1f3Xx31e_AQAA___y8mq8), the judge said Thursday, following precedent in the Fulton County court system. No trial date has been set yet. The hearings and trials for all the Georgia defendants will be telecast on the [Fulton County YouTube channel,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL8Gb0H2ncH24KFLtnTtiAw-gyMTR3AE5e-rdO76nvSk93MbbiGX_Ji_w0qeUx3CxPlFg3QXdQEcQESfiIBQkFe9w663UqNYfBo7tJCio6AiGBujVSOq0Yyp0yYakT1IQOmkkq7TaNqYbGfRKezJIEhotKSYuW7tveYHL5TKu75oa6e6iuIX5ufe4FcD1wau53m273rwMdLHf6CW9yPOtE-VeZ1CIhKbj88zl5L33jRazmvI5S_H_879BgAA__8ctlBS) and there'll be pool coverage for all press. Trump's other cases are in federal court, which don't allow cameras. Separately, Trump pleaded not guilty to the charges against him in the case and said he'd waive arraignment, allowing him [to skip next week's hearing.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQxvGnsTtH48FgKCiuSZdrr7QwDM6cMFiYdbRvv0rqLX_6mk__f4_l4Thx3v66nWyLZXG-8UULmGEcUCzYBxuJkERPdlRGSKVhEv3TAso4rjMoD8qtRoFyOiBNBGFaxyh6tggowMAIRk5ivoWopRZmFIpmgYDdBBS4lXr7Xzi3J8X0XS6qN1_2Ptlna8fZiT8d3ju8uyPT63xPb9TGPlGH91a_9mN4Ob7oHFytjre8U27DRqVu7AZK5BuXPHC-6Gy8uY9QOgjGxxhAaFq1XjVIidJrSQG87KsNx4tT4lPN3QTb7jh9jrVfM_0EAAD___k9aTY) He also asked to separate his case from the other defendants, who are seeking a speedy trial.
## Feds Recommend Easing Pot Restrictions
The Dept. of Health and Human Services has recommended to the Drug Enforcement Administration that [federal restrictions be eased on marijuana](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskbuO3DAMRb9G7jSQRT9GhYsAA3ebNqWhlagRF3oMJHoX-_eBk5Qp2PAQ4D24v96ON0uJyvOnzbhxqId1TJ94KCNHqeHQg98CokYYcBsXA_NyVxMMcZvX4I1TenaTQeUnM6rxDgFNMOHdox9o00qDMmpUZp5gvflwn-9gRlhwBa20mBR64tpuH5UKRwzpu35iu7mah7RF5lcX8EPoXeidI0ZK6WJC76-ayH0LvUe0iaOzDYXep3E1oCYZY5cdi--yoas5Y_GWqRbJVXq0shbZsLuI_rzcZbaNPk5b7PUK9pPz0evZHAp4cER3toaFb606W_Cr_82wXGcZPZ1ZwOPaJ2TG9o84m1-WnkXAgxzKa-x7x8JD2_zri1KivqxiUs9s6Y_WwP8t4HcAAAD___1Si2I). The DEA says it's now doing its own review. The news sparked a [jump in the value of cannabis company stocks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOozAQgOGnMd0gM0MAFy6uocu1VyIbxsmcDI5sE7Rvv8rWW__Np__ffbk7iXI8_rqdbQ1pcWuVNy_aQAdICzabDczI1LDtBkO3YdI9NU_rp2GjfnVm9P3ojXE-sDbdhM7TSMiNWNRI2uhOm1tPY7uF6TaR6WjgkVCj6jVvUlNu_yc56pND_Epvzu2a9ibaZ62vouiPwlnhfF1Xm_msnMunK5z9WeTgUhTOr1QhSN4LPJwccBbY05uBXWFYz-wLRAm1QOGjys5HhQ8N9ATUKZybbLfXJTFKGUbV68fuJP4o6q9PvgMAAP__bfRihg). Three of the top 10 biggest percentage gains in Thursday's stock market were companies in the legal marijuana business. The federal government currently lists marijuana as a Schedule 1 drug, along with LSD and heroin. The HHS has recommended that [cannabis become a Schedule 3 drug](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7oiABdsUFF-TLl97pbXAbkyEf4RJonv7U66-cjTNaL5u8w1zydv9P67kG-8zxpZfNEsnlNAw6z55JtIEPXk1OLDDJA30i0cmpxUaDjYmC4DSqhBQBeLEztk-ey01SCeVdNbAeEk82QmcgoFG0FJ3RlLKba-Xx563thCX7_1F9RL3tS9-ae04O_jX6Wunr3hs9D4_6gO15Vio09cVa348cUOxEJa2iDMuz5WqCBSpVhSJUEQpU7AJQ6DgiJMzkdUYkFkbRZPtq0_HO5eSz2HsjLyvmMtvRfvzyU8AAAD__-ipYyY), similar to performance-enhancing steroids.
## Dollar General Cuts Prices to End the Mess
Dollar General is [marking down prices on millions of items](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD3PnDAQhH-N6fZkbDDnguIaiihv2pSnPbyA8_oD2XuH-PcRqdPOjEZ6nt9fzy_0waf1F0YaeclPnNl_6CkttKD0UzVuXIgU6YbG1ljdm7vsdLON3d24V9thPxszuBadec2Dfi3SLtbMsm38qKTS0spW2r7Tw80t9_6ubasNDVpJJTpJznMutz_ZJ95oCWf-ULnNOTZh3Jj3KvRDqEmo6TiOW6zp6oSaKMG7CjXFnOgUappz3DF5ujKXQ8ACKyUqGCpEqvWEyrlQBSwEG74T-7QCbwSFGH2gAljBMzB-XyuwPUQfgs8JNs-QE_j0ocS5nBCxfLt8pAqYHDjaQz4r1IiFgQljBc4wB8IE712oCQs8Hu2qt58_mjK6_biOqxlEJ9eIPvzj5f_a_xsAAP__wpCKeQ) to sell off excess inventory while employing special teams to clean up its messy, overstocked stores. The company's stock fell 12% following Thursday's poor quarterly earnings report. Executives said part of the problem was [$100 million lost to retail theft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnMZuRfecAHjx0YUvXjuiCz8GVwQi7IXn7Kp27_9In_V_X6Uoxxe3-SSu7GvJEc40PnpSVWgJO0HgXmIGxYac7i5duUAabxVlky0AwK4Okb0YRWeORrB5Ih9A30YECVFZpZS8G-9aH4TKg1dhxj6BAGMU-1ny03zludeGQXvnBRzvntUluqXUvAj8EjALG8zzbkJ-3nxI3LuXdCBhTDFzqK7GA0eeU6JB33vigJPm581yL1EqtcmHyZ9y8fCu1OZzfz5hSLF0vjLqvFNOfWv998BsAAP__l2lelA), echoing other major retailers this year. The chain said it would take a $95 million markdown in 2023 to pay for the need to literally clear its stores of merchandise blocking the aisles, mainly home decor and toys.

No trial date has been set yet. | | | | | | FRIday, SEPT. 1, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 84th anniversary of the start of World War II. Germany invaded Poland on Sept. 1, 1939, prompting France and Britain to declare war. . Today is our first-ever Feel Good Friday down in The Rotator section, and to make sure we nailed it on the first try, we included the only thing absolutely guaranteed to make you feel good -- puppies. Golden Retriver pups are perfect, and we hope your Labor Day weekend is too! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Trump's Georgia Case to be Streamed on YouTube Donald Trump 's court proceedings in the Georgia election case will be , the judge said Thursday, following precedent in the Fulton County court system. No trial date has been set yet. The hearings and trials for all the Georgia defendants will be telecast on the and there'll be pool coverage for all press. Trump's other cases are in federal court, which don't allow cameras. Separately, Trump pleaded not guilty to the charges against him in the case and said he'd waive arraignment, allowing him He also asked to separate his case from the other defendants, who are seeking a speedy trial. Feds Recommend Easing Pot Restrictions The Dept. of Health and Human Services has recommended to the Drug Enforcement Administration that . The DEA says it's now doing its own review. The news sparked a . Three of the top 10 biggest percentage gains in Thursday's stock market were companies in the legal marijuana business. The federal government currently lists marijuana as a Schedule 1 drug, along with LSD and heroin. The HHS has recommended that , similar to performance-enhancing steroids. Dollar General Cuts Prices to End the Mess Dollar General is to sell off excess inventory while employing special teams to clean up its messy, overstocked stores. The company's stock fell 12% following Thursday's poor quarterly earnings report. Executives said part of the problem was , echoing other major retailers this year. The chain said it would take a $95 million markdown in 2023 to pay for the need to literally clear its stores of merchandise blocking the aisles, mainly home decor and toys. name: Full Mag News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eaefc997324d408b037f909bbdf897&_e=RY2_wdl5WlUxfpW_VeIsWTOVjn5kGRWaZNAitqHNMMuurV4RrIXfUOROSBz4IM-7GA9FXpGrgR2Ohpz9_dQvVeSi3HtZmZvFdd7u8CKreUWZyvSVg9mIKthM-CmbbunSbHkNRouE2GxfhqC2jpMNHTgh_gPPx7EjwcVgl6dZ5GCXuHa6ZKX9hYzT6BZfs5hdX7DXBMWEIU628pXVTSrjSBWspmX1ZHu5WVIt65BJv9Go7VioLLTeg8lw1_LpJeW2qdgVsmasgMPphbgCuUnJne2URge9aa2TDeSuAEUVfqhS316u9hI6f1X6FYXqMaNdGsDmTm4BIMLcRe0BBk_jzXwDor37scbNLJwdCESkaF2R8wF5v2rZ1E3ymtIyfN3Tk7voHA_m-iwM3GGuzmbioauZZOkJdMiKHBDIBWezua8%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eaefc997324d408b037f909bbdf897&_e=RY2_wdl5WlUxfpW_VeIsWTOVjn5kGRWaZNAitqHNMMuurV4RrIXfUOROSBz4IM-7GA9FXpGrgR2Ohpz9_dQvVeSi3HtZmZvFdd7u8CKreUWZyvSVg9mIKthM-CmbbunSbHkNRouE2GxfhqC2jpMNHTgh_gPPx7EjwcVgl6dZ5GCXuHa6ZKX9hYzT6BZfs5hdX7DXBMWEIU628pXVTSrjSBWspmX1ZHu5WVIt65BJv9Go7VioLLTeg8lw1_LpJeW2qdgVsmasgMPphbgCuUnJnXoybazXNcvKcA3pnbBy6dldbuOgSMMVMsBHsiB8RXXNZCz3EWkAIgbeAPd8qKpKb9JZSvZA1ap_NUnVABY7l56hijsLou8Qa5ElaFXQTRyuGp-xVSt87dmFo7WVyF2hFAnZ2kkQcs_Sfi072c9vmKE%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eaefc997324d408b037f909bbdf897&_e=RY2_wdl5WlUxfpW_VeIsWTOVjn5kGRWaZNAitqHNMMuurV4RrIXfUOROSBz4IM-7GA9FXpGrgR2Ohpz9_dQvVeSi3HtZmZvFdd7u8CKreUWZyvSVg9mIKthM-CmbbunSbHkNRouE2GxfhqC2jpMNHTgh_gPPx7EjwcVgl6dZ5GCXuHa6ZKX9hYzT6BZfs5hdX7DXBMWEIU628pXVTSrjSBWspmX1ZHu5WVIt65BJv9Go7VioLLTeg8lw1_LpJeW2qdgVsmasgMPphbgCuUnJnT57hwOkkLywBhyjxbc70X6Ld4YSwBKwwln1i7QhbaDIJdx5xU1rQl9iddwJBg12MqRKDRkadY46XOOpuHtwaBThMRWOKyKdkjGyz21z6GLmnZM45lAUjDP_r1BSF6TnF3kdgKOy2eWaQ2g3dt4icto%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eaefc997324d408b037f909bbdf897&_e=RY2_wdl5WlUxfpW_VeIsWTOVjn5kGRWaZNAitqHNMMuurV4RrIXfUOROSBz4IM-7GA9FXpGrgR2Ohpz9_dQvVeSi3HtZmZvFdd7u8CKreUWZyvSVg9mIKthM-CmbbunSbHkNRouE2GxfhqC2jpMNHTgh_gPPx7EjwcVgl6dZ5GCXuHa6ZKX9hYzT6BZfs5hdX7DXBMWEIU628pXVTSrjSBWspmX1ZHu5WVIt65BJv9Go7VioLLTeg8lw1_LpJeW2qdgVsmasgMPphbgCuUnJndWmUsaJljv75iWLMtAiXojkmtW16NOCd4c3T5kl0NlLRydOZ91fDM3pcV8f_BMApUGA2DawDd08uEWyBivtNgl7cKRyDUhGodYCmV9fWtCD8EHEFD6-evoDb7us7mCQ_AkHSj8MhcnNQ6sUhMf7C40%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eaefc997324d408b037f909bbdf897&_e=RY2_wdl5WlUxfpW_VeIsWTOVjn5kGRWaZNAitqHNMMuurV4RrIXfUOROSBz4IM-7GA9FXpGrgR2Ohpz9_dQvVeSi3HtZmZvFdd7u8CKreUWZyvSVg9mIKthM-CmbbunSbHkNRouE2GxfhqC2jpMNHTgh_gPPx7EjwcVgl6dZ5GCXuHa6ZKX9hYzT6BZfs5hdX7DXBMWEIU628pXVTSrjSBWspmX1ZHu5WVIt65BJv9Go7VioLLTeg8lw1_LpJeW2qdgVsmasgMPphbgCuUnJneSVKhJ_KldzNQZ58KddIS3vEyE_2MBd4zQQN8TikFqS9hakZeGI2Mhu8vPdEOBgwsA7VNyFD1GJi4lGIFiRlKmjcmUfiLNzIWQrhMNoaeZQucZzSvrFcOLDaAOtcOf2Xl5Eg2cHco6iO8BrjVCSwwE%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here’s the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I’m coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675396%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j3Cz0hldM6i2EjcvJWrZeA&sysid=1 "Can my colleagues and I
count on you?")**

Democrats’ dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don’t see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675399%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gYCx%2fpoQAjI6xjiKA%2bUGmQ&sysid=1 "PLEASE: Support our

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I’m coming to you today, Friend. body:
We're interested in your insight

Friend,

_Have you heard?_

Thousands of Americans from all across the country have taken the NRA's **Official Survey on Gun Verification** , and we're reaching out today to ask you to join them.

Our Association is _deeply committed_ to doing everything in our power to protect the right to bear arms and stop the gun-grabbers' radical agenda. Now, we need insight from patriots like you in order to craft the most effective plan possible.

**We rely heavily on the input of law-abiding gun owners like YOU, so we're asking that you complete our****Official Survey on Gun Verification****IMMEDIATELY.**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62203309:sMhC05DN0:m:1:2532013465:5F7B0D3CC5E8F0F96F72AB62FA417C61:r)**
If we're going to defeat the Biden Administration's insane anti-Second Amendment agenda, we're going to need _all patriots_ to step up and do their part. You can do yours by completing this **Official Survey on Gun Verification TODAY.**

**[Complete the NRA's OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION TODAY to help us move forward with the best possible strategy to SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT.>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62203309:sMhC05DN0:m:1:2532013465:5F7B0D3CC5E8F0F96F72AB62FA417C61:r)**

National Rifle Association

Friend,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62203309:sMhC05DN0:m:1:2532013465:5F7B0D3CC5E8F0F96F72AB62FA417C61:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62203309:sMhC05DN0:m:1:2532013465:5F7B0D3CC5E8F0F96F72AB62FA417C61:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Friend, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62203309:sMhC05DN0:m:1:2532013465:5F7B0D3CC5E8F0F96F72AB62FA417C61:r)**

NRA

subject: Can I ask an important question?
body:
I'm headed to New Hampshire on Tuesday for back-to-back events

| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friend,

I'm headed to New Hampshire on **Tuesday** for back-to-back events, **[and I need you on my side more than ever.>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dbf86bf507404923b8b80d10f5f6cfc5&_e=jS3dTvRBx0Nh8WPUzM0zBJDCwv8Z4IqPHewgfkX2vN_Q5P0XYnM__oMlM-IcB8Z1Gm8Ns5T94B3-uBd_np8pWgmcBoR9OyKDVc4IgopENpdlehkRaToSauSBHxIIJsFNaG7sEegEskiL1fEE3QA42s9cev_NL6SOcbM68Mxp_qnBiu6cFnfjPuZXq3hgg1atfrciUDQ3HR3icPPKZv8V2HfFcFfj8qRRahR5O04z51mciu-v51Mipgb2RNMZ63ELsBMTFKq8tnnWlA7TDx_FuqOGUtK7Qt6t6d8-XiH5JAcNs5p4U85pWJHEmzNXZ3BUxPfCcMdA_UFOvizjJgdfgTcAOafsWe95R90jojsfrxzzsgGP3os4kS2eeXeVEBPRo8bTCLDvJU5ptOgvBK8WhQ%3D%3D "and I need you on my side more than ever. >>")**

So, I have an important question to ask you.

**[If you have even $7 or more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dbf86bf507404923b8b80d10f5f6cfc5&_e=jS3dTvRBx0Nh8WPUzM0zBJDCwv8Z4IqPHewgfkX2vN_Q5P0XYnM__oMlM-IcB8Z1Gm8Ns5T94B3-uBd_np8pWgmcBoR9OyKDVc4IgopENpdlehkRaToSauSBHxIIJsFNaG7sEegEskiL1fEE3QA42s9cev_NL6SOcbM68Mxp_qnBiu6cFnfjPuZXq3hgg1atfrciUDQ3HR3icPPKZv8V2HfFcFfj8qRRahR5O04z51mciu-v51Mipgb2RNMZ63EL4aG61pwkutDQu1QghqYJX5BpGBQZoxr7N8UCktTMaY3S3t68MXKpmW012TUkew_L11UkB5m4T9AG1p0Qj-OhkPAXFIVi0b-GAP1inJMUUDxoPrdMvTBnisjfrJCWq07z8Jz2wy7GVKrKHT2CY26jMw%3D%3D "If you have even $7 or more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight? As you know, we're building a strong grassroots infrastructure in early voting states so we can win and get our country back on track.

Every time I travel to New Hampshire, it's another opportunity to talk with voters, get my message out, and continue to build momentum throughout the state.

**BUT, traveling and putting on events isn 't cheap. **My team and I make sure we spend every dollar wisely. That means taking a lot of Spirit and JetBlue flights, putting on events at local venues, and stopping into mom and pop shops to meet with voters.

**[With such little time before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of this week's costs. Will you pitch in just $7?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dbf86bf507404923b8b80d10f5f6cfc5&_e=jS3dTvRBx0Nh8WPUzM0zBJDCwv8Z4IqPHewgfkX2vN_Q5P0XYnM__oMlM-IcB8Z1Gm8Ns5T94B3-uBd_np8pWgmcBoR9OyKDVc4IgopENpdlehkRaToSauSBHxIIJsFNaG7sEegEskiL1fEE3QA42s9cev_NL6SOcbM68Mxp_qnBiu6cFnfjPuZXq3hgg1atfrciUDQ3HR3icPPKZv8V2HfFcFfj8qRRahR5O04z51mciu-v51Mipgb2RNMZ63ELCh7E00vedb_cqvSrLGu6LA3HiJoBrBZf3bu8QNgsZOS8_Oe4gH1fDiX6stK1TTNBZPsd38KuntY8aNTbqFJdAcd8fcyyc4FbY3iWRGGqGQ3Dtm3CzLoilCgTZoTJqk20yqUbpc8xxgJn35pzVmXuFQ%3D%3D "With such little time before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of this week’s costs. Will you pitch in just $7? ")**

Here are just some of the things your donation will help us do in New Hampshire:
* **Cover transportations costs**
* **Help cover lodging expenses **
* **Rent sound equipment for town halls**
* **Rent chairs for town hall guests**

It's so important that I continue to travel to battleground states like New Hampshire so we reach every American with our conservative message. _**We 're putting in the hard work and laying the groundwork for victory. **_

**[Will you please step up ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dbf86bf507404923b8b80d10f5f6cfc5&_e=jS3dTvRBx0Nh8WPUzM0zBJDCwv8Z4IqPHewgfkX2vN_Q5P0XYnM__oMlM-IcB8Z1Gm8Ns5T94B3-uBd_np8pWgmcBoR9OyKDVc4IgopENpdlehkRaToSauSBHxIIJsFNaG7sEegEskiL1fEE3QA42s9cev_NL6SOcbM68Mxp_qnBiu6cFnfjPuZXq3hgg1atfrciUDQ3HR3icPPKZv8V2HfFcFfj8qRRahR5O04z51mciu-v51Mipgb2RNMZ63ELwaS4Mgp_TUhGRlyQOj7_7X9cNnmSaDGGt9eoV_eoQmz7sUI6pv9DLEMr3GxM-ATT4UZHlgDtZNPVyBiDdbc_ZPw0AZyNgXxnmRX8wMhqSt8fpFQSe_ODLch_GxkDDXTwvznTCLFjfXjZLGEvG9_1JA%3D%3D "Will you please step up ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?")**

| It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the best fit for you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73a451d1b219473b855bded061a5badd&_e=qUOo0LgY3h01giYrujnyP8kocucpf81B6sithZpN0z-fnbQT4OXvz-KSMaFgO_BbDF1pu8-jHNVxFKF9OAJwa9hwPMJkv2S9ct2ux1Z0WLypCJhpxVh8SkPVdpCIo6xPiq-Vn7FUxkUlCfhegQdkPWkKN8B09wi8VZYa8QrpM0BoQSsmnQNCA7C5__hwsEDPkS3RqsYWnr51DPTwGAjZkNvmaSQzhaTmiIykcYRJ1d1A7D3otoCAoA9svsA0sEhXodlqa4tqVobj3Oa2YhEgo_E6_w5JXkj6kTvzsToje3cs5YHf0vZ5z-lRGcADWvT9V1y89bgw77Nq7l0PKsJJAJkBCVd17fwQXwJTTh-ozIxoXtYh9Crj1qk_W2mBO1JuwsJ2GV6inSdHc1kFlfTgn3MtP_3ifMNoAlWgW3FvVsUFk9kGWzd20CSdI6tlBrpcGFKkK1v64kI6siIOQUPyHoQmajYl-CuxS9-mPcIsxlI%3D)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73a451d1b219473b855bded061a5badd&_e=qUOo0LgY3h01giYrujnyP8kocucpf81B6sithZpN0z-fnbQT4OXvz-KSMaFgO_BbDF1pu8-jHNVxFKF9OAJwa9hwPMJkv2S9ct2ux1Z0WLypCJhpxVh8SkPVdpCIo6xPiq-Vn7FUxkUlCfhegQdkPWkKN8B09wi8VZYa8QrpM0BoQSsmnQNCA7C5__hwsEDPkS3RqsYWnr51DPTwGAjZkNvmaSQzhaTmiIykcYRJ1d1A7D3otoCAoA9svsA0sEhXodlqa4tqVobj3Oa2YhEgo_E6_w5JXkj6kTvzsToje3cs5YHf0vZ5z-lRGcADWvT9V1y89bgw77Nq7l0PKsJJANXuzzITPWQrJ7t4Q0eEtgLBdExkFuYab03Eshdti9lZWS_p60_iuMjOVMQdbFEzRiqEwVVvygiZ6VQ1rtBI9DM53RxUEWsL0eM0sZsIy3EGpsFiiLX5tGxHpJPBRbdMDUMBVU3-nZGUudAD0JJBtpU%3D)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That's why SmartAsset created a [free tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73a451d1b219473b855bded061a5badd&_e=qUOo0LgY3h01giYrujnyP931ALDxZVTynq2wmkn2iNkEWwDATQjdKFa3CE53yAuz1QinPDwSmc8DT7AbMNW6XuWdIhvWHXQz-inzhqgEqVS8gKLI6ThvviELlsyNb2J1EsUJULOWndBdpZpp0vnX_ppcyigyTNj5s3cozMHH2VRH9XbSwDqXBzgP4FF5DFS0wlQdLhhl8m3488ciQpCfijpvDjDHxHNzxLToaJbj8fqieY80IiN08LNndeSn23FeYR-xrpbHUZh8SsATasr3Qk6fUFFGoQ3SEqAs-eoLGAiasWLms2hyFr55LUCQZiytlnWrlIA6hcBcaf1PU8yKLN8K9TelFRgzO8__tBbJgkIwoI9-iGe8zUsUYysxTB1xnCKGwaoqC99476ddhHjrfnUTJJo_u5jj2tz-Yka0P82aonH3tyxD9ist1GkHDON3V8s8euBqLfCzqF5OnVRg9w%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
| |
# **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| |
# _Let's Get to Work!_
---
You may notice a few small changes in this edition of The Party Line, most notably, the signature line below. Yesterday, the Indiana Republican Party State Committee elected me to continue leading our party forward after six-and-a-half years of outstanding leadership from Kyle Hupfer. We have an incredible opportunity to do just that by helping elect even more Republicans in cities and towns across the state this November, and that will be our top priority over the next few months. But we will only be able to do this with your help. While we like to celebrate and talk about our past electoral success as a party (Why wouldn't we? It's record-breaking, afterall!), we know that our successes are because of you. When you volunteer your time, knock on doors, make phone calls, donate your hard-earned dollars, and yes, vote, you're making our party that much stronger. We are proudly powered by you, and I'm looking forward to the months ahead. Now, let's get to work!
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway Click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/f756f900b239fae2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to read the full news release on the state committee's selection of Anne Hathaway to lead the party.
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---
| |
# 💡 _RALLY-ing for Indiana_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** speaks during the RALLY conference._**
---
This week,**Governor Eric Holcomb **spoke during the RALLY Conference in Indianapolis and participated in a panel discussion to discuss Indiana's work on talent development.
* The conference's goal is to "bring together entrepreneurs, executives, investors, and others who work in Indiana’s strongest industries," according to the _[IBJ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/43cd529d00955ddec3d6b838967d376c/40313)_.
* His remarks focused on Indiana's history of innovation, our competitive advantages, and what the state is doing to keep our economic momentum moving forward.

**What he's saying:** "These historic strengths, plus the state’s burgeoning tech sector, mean that Indiana is poised to reap big benefits as technology continues to work its way into every industry," said **Gov. Holcomb**.
* “Tech is obviously its own sector. But it used to be that tech [incorporated into a non-tech business] was your edge. That was your advantage. Now, if you’re not ‘plus tech,’ you’re on your way out of business. You’re not growing, you’re dying. And so to have that ecosystem maturing right here in our very backyard is really putting the state of Indiana into the pole position.”

**What else happened this week?****Gov. Holcomb** announced additional funding for [firefighters](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/6737717420f0817bc3d6b838967d376c/40313), [school safety](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/af886aaafd5983d2c3d6b838967d376c/40313), and [more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/cdfcb46e1fcc2092c3d6b838967d376c/40313). ****
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/b2ea670b3bd9a61ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/1c6299d48574237fc3d6b838967d376c/40313).

# 📰 _National Review: National Archives Confirms Existence of 5,400 Emails, Records Containing Alleged VP Biden Pseudonyms_
---
From [_National Review_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/1d86d49a03efbaa3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _:_ "The National Archives and Records Administration has confirmed that it is in possession of nearly 5,400 emails, electronic records, and documents containing pseudonyms President Biden used as vice president. "Legal non-profit Southeastern Legal Foundation filed a Freedom of Information Act request in June 2022 for the records. Those included emails containing the names Robin Ware, Robert L. Peters and JRB Ware, pseudonyms Biden used while serving in the Obama administration, according to House Republicans investigating Hunter Biden’s overseas business dealings. "On Monday, the legal organization sued NARA to obtain the records, which it alleges could reveal that Biden shared confidential government knowledge with his son." _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/ec71f19f7e99e04bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/2dfa9ab040218f80c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/5853c987db650eb3c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_

# 📰 _WFYI: Indiana Schools Receive $30 Million for Safety Projects, Nearly Two-thirds Funding Resource Officers_
---
From _[WFYI](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/fe5d29a6b53563a3c3d6b838967d376c/40313):_ "Schools across the state will receive nearly $30 million this year to spend on safety measures – with two-thirds of the funds going to law enforcement and school resource officers. "Gov. Eric Holcomb announced on Tuesday that the state approved all Secured School Safety Grant applications this year due to an increase in funding from the Indiana Department of Homeland Security. “'These school safety grants represent another example of historic investments in public safety,” Holcomb said in a press release. “I am pleased we are able to financially support every school that identified safety as a top priority.'” _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/506a4e7560989d5cc3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/3b6bbb7e4999bdc9c3d6b838967d376c/40313).[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/7d9c027ed33118dec3d6b838967d376c/40313)_

# 🗳️ _Less Than 70 Days to Go_

---
We are officially less than 70 days until Election Day and there are plenty of important dates you need to be aware of. **Make a plan:** Add these dates into your calendar and make a plan to vote this fall.
* Sept. 23, 2023: Absentee ballots begin to be mailed
* Oct. 10, 2023: Voter registration ends
* Oct. 11, 2023: Early voting begins
* Oct. 26, 2023: Deadline to request an absentee ballot
* Oct. 6, 2023: Early voting ends and absentee ballots due at noon
* **Nov. 7, 2023: ELECTION DAY**

Visit [indianavoters.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/52e57f1a2307a6f7/2ac983c7c85cbc19c3d6b838967d376c/40313) today!

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | | A Message from the Chairwoman | | Let's Get to Work! You may notice a few small changes in this edition of The Party Line, most notably, the signature line below. Yesterday, the Indiana Republican Party State Committee elected me to continue leading our party forward after six-and-a-half years of outstanding leadership from Kyle Hupfer. We have an incredible opportunity to do just that by helping elect even more Republicans in cities and towns across the state this November, and that will be our top priority over the next few months. But we will only be able to do this with your help. While we like to celebrate and talk about our past electoral success as a party (Why wouldn't we? It's record-breaking, afterall!), we know that our successes are because of you. When you volunteer your time, knock on doors, make phone calls, donate your hard-earned dollars, and yes, vote, you're making our party that much stronger. We are proudly powered by you, and I'm looking forward to the months ahead. Now, let's get to work! Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway Click to read the full news release on the state committee's selection of Anne Hathaway to lead the party. | | Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review | | 💡 RALLY-ing for Indiana | | Governor Eric Holcomb speaks during the RALLY conference. This week,Governor Eric Holcomb spoke during the RALLY Conference in Indianapolis and participated in a panel discussion to discuss Indiana's work on talent development. The conference's goal is to "bring together entrepreneurs, executives, investors, and others who work in Indiana’s strongest industries," according to the . His remarks focused on Indiana's history of innovation, our competitive advantages, and what the state is doing to keep our economic momentum moving forward. What he's saying: "These historic strengths, plus the state’s burgeoning tech sector, mean that Indiana is poised to reap big benefits as technology continues to work its way into every industry," said Gov. Holcomb. “Tech is obviously its own sector. But it used to be that tech [incorporated into a non-tech business] was your edge. That was your advantage. Now, if you’re not ‘plus tech,’ you’re on your way out of business. You’re not growing, you’re dying. And so to have that ecosystem maturing right here in our very backyard is really putting the state of Indiana into the pole position.” What else happened this week?Gov. body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65f56b5704404d19ae0424fe0c77346e&_e=WGfIhFWuS4TtC987GL-GqQTQr9XTnVbLqxQzAm6WbMRPaMfgcaCx2WypOUa9mjvJD2kO9WeiSoDVH_qvKVChDdbzv9tSr1k8-TOjNr4RN27F52qHQkS3MGk44UT-ZEyutxMhs8ptVPCqa-8YlAIov8cqz5u2lNfQdYs2EPOFow5iQJD6iRilWAU2RO8iI6SFTtoMTbwodyh019Cy5e2pmP2t6YmirTGJr8a7Pe7c7nhklJ5q9uMDJNRDuMN9vLnthQRLeJdlTTA-ovm8Q2vFQzeYxsmZT0VgJSTxV4NScMY%3D). name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here’s the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I’m coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22948%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KnrjgGA1l%2bIs0t8%2fsPz%2btg&sysid=1 "Can my colleagues and I
count on you?")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22949%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2bydTpbvwoyITxfSJUhKEw&sysid=1 "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22940%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2MEH7xkCeU2%2bbZ98ApgMug&sysid=1 "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Democrats’ dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don’t see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22941%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a2mhcpPOBM85uoOTHsrGlg&sysid=1 "PLEASE: Support our
efforts for accountability today:")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22949%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2bydTpbvwoyITxfSJUhKEw&sysid=1 "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22940%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2MEH7xkCeU2%2bbZ98ApgMug&sysid=1 "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22942%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fT%2fD83LBBXrH0Z77X8YQ2g&sysid=1 "Never Give Up: Donate now!")
_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden’s cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I’m sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won’t let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22943%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SYAGkFlrXxXegK9dYUJrgA&sysid=1 "Can you rush $8, $15, or

tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Lease sale includes CEMETERY
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1961241?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop Big Oil from drilling near a CEMETERY on public lands!**[**Act now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1961242?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ** Friend, the Department of Interior is poised to lease HUNDREDS of acres of public lands in New Mexico and Oklahoma to Big Oil. If we don’t stop the sale, **these lands could be DESTROYED by fracking or oil drilling.** The ground will _**SHAKE**_ , terrified animals will _**SCATTER**_ , and the natural landscapes will be _**STAINED**_ with pollution! One area included in _**the sale contains a cemetery!**_ Big Oil belongs nowhere near our precious public lands, let alone the places where our deceased family and friends rest. But there are only a _**FEW DAYS LEFT**_ to act before the comment period closes and we lose the opportunity to stop this sale! [**Please, Friend, stop this lease sale in New Mexico and Oklahoma before it’s too late! >> **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1961243?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **387 MORE SIGNATURES NEEDED FROM YOUR STATE BY MIDNIGHT** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1961244?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
People living on or near public lands could face serious health impacts from this lease sale. Fracking and oil drilling both produce toxic pollution that endangers nearby communities. Some of the side effects that have been reported include _**coughing fits, dizziness, nausea, and blistering headaches! **_
Fracking in particular only gets scarier the more you learn about it. In some cases, it can **TRIGGER EARTHQUAKES** and the wastewater it produces can contain **RADIOACTIVE WASTE** that _**contaminates local drinking water!**_
**It’s not too late, Friend – but we _are_ running out of time.** Your immediate action can help prevent fossil fuel destruction on our public lands, including near a cemetery! [**SEND A MESSAGE TO THE DOI: keep Big Oil off our public lands!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1961245?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1961244?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

September 4, 2023

| | | |

**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Every first and third Monday of each month, the Montgomery County Tea Party meets at Citizen Grill.
And on Monday, September 4, at 6:30 pm, Walter West joins us to give a **border update**.
He'll also discuss the **Colonia along the Liberty/Montgomery County border** and what it means for us here in MoCo.
Join us and bring some friends.
We will meet in the **air-conditioned** special events room inside Citizens Grill at 315 Enclave Drive, Conroe, TX.
Food and beverages will be available for purchase.
**Please RSVP below so that I can reserve a table**.
Try and arrive early to place your order before the meeting starts at 6:30 pm.
Seating will be limited.
As always, meetings are free and open to the public.

subject: This one lie may have ended Joe Biden’s career
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 01, 2023

Donald Trump may be
out of the doghouse after this massive plan was announced

Trump is currently in a
dogfight for the battle of the presidency with Joe Biden. Current
polls show them neck and neck.

And Donald Trump may be out of
the doghouse after this massive plan was announced.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Donald Trump admitted to
the unthinkable saying just two words

Former President
Trump has been playing nice for too long. Now he's on the
offensive.
➞ Continue Reading

BREAKING: A Republican
presidential candidate just dropped out of the race

Running for president
is not for the faint of heart. This candidate realized that
rather quickly.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump's 2024 hopes
may be crushed after this latest attack

Trump has been
fighting tooth and nail against radical Democrats. But now he's
going to have to fight even harder.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Hey there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu84ajnh6ggf20l0aoeue8bqe763f9igeeibibu0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z45pvl0r1t3pa22iqhaq6tbr1658iuqcsr0re29o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL September deadline?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z07ov6cvcen77o6c3g1v7po7kl5iiseaj89ruo0o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL September deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3jptd6tuhsss1hojvhkgf244t5dbg5ttbtpnqsg_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zavo3b7nta5iadfr4dt11dpepbv5qjf9l45po9d8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3eusdojftu7n5a430pg61a1un4vifcd7n76tr40_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za7gfu5adhsp4vflqrf3khnm58kmksord71ntu88_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge4oj1cjh2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our September deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---

clean_body: | | | | | | "Kellyanne Conway" Hey there, it's Kellyanne... "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL September deadline?" Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That 's why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our September deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you? Thanks for all you do for freedom. - Kellyanne Conway * | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. subject: It only takes SIX!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James P
body:
Adam Schiff is so beatable | | | | | Copy of Copy of Copy of Copy of New message | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=513ee92aa9&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | | My Fellow American,
Adam Schiff is going to be the Democrat nominee for Senator from Califronia. There is no doubt about it.
Now, the only question is will his opponent in the general election be a Repbulican or another Democrat.
Our jungle primary system could result in TWO Democrats running against one another for this seat. **I AM REACHING OUT TO YOU TODAY BEACUSE I DESPERATELY NEED YOUR HELP TO STOP THAT FROM HAPPENING!**
---
[DONATE $6 TO DEFEAT ADAM SCHIFF!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=6cfa86726e&e=84ee529f47)
| | | I ran for the Senate in 2018 and received the support of over 500,000 Californians despite joining the Senate primary just five weeks before the actual election. **We did that on less than $5,000!**
Now, as polling shows, we are the ONLY Republican that has a chance to make it to the general election and actuall beat Schiff **BUT** that only can happen if we hit our goal in the next 48 hours.
I'm looking for some major endorsements to help us get to the next level in this race - and they've made it very clear - they want me to have at least 25,000 individual donors to my campaign before they even CONSIDER supporting.
**WE NEED TO DO THAT AND DO IT FAST!** I'm asking you to donate just SIX dollars to my campaign - that's basically the price of a coffee at Starbucks.
**SIX DOLLARS** to defeat Adam Schiff - and that six dollars will go further than you can possibly imagine!

---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0aedfbdd92&e=84ee529f47)
| | I'm a Coast Guard Veteran. I'm an America First conservative. I'm also a guy that knows how to relate to people from all parties and walks of life.
**I am going to deliver a victory in this Senate race if you can just help me get past these other candidates and get Pencil Neck Schiff into a general election.**
I'm reaching out to you because I **KNOW** you are a patriot and have helped Republicans make it over the line before. **Now, I'm asking you humbly to help me.**
[Can you spare just six dollars TODAY to help me defeat Adam Schiff?](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=fff10a584e&e=84ee529f47)
And, once you've made your donation**forward this email to SIX more people so that they can also donate to Adam Schiff.** I need your help to get to the point where we can show our 25,000 individual donors -- can I count on you today?
Sincerely,
James P. Bradley

Paid for by James P. Bradley for US Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Simon says
body:
Tyranny and skepticism | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/simon-says?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

If I had the opportunity to say one thing to our political and public health leaders right now, it would be this: "stop the deadly game of 'Simon Says.' The trust t in public health info regarding masks, mandates, lockdowns, and idle threats is wearing thin.

Good grief, even pet owners are refusing vaccines for their dogs - including RABIES vaccinations!"

[Please watch this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=724ee31e89&e=9828080a05) to by clicking the thumbnail below see exactly what I mean. There is a stunning arrogance among our leaders, who appear poised to repeat the same mistakes of 2020:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=da68ba4393&e=9828080a05)
---
| The lives of our children and our families are not some game. You don't get to snap your fingers and command people to bow to your wishes! The sooner our leaders accept this and allow people their own autonomy and freedom, the sooner we can be that "Shining City on a Hill" again.

Watch [this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d079273735&e=9828080a05), share it with those close to you, and have a fun and safe Labor Day! There is no rest for those who are vigilant to the tyranny we face.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: C.S. Lewis like you’ve never seen him before
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.)Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author-C.S. Lewis.In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://trk.libertyledger._v5mxPhTY55_jMRrT1A)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.libertyledger._g)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings.[](http://trk.libertyledger.)We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.libertyledger._R1eNG-f5NOjIuRJQ9w)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last:[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://trk.libertyledger.) Warm regards, Bill GrayClass of 2001Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjQ0LWJkZjhhNGJmNmU2MzQzYjFhMDZlM2U5NGFhYWYxMzIxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/dBe8cVeFO9w15yZWVAUtiQ) to unsubscribe.

body:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0df4a5bd6b4c4e5482333c76b1f50af8&_e=aFSzkEqws-GN-UxXQwTS7penmyqSYAgfOasvy-bUIiUwLD88asVREuAMI2Evq05cZ74YmAlTaa721Kalz1agbEfsFNKj6Tvnpd8MDVPAQsYPzSGoZtAZOHgbQ3fyQfaFsUYEcMFrqUdNvAbLZYYmbIhfvRGQsZUvYphQ_diSe4VfaUrKcGJEJMymMzMrZG3Yq_f4-To_6DcP38gzg_7liKTFZaCXpmJWPg4jWaJVlBm8EuwEge1uWQRsZbfH4_wnexv4KFVf2lJGeaCCLO6MArLb40FOByU4y1HK4Y7_bHIwVt4xyabig96jVIhesuykfoFAtyCh482TTB6Z45VwsxVfYFSfUFuohAr5bFOmM5fjTeuOxiLJ6TVluSnjf2Rjk3u1gQZjVaCOumgSeL0iFqvx5IKRf2XyhihMOxKd_S7oogdDDU3z7NjfT_jvxzTVGEdW3aaxjLvkYAsd944TertSxbqLzAg5fO8TadmjknBUtiuHxuITJhEV4Bfnu2Eo7QjuZd-RSzfRWtA1kJ7mZB_2HDYylaFNaL7zn_6g0fq8WWWeS0PoGXz36wYqZoqtVdVv4q-ilmBEJIfgMj4qItUtE6SqMyailguXFIFUMEC59A4-miGPIG7aZYjFGh9T)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0df4a5bd6b4c4e5482333c76b1f50af8&_e=aFSzkEqws-GN-UxXQwTS7penmyqSYAgfOasvy-bUIiUwLD88asVREuAMI2Evq05cxArk3edjPveVDdzi5WUeID0dmuHAyHF-Y3x_ALQaMEIiBYUW6b991UqhCYkIDj9MIAiRJCqfhWlpCfTVAWOSBLm1_gNwhUUiZ3bqaALrjSE7WimJJTSwxgtA9K_0llo0kIUjjfpppbRc9j4m8M1dT_PzAtyRK0ww-9xgc0yUNNwcKFtrshSs6-5ynSVZMAKCLcsAPSC1QAEkwqB7K2Gqs7lII5zq-2nXZwzBMF1WFSLT91IAfwn3wxbgUMqJq1wx6HBuXkB2jjRbEA8YQxTh2yfdYVhjx6ez6df7pHxS76L1WuzM4e-oYr4KvEtf4662HCMd5F_H_cJqEcHwCCaO5jggJRAcOrU-XYiaOBMpEmRzPmaKX9ATe84DXtX5NxL2FPIDsYz4ykqlR13inXcg7KKJCF9JsyddrdOwQg5qCkktvgCKQBV5FgsOcN9OqsRpdE6qsYZoD5VyQunxl1LSMyF1ey88XXxbwiVcZ2kntfxMcP1z6SfAXqXd27XrzbbLO0T-4UO-mOMMiEqU1oIr7HiTZ7w9jYWojwHXCK_ffeCtsimvxrTfGmxEPk0M1fZtwC-bAZ-IMFl5U6aOEu4Btw%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Saving democracy means defending our values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Georgia Leadership Committee
body:
Hi Derek,
I have worked with all of you to stand up and fight voter suppression and fight for the rights of our people and democracy to thrive.
Every day we are seeing why standing up matters so much as we watch an extremist Supreme Court guts our rights, racial gerrymandering disenfranchise voters, gun violence reach an all time high, abortion access stripped away and our climate reaching record-breaking temperatures. **I know that hope can feel out of reach, but we know that when we fight and when we stand up, we make a difference.**
Voters in Ohio made it clear that the vast majority of people believe that abortion should be legal. Scientists continue to discover new and innovative ways to fight climate change and protect our planet. President Biden and the Democrats passed historic legislation to reduce the cost of living for everyday families.
Derek, progress is happening, and that’s what gives me hope - _this community_.
[**Will you donate to One Georgia right now to stand up for our democracy and keep making a difference?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69029566/424889281/2129541143?refcode=fr82923&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWFiNmNhOC1jNTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFoLshjGROZkHwS4sJfRza_3aeL-Lgpm4TaQNrfqiYk=)

Recent court hearings, such as those in Alabama, have also unequivocally illustrated that redistricting is an ongoing battle for fairness, persisting long after the initial lines are drawn.
[**Team, I cannot emphasize this enough – we are living in an era of perpetual redistricting, and we must be prepared to protect our rights at every juncture.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69030461/424891855/-394971515?refcode=20230901_AOTL_F_Sept1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNmJkODc5LWM3NDgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=52EK6HXCUMXeYqv1hxeaFlxEDXKjT0Yp_7pZApeHgR0=)

[**Elections and redraws are fast approaching, and we need your help to sustain our momentum. Take action today and make a donation to All On the Line!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69030462/424891856/-394971515?refcode=20230901_AOTL_F_Sept1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNmJkODc5LWM3NDgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=52EK6HXCUMXeYqv1hxeaFlxEDXKjT0Yp_7pZApeHgR0=)

In solidarity,
Brianna Shamsuddoha
Mobilization Director

clean_body: complacency is not an option... | Team, In the next 3 months, we are facing a critical juncture in our fight for fair maps. The battle over district lines is far from over, and = = These words couldn't be more relevant today. Our democracy is under constant threat, and complacency is not an option. ⏱️With multiple elections and redraws on the horizon, including in states like New York and North Carolina, the stakes couldn't be higher. We need your support to ensure we have the resources necessary to confront the challenges ahead. ➡️ = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Recent court hearings, such as those in Alabama, have also unequivocally illustrated that redistricting is an ongoing battle for fairness, persisting long after the initial lines are drawn. = This relentless commitment drives us tirelessly, striving to amplify the voices of every voter through fair representation. However, we cannot continue to embark on this mission on our own. It is grassroots supporters like you who fuel the lifeblood of our movement. = = The fight for fair maps never stops, and neither do we. We are in this for the long haul, and with your support, we can fortify our democracy's enduring strength and vibrancy. In solidarity, Brianna Shamsuddoha Mobilization Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. I'm coming to you with some tough news: My finance team just told me we fell short of our end-of-month fundraising goal by $949.

But I know this team of fighters has come through before in difficult times, so I'm not giving up hope. We're just too close to this $10,000 goal.

Letitia
