name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel?=
subject: BILL EIGEL LAUNCH EVENT | ONE WEEK - *RSVP and BRING 10 FRIENDS!*
body:
Can you help us invite people to this very exciting event? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/email-12648895?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
| | My fellow patriots -

We are one week away from this special [campaign launch event](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=c51cdabb36&e=c00a6982d2).

Many of you have [RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=f795831321&e=c00a6982d2)'d, and _we are looking so forward to seeing you_.**Would you mind passing this email along to ten of your friends? **I don't want anyone to miss out on this incredible event.

If you haven't [RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=3d8b2572e8&e=c00a6982d2)'d - please do so today!

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=4f29ae1f63&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

Missouri is short on leadership. The Show-Me State has stagnated economically and fallen behind other big red conservative states because of a Swamp in Jefferson City that refuses to accomplish what the People desperately need. Our culture is in the midst of a war of ideas on the role of government—we need a wartime leader with the backbone and willingness to take on the powerful special interests in our state that are profiting at the expense of the People. I will be that leader, and unlike many politicians, I've **always** done what I said I was going to do.

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=3f10234d6e&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

The Eigel for Governor Exploratory campaign started in October 2022 to determine if sufficient support and interest existed to elect a bold, conservative reformer. By every metric we set since October of 2022, we have seen an unbelievable response from the People of Missouri. Our exploratory campaign has garnered [national attention](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=fdfeb1720e&e=c00a6982d2) for our small dollar fundraising network. In the second quarter of 2023, Eigel received more than 41,000 donations from over 20,000 donors. At an average donation of under $20, this represents more single donations than ANY other candidate running for the Republican gubernatorial nomination in their state anywhere in the United States for 2024.

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=245651a00c&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

**It's time for a reckoning for the Jefferson City Swamp; I will be that reckoning. **

The event on September 8th will be held at Smartt Field at the St. Charles County Regional Airport. Tickets to the event are **FREE** **but[you must RSVP.](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=04e050e032&e=c00a6982d2)

DOORS OPEN: 4:30pm
Food will be served from 4:30pm to 5:30pm, so get there fast! **

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_h_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=e8ebcb2c55&e=c00a6982d2)**[ _ere_](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=a4fcb7f204&e=c00a6982d2)**** _* or _****send an email to [mofreedom2024@gmail.com](mailto:mofreedom2024@gmail.com)**** stating your: Name, Email, Contact Phone, and Address**

**LET'S GO MISSOURI!**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: I am deeply encouraged by you
body:
We asked you to stand by our Center for Renewing America colleague, Jeffrey Clark, as he faces persecution for serving President Trump.. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10387979?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

All I can say is, **thank you**.

This past week we asked you to stand by our Center for Renewing America colleague, Jeffrey Clark, as he faces persecution for serving President Trump during the 2020 election, and the _response was overwhelming_.

Jeff and I were deeply encouraged by the outpouring of [support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=dde34cffe1&e=17913c7d6d) and so was the whole team here at the Center. Thanks to your generosity, we are able to challenge the weaponization of government and stand by Jeff through thick and thin.

If you have already given, thank you. If you haven’t pledged to [stand by Jeff](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=be4a6f91fc&e=17913c7d6d), there is still a long road ahead and we need all the help we can get.
---

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: it’s back to school season! 🍎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
Happy back-to-school season, folks!

As a dad, I understand how busy this time of year is for parents across Pennsylvania, so I'll get right to the point:

**I believe every student should have access to a quality public education** — _and I’ve worked in support of that goal my entire career._

But across our Commonwealth, right-wing extremists are attacking our public schools and putting our kids’ futures at risk. We’ve seen an alarming increase in book bans, harassment of teachers, and hateful attacks on LGBTQ students and racial minorities.

**Listen, anyone who knows me will tell you I don’t back down from a tough fight — and I don’t like bullies. As your next Attorney General, I’ll fight to stop the right-wing takeover of our public schools.** **[Help me by making a donation to my campaign for Attorney General today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69034583/424906455/-412144306?refcode=email_090123_education_t2&amounts=5,15,24,50,100&amount=24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODFlZTFhNi1jYjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZlMeN3LYLgb2OBboi1HHeD73amXgY2V4gDxkswW0Hw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69034588/424906460/-412144306?refcode=email_090123_education_t2&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODFlZTFhNi1jYjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZlMeN3LYLgb2OBboi1HHeD73amXgY2V4gDxkswW0Hw=)

While other candidates talk about their support for public education, I’ve taken on leaders of both parties and delivered results.

As Auditor General, I discovered 561 schools across Pennsylvania were receiving inadequate assistance from the PA Department of Education, **jeopardizing school safety and educational opportunities of more than 310,000 PA students**. To make matters worse, public money was going to improperly hired consultants instead of the students and teachers who needed support the most. I was outraged — and immediately got to work to fix the problem.

After exposing the negligence and waste, I worked with Governor Wolf to create the School Safety Task Force, which evaluated funding for school safety initiatives, increased access to mental health support programs, and improved anonymous tip tools in schools across Pennsylvania — resulting in millions of taxpayer dollars being reinvested back into our public schools.

**I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished for Pennsylvania’s public schools** — and now, I’m ready to fight for our students and teachers in every way I can as your next Attorney General.

**Pennsylvanians deserve an Attorney General who will be a tireless defender of public education.[Will you chip in $20 right now to help my team reach the voters we’ll need to win and support public education here in PA?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69034612/424906487/-412144306?refcode=email_090123_education_t2&amounts=5,15,24,50,100&amount=24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODFlZTFhNi1jYjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZlMeN3LYLgb2OBboi1HHeD73amXgY2V4gDxkswW0Hw=)**

clean_body: Happy back-to-school season, folks! As a dad, I understand how busy this time of year is for parents across Pennsylvania, so I'll get right to the point: I believe every student should have access to a quality public education — and I’ve worked in support of that goal my entire career. But across our Commonwealth, right-wing extremists are attacking our public schools and putting our kids’ futures at risk. We’ve seen an alarming increase in book bans, harassment of teachers, and hateful attacks on LGBTQ students and racial minorities. Listen, anyone who knows me will tell you I don’t back down from a tough fight — and I don’t like bullies. As your next Attorney General, I’ll fight to stop the right-wing takeover of our public schools. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = While other candidates talk about their support for public education, I’ve taken on leaders of both parties and delivered results. As Auditor General, I discovered 561 schools across Pennsylvania were receiving inadequate assistance from the PA Department of Education, jeopardizing school safety and educational opportunities of more than 310,000 PA students. To make matters worse, public money was going to improperly hired consultants instead of the students and teachers who needed support the most. I was outraged — and immediately got to work to fix the problem. After exposing the negligence and waste, I worked with Governor Wolf to create the School Safety Task Force, which evaluated funding for school safety initiatives, increased access to mental health support programs, and improved anonymous tip tools in schools across Pennsylvania — resulting in millions of taxpayer dollars being reinvested back into our public schools. I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished for Pennsylvania’s public schools — and now, I’m ready to fight for our students and teachers in every way I can as your next Attorney General. Pennsylvanians deserve an Attorney General who will be a tireless defender of public education.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you! – Eugene | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@depasqualeforag.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donation. You can = to make a donation to support Eugene for Attorney General of Pennsylvania. # [Demand House Republicans Investigate Jared Kushner](https://default.salsalabs.org/T926b3d90-725f-4b4e-ac96-0f8886fce969/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7bb07be-75ec-40c8-b157-1d3e5a1f90fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | House Republicans have launched approximately eleventy zillion investigations of Hunter Biden, but they are doing nothing to get to the bottom of the billions (with a "B") of [highly questionable dollars](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8251df70-256b-4a0d-941b-71699f7e2879/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) earned by Jared Kushner. Even Representative James Comer, Republican chairman of the Committee on Oversight and Responsibility, acknowledged that what Kushner did "crossed the line of ethics." It's time for him to do something about it. Representative Jamie Raskin, ranking member of that committee (and a hero for his impeachment work) is calling on Comer to stop blocking a real investigation of Kushner, and demand that Kushner hand over relevant documents to make that happen. We couldn't agree more. [**Sign the petition, support Raskin, and demand that House Republicans stop blocking a much needed investigation of Jared Kushner.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7844938-735e-4184-b299-966871119b28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2b38h8hpqmo15bfrd419m3rjiqtd2re99m25d0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge9ob2c9h2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjeu63luk5a9i5poa97edp36g82ipadgpa856p1o_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge9ob2c9h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf969r00fcnlr04rp3gl0vlf1hip48i0tbnq36h0_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge9ob2c9h2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za6ndhuhmtj0vbr91fe9s4ku818lcdcai47b9ol8_rp22sh2s8i66p76clge9ob2c9h2bs "DONATE TODAY")

name: Diane Sare
subject: Symposium : The International North-South Corridor: A Benefit of Peace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230901_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend Americans have been kept in the dark about the extraordinary process evolving among the majority of the world's population. The BRICS Summit in South Africa consolidated a new order among sovereign nations which has been under discussion for decades, and which the great American economist Lyndon LaRouche named in 1976 the "International Development Bank." The insane arrogance of the Biden Administration and its British Lord-handlers has confirmed for Russia, China and other nations that there's no point in negotiating with us, and that LaRouche was right, as Russian economist Sergei Glazyev has often said. Given that the new order is based on universal principles, expressed in America's founding documents, there's no reason for Americans to feel threatened by this process, but rather than trying to stop 6 billion plus people from demanding their economic freedom, we should finally eradicate the legacy of British liberal economic theory and embody the principles for which we were founded. Tonight's Symposium, with EIR editorial board member Marcia Merry Baker will take up some of the very exciting benefits of thinking this way, in terms of new transport corridors opening across Eurasia, vs the decay and collapse here at home. We could change this in an instant, if we had leadership which understood it.
### [NY Symposium, Friday, September 1 8:00 pm: The International North-South Corridor: A Benefit of Peace](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k5A-fvU2HhGweF0CKB1gY3U&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230901_symposium&n=2)
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k5A-fvU2HhGweF0CKB1gY3U&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230901_symposium&n=3) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230901_symposium&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230901_symposium&n=4)
---
\--Diane

subject: Take the Official Battleground Assessment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Your input was requested from top leaders in our Party...| | | **Patriot, this is Mike Pompeo, the 70th Secretary of State and former CIA Director.** Senate Republicans asked for my help to build out their battleground campaign strategy for 2024 – so I’m turning to our most trusted supporters in our Party, like YOU. _I know multiple Republican VIPs have texted or emailed_ you over the past couple of months to take various surveys or polls,**but this one may be the most important to date.** **[The 2024 Senate Battleground Assessment](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=862ac2dcb39c4561b742e31d5fba1e72&_e=zUbCZKMJMf2ynW9jsg-esL4UrB_koLoPPA6EuLXK3u23PuaME7aviNUVm6ZIbNFcKQicLOlFc5el7ITZ0N32hwa97u0p2FHpmX_JNBpR-v40vufqaNFAEB7iUpheOFPKlgqTFhqaUDjgXme0jkWSyiAE8VWADVmuSXjI9KpyPjIszg36n4nG3mej9gEoj6M-40KulWdNUggxcyvkfz5Y4_tAKmcayI7p7wjLGlfnDF8Omw-iqR3pKI4FcmrmBN_il605MHxRx2NRBUUGs2ifXM3HHkJxLB-vXn6z8XPiRG_A7XKdjJeCwP_dYvbrAxVGF-bnYryggw28UxB2am4pHUv6h-m3MNGx2hyvzmmBvIcWCYRUXzQih19tRZgnAMrFsEwpccjKm8_huPl-geo9JDNDYcC1VpBxWWGvSxaKGJgvWnDo9VoP3WF3g2ISPEYKUDjHkcH38ePOqH3DlYjXdQ%3D%3D) **is a crucial instrument top Republican leaders will use to win BACK Senate races in key states like West Virginia, Montana, Nevada, Ohio, and others.

clean_body: Your input was requested from top leaders in our Party...| | | Patriot, this is Mike Pompeo, the 70th Secretary of State and former CIA Director. Senate Republicans asked for my help to build out their battleground campaign strategy for 2024 – so I’m turning to our most trusted supporters in our Party, like YOU. I know multiple Republican VIPs have texted or emailed you over the past couple of months to take various surveys or polls,but this one may be the most important to date. is a crucial instrument top Republican leaders will use to win BACK Senate races in key states like West Virginia, Montana, Nevada, Ohio, and others. Peter – after speaking with influential Republican leaders, it’s obvious the is vital to our success. I reached out to the top 15 patriots in your area, and I have received most responses. I only need YOURS. Please, Peter,can you complete this assessment before it’s too late? Here is your unique link: Thank you, | | | | | Mike Pompeo 70th Secretary of State & Former CIA Director | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Forward this to a loved one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Hey there, Peter.
What a month! Although it’s still tough sledding, August turned out to be one of our strongest months of the summer. I can’t thank you enough for your unwavering support. We reached our goal because people like you stepped up. Thank you!!
As we turn our eyes to September, it’s important for us to recognize Suicide Prevention Month. As someone who's lost a close friend to suicide, raising awareness around mental health is extremely important to me. In honor of that friend, I want to use this email to share a few resources in case anyone needs them:
*
HopeLine
[https://www.hopeline-nc.org/] *
Helpline:
1-877-235-4525

*
North
Carolina
Suicide
Prevention
Lifeline
[https://www.suicidepreventionlifeline.org/] *
Helpline:
1-800-273-TALK
(1-800-273-8255)

*
Crisis
Text
Line
[https://www.crisistextline.org/] *
Text
"HOME"
to
741741

*
NAMI
North
Carolina
(National
Alliance
on
Mental
Illness)
[https://nami.org/Local-NAMI/Details?state=NC] *
Helpline:
1-800-950-NAMI
(1-800-950-6264)

*
TrevorLifeline
(LGBTQ+
Youth)
[https://www.thetrevorproject.org/] *
Helpline:
1-866-488-7386

*
North
Carolina
Department
of
Health
and
Human
Services
[https://www.ncdhhs.gov/]
In honor of Suicide Prevention Month, please forward this email to a few friends. And remember, It’s never a bad idea to check in on your friends and loved ones.
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Tt-P0CQ0-ke3ulUkLsfzZw2?unsubscribedata=2TdZEe7y5RQ9atfkZZWOvEwrkSPyfRkCsG7pvbbEBpkvHUQVj5s2V79Y5zYVedO%2BYh8aWuvPi7uwqJwzfD05rIggssEgTZDopcqTSSD7T7i8ZOONypLdM0PWuYA79dzeSRbHmSVSdoBUs1jgZx8AB8xXgoFFUDTHsgNdEFLZcK3GZW4RTMsKAM8YswdeuoLT6th3XTeLzcjAUvrJJUFkH073vk%2BAlTvcHylszS9s9ChuR5TXFMymrmU9iN1cpnwT9DUrVBhwHmuYaI3fjoiJp9AHWq%2B8bcykACUEp2AybnZfKsmDPoq8jvFPiqmAge9WZODKNROSSW%2BiD937bmxs8h9tkl%2B5aArR2Kc6ei3PTGzuvNeERDJ91k46hSPS%2BsEB6LcYSVDCojQdgKxQ2wRYEyHUI8Ndi2AGN1Ap240EBPfeFfx4NvzqAz1yRzgI825L .

subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa0358047d4e01852a6744f3897ae7&_e=TLW6uA-XcnLmPc0onrXLpMGZ-e5go1PqBWnzu65Ul0kLILMO-7UhZilC4Z7_4VeBzMHlf2Vx3nYUA2LDTCDz3i4V0CEU8gBImV_DmBeD6pYPd9Rn88FaNqBTPGubkM_xbZ_oOZSc5mDSdY8mUZiRBK7gVAWkZipaPUX0LdQYHkOWDdw7aiI7XzaFTls1AtSQtGN7FaZ0fjEYg_n-au5Hq2T_PisN_wdXmXOT3b7rSSK3zb9dVi4PKW0HwVWCtpbSu-zcpJ9Zehf0BxBYazymgCuBvdX0B0IQm-BfvgSD4AHG8CE58iGYr5wnAU8GjPGDNaACYmBlFkWdxZkTk6ShH_V4vRM85pOyHbCTxu_LlFL_xsiXAD8RJ_0ewaIce2G36qA2ePBGziV7Q5Juslo80Ik_yiQzUvNEaAx1E80vBCQ%3D)

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa0358047d4e01852a6744f3897ae7&_e=TLW6uA-XcnLmPc0onrXLpMGZ-e5go1PqBWnzu65Ul0kLILMO-7UhZilC4Z7_4VeBzMHlf2Vx3nYUA2LDTCDz3i4V0CEU8gBImV_DmBeD6pYPd9Rn88FaNqBTPGubkM_xbZ_oOZSc5mDSdY8mUZiRBK7gVAWkZipaPUX0LdQYHkOWDdw7aiI7XzaFTls1AtSQtGN7FaZ0fjEYg_n-au5Hq2T_PisN_wdXmXOT3b7rSSK3zb9dVi4PKW0HwVWCtpbSu-zcpJ9Zehf0BxBYazymgI3obxPKbKYFfoOuM9K0U3oyklZOEvekDHoeJm6evu-stvMh3ntGXejbIBd_eskslsRPx5PXVwM-rPIk9VB5Z4LFtrhriXWqwxFDmEHQ0ZhWK76q2VAXbAZXOo-ytIsfbLVi_sHhG4CloFmPXppsdwU%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa0358047d4e01852a6744f3897ae7&_e=TLW6uA-XcnLmPc0onrXLpMGZ-e5go1PqBWnzu65Ul0kLILMO-7UhZilC4Z7_4VeBzMHlf2Vx3nYUA2LDTCDz3i4V0CEU8gBImV_DmBeD6pYPd9Rn88FaNqBTPGubkM_xbZ_oOZSc5mDSdY8mUZiRBK7gVAWkZipaPUX0LdQYHkOWDdw7aiI7XzaFTls1AtSQtGN7FaZ0fjEYg_n-au5Hq2T_PisN_wdXmXOT3b7rSSK3zb9dVi4PKW0HwVWCtpbSu-zcpJ9Zehf0BxBYazymgJsrztmQcTs2dGtItx0yDeNQDlv0M7v4VRlzEJMD2Rc5pv_-mPJxxqsWzKXvaqNSoOfTJ9QcNXPWrakECt_YoJZFdMS-4WwfRNvUytd4YTj6xl7oH7TxM-yaPWdd15iYZXxAx9VHAg0Zpr9Rq8-qWOo%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa0358047d4e01852a6744f3897ae7&_e=TLW6uA-XcnLmPc0onrXLpMGZ-e5go1PqBWnzu65Ul0kLILMO-7UhZilC4Z7_4VeBzMHlf2Vx3nYUA2LDTCDz3i4V0CEU8gBImV_DmBeD6pYPd9Rn88FaNqBTPGubkM_xbZ_oOZSc5mDSdY8mUZiRBK7gVAWkZipaPUX0LdQYHkOWDdw7aiI7XzaFTls1AtSQtGN7FaZ0fjEYg_n-au5Hq2T_PisN_wdXmXOT3b7rSSK3zb9dVi4PKW0HwVWCtpbSu-zcpJ9Zehf0BxBYazymgBdzEGYg1gmj5Bqk_SPkHLbVZS5BeNxZPyCiogCy_AXIEvzp2tttwbFURbUO2TPFjnGXKhU-_RneqbTFkWgCrGraNJMfTsqV3quKQM6aTEcKud76X8z4PfmPhYhPsr94-sxJjlbN3FCdMQvz2HzBweM%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4aa0358047d4e01852a6744f3897ae7&_e=TLW6uA-XcnLmPc0onrXLpMGZ-e5go1PqBWnzu65Ul0kLILMO-7UhZilC4Z7_4VeBzMHlf2Vx3nYUA2LDTCDz3i4V0CEU8gBImV_DmBeD6pYPd9Rn88FaNqBTPGubkM_xbZ_oOZSc5mDSdY8mUZiRBK7gVAWkZipaPUX0LdQYHkOWDdw7aiI7XzaFTls1AtSQtGN7FaZ0fjEYg_n-au5Hq2T_PisN_wdXmXOT3b7rSSK3zb9dVi4PKW0HwVWCtpbSu-zcpJ9Zehf0BxBYazymgHDrKIEJr_cVS9mGNMZEnIdXv79QIP56zh1FwlubvTlAI60ec824k1K3s3YJsSbLtmsXBhDvIcCYJoIPAtlQL0aosu7D5kYCeeWEDEJ1uHcKQ4VqW2FkZLfF9MY1NPVbIIiD_jrLRmaB39rXPjSQ_Fk%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9424f784c7a4d01b677465840cc3ebb&_e=GnNll_tiyYd0lzOI8y-qJSwmobK6hY6ScHv4BR9az1JBd3MM0XX0Q5FVgslHZ1QjdHJ71ME8JDkeEfFTAasHQa97c6EReNAnoHB4WcvFqdMbzQwGdgPJqhT8_8Av-QQr9nO1YSHaBcJZ2URy1P2qRF9iXC4llKw4Y3fgrgXrEd9Ho0Z19CMbPyzrQAmv_oSA7ruMvxcd4ngzUunsabgZCQHLgDI8m_dqV5OTbqyE0kFCH4OzYJ8Pm-v8yTqQRaKniZYD3T2TD8hrtepitdRSJEReV4pobkBj3wq2fvFtI1Mu2qWwXAgmaXuLSZ4VKEP1eV9yfYNJyToZvNXaZegaP1AYwVrQIexemRMpHh-iq51Kl3ajMCAKrShjyWpn_qMqDXDVFibb_I5wBsY2FoWcwVE2LxpnwSGUEoWOs0psNb8%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9424f784c7a4d01b677465840cc3ebb&_e=GnNll_tiyYd0lzOI8y-qJSwmobK6hY6ScHv4BR9az1JBd3MM0XX0Q5FVgslHZ1QjdHJ71ME8JDkeEfFTAasHQa97c6EReNAnoHB4WcvFqdMbzQwGdgPJqhT8_8Av-QQr9nO1YSHaBcJZ2URy1P2qRF9iXC4llKw4Y3fgrgXrEd9Ho0Z19CMbPyzrQAmv_oSA7ruMvxcd4ngzUunsabgZCQHLgDI8m_dqV5OTbqyE0kFCH4OzYJ8Pm-v8yTqQRaKniZYD3T2TD8hrtepitdRSJBAJyFV1qHZNRTS6UlY-ONEeXXYTYdVNYl9EMsBCXvDtjzvaxW_5tnUX9A581-qJdqh-x2qh5Y-4X5fPiQpFE_zLUExuIwqEU1gRZV922YxogIJ4F6q0MtBsCyncdMpvPBvCAMv4tdp-tueK7ys0uBc%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9424f784c7a4d01b677465840cc3ebb&_e=GnNll_tiyYd0lzOI8y-qJSwmobK6hY6ScHv4BR9az1JBd3MM0XX0Q5FVgslHZ1QjdHJ71ME8JDkeEfFTAasHQa97c6EReNAnoHB4WcvFqdMbzQwGdgPJqhT8_8Av-QQr9nO1YSHaBcJZ2URy1P2qRF9iXC4llKw4Y3fgrgXrEd9Ho0Z19CMbPyzrQAmv_oSA7ruMvxcd4ngzUunsabgZCQHLgDI8m_dqV5OTbqyE0kFCH4OzYJ8Pm-v8yTqQRaKniZYD3T2TD8hrtepitdRSJJ6vcgYmJqdWVFnA3IvOo3-SAbcPH_s29IYSjEMUlTmJJPKv_prhUOBa52oqtAb7493N-9mMZvTSoXOzFoUHEYXY24wksql6R6kHoKsVJ2bAoHF-ZeErk7UDhmbrsTHtsjPIpWB4Le87ryGj7iY9w0w%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

**In the News:**
_POLITICAL OPPORTUNIST WEAPONIZING JUSTICE SYSTEM FOR POLITICAL GAIN_

Hey, Peter. This might come as a shock, but the headline above is NOT refering to _Joe Biden, Merrick Garland, Robert Mueller, Jack Smith,_ **or** _Alvin Bragg_...

I am reaching out to you personally because you need to know the truth, and you won’t hear it from corporate media.

There’s a new political opportunist after the national limelight: **Fani Willis.**

In case you missed it, the woke Fulton County DA has stooped to targeting conservatives with RICO laws for the sole purpose of furthering her own political career – wasting millions of taxpayer dollars against her political opponents and turning a blind eye to rampant crime in Atlanta.

I can’t prevent rouge DA’s from attempting to abuse the system, but with your help, I want to make sure we hold them accountable when they show their true predjudice.

[**STAND WITH ME & HALT THE ABUSE >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f986b37dc6744e4d8fade83a4bc185e5&_e=HhhnWsoRVbst0ZBVkbpI1fFZ_sFq25CxiAboiFctvkgZ_M3UnYfF7w2XhwB0lPNj30u77L3UypuQfBLTIUd5xu5FEtGREEQIlGFI0CWV4QLY6N0iPWrsS6rM8q4wLuMtkM3wvI6IZ-RepU87i6-eXteenh6lPBkyCRe4XZLrN42iFKBR7lAktB9VimUAFNAaWZGPH5w8Gf5jkHFVTM7lmbM6RWgD-OlVDRX9KpSJlhpw5lj953z77b_Dqzyjmuyq7wHzTsbCcxkvZV5PDCOFpQLEll69fE0W9AAtoU5z3ZboXp1OqsruuiESNsWDQcPFbW2IP_9WYbWRfsqfDGaSK-96kf2N2fPpvMcI7YjRs0lX_gLMyNUNr57eyKPdoBsRkMG7AqOSGcXNO5r7nuEqYO-KeXohoGWsA4szt1KgsOw%3D)

In this case, **it’s personal**...let me explain.

While Fani is trying to score a cheap media and PR campaign, I’ve been working with Georgians every day to:

* Create more high-quality jobs and reduce regulations that stifle businesses. Small businesses should always have a home in Georgia and future generations should have the opportunity to pursue careers.
* Create safer communities and actually support local and state law enforcement. I’ve supported heavier penalties for those who commit violent crimes and repeat offenders.
* I’ve been a champion of election integrity. I stood by SB202 and helped reform the way Georgia handles elections to ensure all elections are handled fairly.

[**DEMAND predjudice JUSTICE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f986b37dc6744e4d8fade83a4bc185e5&_e=HhhnWsoRVbst0ZBVkbpI1fFZ_sFq25CxiAboiFctvkgZ_M3UnYfF7w2XhwB0lPNj30u77L3UypuQfBLTIUd5xu5FEtGREEQIlGFI0CWV4QLY6N0iPWrsS6rM8q4wLuMtkM3wvI6IZ-RepU87i6-eXteenh6lPBkyCRe4XZLrN42iFKBR7lAktB9VimUAFNAaWZGPH5w8Gf5jkHFVTM7lmbM6RWgD-OlVDRX9KpSJlhpw5lj953z77b_DqzyjmuyqDYeRIKo_Unt31XOG-MIlPox8LDDwxNYZEQjTyygcVKMb0Brj_ZdpM37iP_F_RZ_UDV2pjU8koWYgyun7MlkAjvyrIbJCFTxtIywZmTMorCnmlGX1u2u2s_Tu_P36jxVbUPkk5T84QvsJ5aDwPF6YElvNualmMyHciQICwBS97YM%3D)

Fani’s conflicting interests don’t belong in Georgia. She may use the “kitchen sink” strategy against President Trump and the 18 other patriots but when it comes to keeping Georgia safe, we demand more.

**We demand a DA that doesn’t set up their fundraising website just 4 days before announcing an overreaching indictment.

We demand a DA who won’t be a cog in the corrupt Democratic machine to target their Republican rivals.**

Georgia deserves better and America deserves a justice system that won’t engage in the most blatant act of election interference in history.

[**TELL FANI: STOP WASTING OUR TIME & $$$**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f986b37dc6744e4d8fade83a4bc185e5&_e=HhhnWsoRVbst0ZBVkbpI1fFZ_sFq25CxiAboiFctvkgZ_M3UnYfF7w2XhwB0lPNj30u77L3UypuQfBLTIUd5xu5FEtGREEQIlGFI0CWV4QLY6N0iPWrsS6rM8q4wLuMtkM3wvI6IZ-RepU87i6-eXteenh6lPBkyCRe4XZLrN42iFKBR7lAktB9VimUAFNAaWZGPH5w8Gf5jkHFVTM7lmbM6RWgD-OlVDRX9KpSJlhpw5lj953z77b_DqzyjmuyqrhBnquE9d1jYX9E7veye0sDXiVmXwHriWVxEQFmcRUecHIqQV6h_EM1yXqSep2IiZdDnWxze_Q_J7z0ZBrfGWZqhxkQ63HXcDm7gSqwPQtBzzsyjrH7d0IcjP7k9UVOP68-V8VPWRuXH7u17b3GjNmfHTuoLhaOpP7KKzF3C8OA%3D)

For truth & justice,
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f986b37dc6744e4d8fade83a4bc185e5&_e=HhhnWsoRVbst0ZBVkbpI1fFZ_sFq25CxiAboiFctvkgZ_M3UnYfF7w2XhwB0lPNj30u77L3UypuQfBLTIUd5xu5FEtGREEQIlGFI0CWV4QLY6N0iPWrsS6rM8q4wLuMtkM3wvI6IZ-RepU87i6-eXteenh6lPBkyCRe4XZLrN42iFKBR7lAktB9VimUAFNAaWZGPH5w8Gf5jkHFVTM7lmbM6RWgD-OlVDRX9KpSJlhpw5lj953z77b_Dqzyjmuyq3UW_UBGpcXXnIl-oeKmc9PQqmOw-bksiV80pI5zEAiYGM06MI9FWQLUjopGr8EYAOZQ8Zwe6-1JZ7nWkeMur5VFE8p-lA9dl_SbLkeHL4WX40QhM8KdD0Pzg1MfhIGq_8b2TWGbzKIMpwltfH-qUGtYbeACKZeYlqqTvvDdOXCo%3D)

body:
This September, we’re counting on your support to ensure we keep making progress! | | |
---
Peter, This summer has been big for us. In August alone, thousands of grassroots supporters like you donated to the campaign -- and your contribution goes directly toward reelecting Joe and Kamala. You’re helping ensure we keep building on our progress, in 2024 and beyond. President Biden and Vice President Harris are determined to defeat MAGA extremism and continue focusing on the issues that matter to the American people -- like ensuring everyone can live safely in their communities, access the health care they need, build economic prosperity, and look towards a better and brighter future. We’re so grateful for your support, and we’ll be honest with you: **we can’t slow down now.** [We have a big fundraising deadline coming up -- the end of September also marks the end of the fundraising quarter, and we’re counting on this team to help us reach our goal. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Really Not Great!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We came up short of our goal yesterday. By a good amount.
#

Peter, I hate to do this — especially after so many of you stepped up and chipped in to our campaign at our end-of-month deadline.
**But I have some bad news:** We came up short of our goal yesterday. By a good amount.
When we come up short once, it’s a problem. But if we keep coming up short, it’s a real threat to this campaign, our ability to win in Arizona, and the likelihood that we can hold the Senate. With Kari Lake set to announce and Blake Masters at the ready, now is NOT the time to fall behind.
But here’s the good news: We still have a shot at winning. This is a long race. If we come together and catch up to cover our shortfall from last month, we have a shot. If we keep coming together, keep hitting these goals, we will take back Kyrsten Sinema’s seat.
That’s why we’ve set a 24 Hour Fundraising Drive to catch up. We have to do this the only way we know how — with as many donations as we can possibly get from people who understand how important this race is.
[**Can you make a contribution to this campaign today as part of our 24-Hour Fundraising Drive? We need your help to catch up.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230901-1-f&t=1&akid=1096%2E734936%2EGgibs6)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230901-1-f&t=2&akid=1096%2E734936%2EGgibs6)
We can’t count on a handful of billionaires to bail us out. That ain’t in the cards for us. I’m depending on you. But with thousands of you behind me, we can send a big message to those billionaires.
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1096%2E734936%2EGgibs6). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=1096_734936_Ggibs6&akid=1096%2E734936%2EGgibs6)

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: Our right to bear arms comes from GOD ALONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/cb5592357bb79c1c/009f7c3409e3edeac3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Dear Peter, **The Second Amendment is on the ballot in 2024.** Time and time again, Tim Kaine has been the **deciding vote in** the Senate on **Second Amendment rights. ** And time and time again, he’s **voted to attack it. ** Just look at **his vote on the Biden-ATF pistol brace rule**. He stood with the radical left to try and **disarm millions of law-abiding Americans. ** Kaine has **spent his entire career** trying to destroy a God-given right. And make no mistake - our right to bear arms, to protect ourselves from criminals and tyrants comes from **God alone.** The Founders made that clear when they enshrined that right as the **Second Amendment** to our Constitution – right behind the First Amendment rights to religious freedom, free speech, free press, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the government for grievances. And of course, Tim Kaine, like the rest of the Left, wants to undermine the Second Amendment and destroy the right to keep and bear arms. We’re Americans, and we need to protect our independence and identity – especially our natural right to keep and bear arms. The Second Amendment is **only a threat to tyrants. ** So what does that say about Tim Kaine and his comrades on the Left? _**I’m running to unseat Tim Kaine and protect our God-given rights. **_ [Will you join us by pitching in $25, $50, $100, $250 or even more to our campaign to DEFEND the Second Amendment?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/cb5592357bb79c1c/d9ef4c721d4a59fbc3d6b838967d376c/42903)

In 1775, the British tried to confiscate American weapons – and ended up sparking the Revolutionary War In 1781, we ended that war right here in my home state of Virginia. We need to **restore normalcy** and return to our Founders’ understanding of the right to bear arms. Disarmament and confiscation regimes are the way of tyrants and the British. We’re Americans, and we need to protect our independence and identity – especially our natural right to bear arms. [Join our team today and let’s take back the Second Amendment. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/cb5592357bb79c1c/e04c1e0e29132049c3d6b838967d376c/42903) For Freedom,

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, The Second Amendment is on the ballot in 2024. Time and time again, Tim Kaine has been the deciding vote in the Senate on Second Amendment rights. And time and time again, he’s voted to attack it. Just look at his vote on the Biden-ATF pistol brace rule. He stood with the radical left to try and disarm millions of law-abiding Americans. Kaine has spent his entire career trying to destroy a God-given right. And make no mistake - our right to bear arms, to protect ourselves from criminals and tyrants comes from God alone. The Founders made that clear when they enshrined that right as the Second Amendment to our Constitution – right behind the First Amendment rights to religious freedom, free speech, free press, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the government for grievances. And of course, Tim Kaine, like the rest of the Left, wants to undermine the Second Amendment and destroy the right to keep and bear arms. We’re Americans, and we need to protect our independence and identity – especially our natural right to keep and bear arms. The Second Amendment is only a threat to tyrants. So what does that say about Tim Kaine and his comrades on the Left? I’m running to unseat Tim Kaine and protect our God-given rights. In 1775, the British tried to confiscate American weapons – and ended up sparking the Revolutionary War In 1781, we ended that war right here in my home state of Virginia. We need to restore normalcy and return to our Founders’ understanding of the right to bear arms. Disarmament and confiscation regimes are the way of tyrants and the British. We’re Americans, and we need to protect our independence and identity – especially our natural right to bear arms. For Freedom, Scott Parkinson Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Parkinson for Senate | |

name: Wesley Bell
subject: This is only the start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

I just got off the phone with my finance team and I have good news: Thanks to a last minute surge in grassroots support we **flew past our $40,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.**

The road to defeating Josh Hawley and electing a leader with a proven record of fighting for Missourians is long, but with the continued support of folks like you who have chipped in what they can, I’m confident we’ll come out on top in 2024.

I’m incredibly grateful for all your support. But, the truth is, this is only just the beginning. Josh Hawley has an endless campaign warchest filled by dark money special interests and greedy millionaires who are happy with the status quo.

But everyday Missourians know Josh Hawley is always looking for his next opportunity to make headlines and empty promises to the hardworking people of Missouri.

That’s not the kind of leader I’ll be. I’m committed to fighting for everyday people and bringing real, practical solutions to make our communities safer, fund our schools, and so much more – and I’m so lucky to have you in this fight.

Thank you,

Wesley Bell

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: a dad at the door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
I’m out in the district knocking doors with my son

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69041717/424932045/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA1ODBiOWItZDQ0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y-CRoNxw12jQXAKgGemneIBs36HHnlpOe_ReDzq9lJ8=) Friends –

I always think a key part of the job for someone with the title “Representative” is to actually represent people – and that starts with listening.

Probably my favorite part of campaigning is going door-to-door through our district’s neighborhoods and meeting people in their homes (even when it’s 104 degrees outside). But it is especially fun for me when I have good company like Ben, my 15-year-old son, who joined me on a recent walk. [**Check it out →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69041718/424932046/-402677783?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.01_b1_ac_all&amount=33&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA1ODBiOWItZDQ0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y-CRoNxw12jQXAKgGemneIBs36HHnlpOe_ReDzq9lJ8=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69041719/424932047/-402677783?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.01_b1_ac_all&amount=33&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA1ODBiOWItZDQ0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y-CRoNxw12jQXAKgGemneIBs36HHnlpOe_ReDzq9lJ8=) But the reality is that with well over half a million voters, we’re going to need to reach people not just at their doors, but on their TVs and mailboxes and laptops, too. And in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and the swing district of the swing state for the presidential election, that will be expensive.

September 30th is my second FEC deadline since getting in this race. After the deadline, our fundraising numbers will be released to the public. Everyone from reporters to GOP operatives will be able to see how much we raised (and from how many supporters), so it’s essential we show we can sustain our momentum.

[**If you’re with me in the fight to flip AZ-01 blue, will you consider making a donation to my people-powered campaign? clean_body: I’m out in the district knocking doors with my son = Friends – I always think a key part of the job for someone with the title “Representative” is to actually represent people – and that starts with listening. Probably my favorite part of campaigning is going door-to-door through our district’s neighborhoods and meeting people in their homes (even when it’s 104 degrees outside). But it is especially fun for me when I have good company like Ben, my 15-year-old son, who joined me on a recent walk. = = But the reality is that with well over half a million voters, we’re going to need to reach people not just at their doors, but on their TVs and mailboxes and laptops, too. And in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and the swing district of the swing state for the presidential election, that will be expensive. September 30th is my second FEC deadline since getting in this race. After the deadline, our fundraising numbers will be released to the public. Everyone from reporters to GOP operatives will be able to see how much we raised (and from how many supporters), so it’s essential we show we can sustain our momentum. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I hope you and your family enjoy a wonderful Labor Day weekend! name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11787%2E9716520%2EhBAKT5)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11787%2E9716520%2EhBAKT5)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewSeptember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11787%2E9716520%2EhBAKT5)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11787%2E9716520%2EhBAKT5)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230901-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11787%2E9716520%2EhBAKT5)

| | Patriot,

---
Biden’s weaponized Department of Justice is interfering in the Republican primary to try and stop me from becoming our party’s presidential nominee.

---
**The Obama-appointed judge has scheduled a****TRIAL DATE****in the Biden DOJ’s witch hunt against me on the****DAY BEFORE SUPER TUESDAY****– when I am expected to be declared the PRESUMPTIVE GOP nominee for President.**
---
_This is the same judge who has publicly expressed ANGER that I continue to walk as a free man in America_ ... _
_
---
The Left just forced me to take a mugshot in an attempt to turn me into Public Enemy #1.
---
After I used their mugshot against them to raise over $9 MILLION for our America First movement, they are now retaliating with a vengeance.
---
_Their new attack is to force me to stand trial on the day before the Republican primary is set to be wrapped up and it’s officially time to begin the General Election against Joe Biden._
---
But I want to make one thing clear: I am not the __real__ victim in this vicious act of Election Interference.
---
...This is an attack on _**YOU**_ – the voter._
_
---
**The Biden Administration is interfering in the Republican primary to try and effectively disenfranchise millions of voters and rob you of your vote.**
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present. | | Hey Fellow American, The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative. They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present. But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs. I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck. I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU. They cannot be trusted. The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. And you're the one who pays. What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you. Here's where you come in, Fellow American: Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight. Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment. Stop the lies. Stay strong. Stay free. In Truth, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. | |
---
| | The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. Friends, Family, and Supporters, July and August have been very exciting for the campaign. We have great momentum this quarter and continue to build trust with residents in the district and leaders across the nation. Our [campaign platform](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/74OfEvbfj/c?w=Iirno8OhgxyJaNUrMlaTrjG8EDokAbhRMmGQ-mGcGnU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL2lzc3VlcyIsInIiOiJiYWFjNTZjMS1lOGFkLTRmMDMtOTZkMC0xZmE3ZjE0ODU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ) has arrived! Our plan for NY-3 is built on kitchen-table issues, vision and values. Check it out and let us know your feedback.
---
| |
---

Listen to the discussion [here](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/74OfEvbfj/c?w=wpAP2zE4YugKxJzjnnV_ZSwfqR5q_4n3y1h1R3i5Dj0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9JS1BWSTM4b1dhVT9zaT1LOU1QQTB5em9mbXUyZXoxIiwiciI6IjJhNDUzZDYyLTZkNWYtNGNhMi03YjllLTZiOTg2ZmYwOTQyNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjIxOGM2YmFhLTUzOWUtNDczYS1iNjNmLWIyMzRjNzZlOGM3NCJ9).

Come join our efforts by signing up at our [volunteer page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/74OfEvbfj/c?w=emxqBqffEvKBUa9z-bbshJNa00i_3B1cZs-koQ4kLq8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL2dldC1pbnZvbHZlZCIsInIiOiI2OGM2MDgwZi1iZjhkLTQyMmYtNzE4OS0wNjFiOTBiMGFmOGQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ).

I'm excited several former Congressmen and Health & Human Services Secretary Tom Price will headline a fundraiser for us in D.C. on 13 Sept. RSVP [here](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/74OfEvbfj/c?w=mwr1jkJr07ec1olpigmHOIodr2WxVFv-khXeUV3_mcA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9rZWxsZW4tY3VycnkvZnVuZHJhaXNlci1kYyIsInIiOiJmMmJhMGY2MC0yYjk3LTQ0NWYtNWU4YS01OGQ0NjdhOTcyNDUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ).

subject: Your support has truly made a difference

I can't help but reflect on all we've accomplished — together.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69043707/424939174/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM1ZTkxM2ItZDg0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gCxIQaIhX1X0e9EqVc9mXQvtq6c0M40g4DUXCtk_Eo4=&emci=1b582c4d-1148-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4c5e913b-d848-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you who has stood behind this campaign.

As we look ahead to September, I'm thrilled to announce that we've not only met but _exceeded_ our end-of-month fundraising goal for August, which would not have been possible without the dedication of our people-powered team! (that's YOU, Peter).

Your consistent support helps keep our movement strong, no matter the challenges that come our way. **While we're in a good spot right now, we still have a lot of work ahead of us, but I have full confidence that with your continued support, we have what it takes to protect this seat and take back our House majority in 2024.**

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

name: sent from Emily's iPhone
subject: less than $1,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need you with me on this
| | |
---
Friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. I'll give you the bad news first: Last night, we missed our $50,000 end-of-month goal by less than $1,000.
I know that this was an ambitious goal from the start. But these are the kinds of numbers we need to be putting up to compete with GOP megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority. I know that less than $1,000 might not sound like much, but in an election year like 2024, it can make all the difference.
**Thankfully, there's some good news too:_If everyone reading this email chips in even just $5, we could hit our goal today and start September on a strong foot._**
Because you're one of Kirsten's most reliable supporters, I need you with me on this. **Please, will you chip in $5 (or $10 or whatever you can spare today) to hit this goal and ensure that we can send Kirsten back to the Senate and defend our Democratic majority? Here's your own personal donation link:[secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69045264/424943546/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4409-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjllYzBlZi1kODQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-wDXxFTSr46swCvXKq8o_YVxriAI8eXFV8JlWq21oM=)**
GOP opponents will begin jumping into this race any day now. We've got to get back on track ASAP to show Kirsten's rivals that this seat isn't up for grabs. Can I count on you to help out tonight?

Thanks so much,

Emily (Kirsten's digital director)

Sent from my iPhone
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69045265/424943547/1575385346?refcode=jtk4409-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjllYzBlZi1kODQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-wDXxFTSr46swCvXKq8o_YVxriAI8eXFV8JlWq21oM=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69045266/424943548/1575385346?refcode=jtk4409-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjllYzBlZi1kODQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-wDXxFTSr46swCvXKq8o_YVxriAI8eXFV8JlWq21oM=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69045267/424943549/1575385346?refcode=jtk4409-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjllYzBlZi1kODQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-wDXxFTSr46swCvXKq8o_YVxriAI8eXFV8JlWq21oM=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: I need you with me on this | | | Friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. I'll give you the bad news first: Last night, we missed our $50,000 end-of-month goal by less than $1,000. I know that this was an ambitious goal from the start. But these are the kinds of numbers we need to be putting up to compete with GOP megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority. I know that less than $1,000 might not sound like much, but in an election year like 2024, it can make all the difference. Thankfully, there's some good news too:If everyone reading this email chips in even just $5, we could hit our goal today and start September on a strong foot. Because you're one of Kirsten's most reliable supporters, I need you with me on this. Please, will you chip in $5 (or $10 or whatever you can spare today) to hit this goal and ensure that we can send Kirsten back to the Senate and defend our Democratic majority? Here's your own personal donation link:= GOP opponents will begin jumping into this race any day now. We've got to get back on track ASAP to show Kirsten's rivals that this seat isn't up for grabs. Can I count on you to help out tonight? Thanks so much, Emily (Kirsten's digital director) Sent from my iPhone | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, we missed our $50,000 End-of-Month goal by $8,830... We were so close to reaching our goal so Roger decided to extend it for ONE MORE DAY. Can you rush in any amount to help us bridge this gap? It’s such a small amount to fall short of Peter - literally any amount you give will help us out! Sent from my iPhone | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. name: Team Greta
subject: Drum roll, please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter, can we get a drum roll, please?

We did it!

For another month, you showed up when we came to you with our fundraising goal to boost our get-out-the-vote efforts in September. Having a strong team that comes together when it matters most is exactly why Greta’s in a great position to become Mississippi’s next Attorney General.

Thanks to your support, we’re starting this month in full force getting volunteers out in every part of the state. We’re so grateful to have you standing with us!

If you haven’t had a chance already, you can support our GOTV efforts by chipping in any amount here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230901TY_PT&amount=25

Thanks again, Peter!

– Team Greta

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230901TY_PT&amount=25

name: Bob, me (1)
subject: 🩺 Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
- Seeking feedback. Where do you stand? Are you on board with any form of universal healthcare? Curious if you support. Let me know. Thanks.
v/r
-Bob
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Medicare for All
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I'm Bob Lorinser, the only doctor in the Nation running for Congress to lead on Medicare for All. Are you with me?
Do you believe, like me, that healthcare is a human right?
IF SO, CONTRIBUTE. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Growing up in a lower middle class home, I witnessed firsthand the struggles faced by families living paycheck to paycheck. This fuels my passion for fighting for the American worker's access to affordable healthcare.
As a family doctor, social worker, and public health expert, I understand the urgent need for a publicly financed, non-profit national health insurance program that fully covers medical costs for all Americans.
Our current political landscape is filled with empty promises, but I am committed to being a true subject matter expert who can unite people and enact change.
, as you might know, I face an uphill battle against an ultra right-wing Trumper, Rep. Jack Bergman.
My opponent may be OK with the suffering of the poor, sick, and uninsured; He wants to privatize the VA, dismantle ACA, and he voted against affordable Rx drugs and the price cap on insulin.
We cannot afford to let this extremism continue unchecked.
With 40 years on the frontlines fighting for change in a broken healthcare system, I've seen the struggle up close. No one deserves to suffer; not in the greatest country in the world, not in the most developed nation on the planet. We can, and must do better!
Your donation [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , no matter the amount, can help us build a future where hard work is rewarded and the American worker can receive the healthcare they deserve.
Can I please count on your support?
Gratefully yours,
- Bob
Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=290ef47332964a8ba19392f46bb9d2c9&_e=LHdd99oiSbLDofQ7j1YtIoB6Af3vMXjkrVDOXTwvQc1dbOvC4GN9X9j7Ykf82tlZTzduQ-0e_Z52dR8AtJlzVlNV98ExcT5db3bhLej81XLdiOyJ9dtPXibzuD6TZAZ5vIsgrCt1fJFPWU8zwmEjuMgug_7jv9YXNB3TrZlE8Gpgn3gCqeu2HC4vX_o6OnlImUy2SfPKpQjKhT8i189-u_rxSM6U4UHIJk4im3JvUPt45MZbD3Bbv_4lOo6JkcKu)

Fellow American, Donald Trump has been indicted for some serious crimes. But what's even more disappointing is how many Republican candidates are saying they will support him even if he's a convicted felon. _**It's embarrassing**_** _... I'm disgusted._** America is facing real challenges, and we're spending important time talking about Donald Trump instead of the issues. We have got to move on as a party, as a nation, and as a people. No man is above the law, not even a former president. _**But there's hope.**_ I know many Americans who agree that there's a better path forward for our country if we take the conversation back to issues that matter and share our common sense solutions. **[Please join An America United and me as we stand up to divisive rhetoric and work to bring about positive change without the distractions of indictments or performative politics.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=290ef47332964a8ba19392f46bb9d2c9&_e=LHdd99oiSbLDofQ7j1YtIoB6Af3vMXjkrVDOXTwvQc1dbOvC4GN9X9j7Ykf82tlZTzduQ-0e_Z52dR8AtJlzVlNV98ExcT5db3bhLej81XL7boYABArXAjtk_E3aCcf-r1zgWKK7vrCYgdnzJTJ4gQMMVLHnVES-BytjL-m7p0EIh8Wx7gFIMDUwZz5zBNL771QJCHAZaraQR8GkX9WwM3PPkhVREmFMjUZMiUbLGuQwm1YMeA5yoMVVuq-e4bgg)**

body:
It's time.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15766743f99541c78e484f0c3a9219d8&_e=V8zkal2vCLTiZToBvmi7jcUok_03Zbt5fLtvWJlH0SBhQAJZpBskUYazuSiQl2T08W2H-WNT6rQOFz1jweEsbV3ogR9-16ZiZo8WVqrPl0WhA7Bs4TweU6pzCksjvbh5Atw4v5WGFH_ICtx3sHqBRGZ4ztKwzb2aPamHnD_6wFtubKoAZZhAh1FpM9gEmi0tVIeVHlmZBsgboLaS3iKQnj6S329_k9YJFXVBSGSMZqHxdFdeu3mRxRnzJeZSe78gLEPi3eN72UVHQOizAvBFflJT_qsT0YP0vzmpmNRa4kk5LfhPI3dGbj0LX1aS7EYS)

Friends,

**It 's time for an honest conversation. **

The Democrats are outraising me, I'll state the obvious.

**[BUT - we don't have to outraise them to flip the Senate red. I just have to close the gap and get more and more patriots like YOU involved in this grassroots movement.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15766743f99541c78e484f0c3a9219d8&_e=V8zkal2vCLTiZToBvmi7jcUok_03Zbt5fLtvWJlH0SBhQAJZpBskUYazuSiQl2T08W2H-WNT6rQOFz1jweEsbV3ogR9-16ZiZo8WVqrPl0WhA7Bs4TweU6pzCksjvbh5Atw4v5WGFH_ICtx3sHqBRGZ4ztKwzb2aPamHnD_6wFujtPtQgh_y1yjzo6yMIvofDHMRZ7R94ijuyorxpXmZ1rWcXGlM4TbksYpPiTpk8Q_W-SYE4v70ji78WT1OI1nWbg1I17Rw6FciNmE4S7PztMe0Fj06O-KAas_2xoBBxSWTYs0mW1lWaJcynmns6AhN)**

Let me be clear: this is still anyone's election despite the Democrats outraising me and other Republicans across the country last Quarter.

**[I am offering a 400% impact on every donation before the end of the day to gain major ground on the Radical Left!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15766743f99541c78e484f0c3a9219d8&_e=V8zkal2vCLTiZToBvmi7jcUok_03Zbt5fLtvWJlH0SBhQAJZpBskUYazuSiQl2T08W2H-WNT6rQOFz1jweEsbV3ogR9-16ZiZo8WVqrPl0WhA7Bs4TweU6pzCksjvbh5Atw4v5WGFH_ICtx3sHqBRGZ4ztKwzb2aPamHnD_6wFt5t3QQFujFhV6ixCt-ND9yR3XNF3ZH_xRnRCqnpU9tHM_g55s-AZZDlrvQ9UhRMKmy8m5qo5EvJMTyiehsew0qN3jWnLiJA_aPBrDSM7zM3bDhs5zCetebZq9GOLgNuGOAeLuEiYv1Lph-auX8TP0e)**

If there's one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it's getting scrappy. I'm not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren't either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I'm determined to keep it that way in 2024.

**[One last shot to impact your donation 400%! I'm not going to offer this again for a while, so I really hope you choose to take me up on it!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15766743f99541c78e484f0c3a9219d8&_e=V8zkal2vCLTiZToBvmi7jcUok_03Zbt5fLtvWJlH0SBhQAJZpBskUYazuSiQl2T08W2H-WNT6rQOFz1jweEsbV3ogR9-16ZiZo8WVqrPl0WhA7Bs4TweU6pzCksjvbh5Atw4v5WGFH_ICtx3sHqBRGZ4ztKwzb2aPamHnD_6wFu1hWFlVkvuaB7bRWR-vuEeiWPs1_73e9umHtBc79jwYwcQBU8aIJhOF8KgXPlZ-qkBD60bgkwVBVl6mbPw5Q0tf7t2tDzgwTsgc7l1feV5rBsnGkt2T2mTT7enhc-Tmx26ZcijZ6aXCbbS2CyaYIFh)**

---
Peter, I served our country for over 25 years on the frontlines risking my life to protect people like Tim Kaine who sit in office and dictate our lives – poorly might I add. But now, Tim Kaine is questioning my motive to serve our country, and I’m offended by it. This week, Tim Kaine released an email saying that I would “make our country less safe” hoping to rack in some extra cash for his campaign. First of all, I have seen firsthand what wars do. I have watched as my brother and sisters have fallen on the battlefield. So, for Tim Kaine, someone who has NEVER served in our military, to accuse me of potentially putting Americans in harm's way is ABSURED and WRONG. Not to mention, just yesterday he was advocating to put American boots on the ground in a foreign country. This is a perfect example of the BROKE and TWO-FACED politician Tim Kaine is. _But it’s also a sign that he is worried I will defeat him in 2024._ Unfortunately, these lies are gaining Tim Kaine and his campaign momentum, and I need your help to push back. **[This is a crucial point in this race, and I won’t back down to his political games. Can you support me against Hillary Clinton and Joe Biden’s puppet?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=acdc0db29ae9460f980b9c2e968a69fd&_e=2uIf0mUPmIQ3WaX9kKx4GtT67x7eLMWqCF0D81qd9ifALOC01zWuRwsKcIo5aKP_sWjskm7O3koixYijLNb_5BhNM64mB0K_atOQAYcPmr1ERf0v-1LYzj42SKhvrivc0lWj8OCP2EZBiw3sJMvVvEf286klGp_qrUAD7sEaXh2cZLXOnjnALyFYEc8imPIbxc6FfsFPdmzhAO1pSpVCOUiTImOucFI3RjT-JxNGn0DnGfUo0eUqGL2VRX32RY3H88H_X3s4f8Ah-fbi1tW0cqkNv1000Zv8tTnkUb8gz59ZyNJTKjxjRt1NXBtOxHe4AflxweprTyoKUgrBROZrQ0iVXUWtzIOfKI3B-MjnGJd48KW4JWFKInd2y5dXqDsK)** **The gloves are off, and I’m ready to WIN.**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: This is not the news I wanted to share with you today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
This is not the news I wanted to share with you today.
Last night, we came up 6% short of our August fundraising goal. This goal was crucial. Coming up short in August means we start this month in the hole. And now we are facing a setback going into the last month of the quarter.
So I am reaching out once again, to ask if you can help us close the gap.
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our movement today? Every dollar will help us continue funding and supporting changemaking candidates across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.guNpwn&refcode=em230901-1-t3&t=1&akid=4794%2E196590%2EYMrNBs)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.rq-706&amount=3&refcode=em230901-1-t3&t=2&akid=4794%2E196590%2EYMrNBs)**
---
****
| **[OTHER](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.rq-706&refcode=em230901-1-t3&t=3&akid=4794%2E196590%2EYMrNBs)**
---
****
When we set goals like this one, it's because that's the number we need to reach in order to have the resources to build a successful movement — one that will support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot.
Protecting the White House and Democratic Senate majority won't be easy. But there is too much at stake for us not to leave everything on the table.
I know we can protect the White House and Senate if we're in this fight together.
[**So please, if you can afford it, contribute $3 to our movement today. Every donation, no matter how big or small, will help us get back on track.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.guNpwn&refcode=em230901-1-t3&t=4&akid=4794%2E196590%2EYMrNBs)
With gratitude,

So I am reaching out once again, to ask if you can help us close the gap. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | ** When we set goals like this one, it's because that's the number we need to reach in order to have the resources to build a successful movement — one that will support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. Protecting the White House and Democratic Senate majority won't be easy. But there is too much at stake for us not to leave everything on the table. I know we can protect the White House and Senate if we're in this fight together. With gratitude, Mandela Barnes
