name: Ted Cruz
subject: Every GOP candidate should have said “HELL YES”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, The first Republican presidential primary debate was held last week in Milwaukee. Millions tuned in to hear what the eight candidates who participated had to say. There were a number of pointed exchanges and there were some clear winners. I thought Vivek Ramaswamy, Nikki Haley, and Mike Pence all had a pretty good evening. But the winner, in my estimation, was Donald Trump. _His absence made it seem that he was on a separate, much larger stage all by himself_. Most of the candidates confirmed that they would support Donald Trump if he wins our Party’s nomination again next year. That’s a good thing. **However, EVERY candidate should have said, “ Hell yes, I will pardon Donald Trump on January 20, 2025” when they had the chance. We cannot allow the Democrats to use the legal system to punish their political opponents- enough is enough.** _We must stand strong and united against the left’s lawless abuse of power!_ I’m leading the charge to expose the Biden administration’s weaponization of our justice system and I will not relent. The rule of law and our great nation’s future is at stake. **[I’m grateful for any support you can send to sustain our fight >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.-pbtMtlKAEf9_-dInQ)** __For Liberty,

And I know that I have millions of supporters like you who will also NEVER SURRENDER our mission to save our country. | On November 5, 2024, we will win back the White House and prove that America's elections are still decided by the American people. If you 're doing poorly right now due to the corrupt politicians who would rather try to IMPRISON me as an innocent man than actually fix our broken country, then ignore my request... | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Team Engel
subject: Thank you so much!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
As the subject line of this email may have given away — we want to take a moment to say thank you.
The grassroots energy we have in this race is incredible.
Last year, we were outspent 6:1, with Republican super PACs pouring money into our race. But thanks to small dollar donors, generous volunteers, and a fired-up base, Kirsten came within one percentage point of winning.
This year, the support isn't just the same. It's better.
Because of folks like you, we exceeded our August fundraising goal!
We still have a long road to Election Day. But with you on our team, we're that much more prepared to take on Juan Ciscomani — and the corporate donors, special interests, and Republican PACs lining up behind him.
Thanks again!
Onwards,
— Team Engel
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090123_ThankYou_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090123_ThankYou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090123_ThankYou_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090123_ThankYou_act]

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK, Jr. Asks Us To Participate in a National Day of Service!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
“Ask not what your country can do for you. Ask what you can do for your country.” On September 11th this year, Mr. Kennedy is asking all of us the same question.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=1)
---
Peter -- Are you signed up to participate in a service project for the [National Day of Service](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=2)? Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has asked all of us to participate in the September 11th National Days of Service and Remembrance, on September 9, 10, and 11. Mr. Kennedy wants us to harness the enthusiasm and momentum of his campaign to spark positive, lasting change for communities that need it most, NOW, rather than waiting for some distant time in the future. Mr. Kennedy will be right by our side, participating in service projects as well. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=3) Over the past three weeks, volunteers across the country have answered this call to service by submitting over 100 Day of Service projects! These hosts are looking to others in their communities to join their project and contribute a few hours of time. Will you sign up for a service project? | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=4 "Sign Up To Volunteer") [Sign Up To Volunteer](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=4)
---
Some projects are filling up fast, while others still have a need for many volunteers. With over 100 projects available to choose from–with one in almost every state–we hope you can [find one near you](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=5). If not, there are also several virtual projects (see below), as an alternative, or submit your own project! These service projects are a great way to meet other supporters in your region!
**To Find a Service Project Near You:**
1. Go to the [Day of Service Events Page ](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=6)
2. Enter your zip code and select the distance you would be willing to travel to participate.
3. Explore the date, time, and activity for the projects closest to you and choose the best one for you.
4. Click the RSVP button and fill out the form so that the host can contact you with up to date information.
5. Invite your friends and family, and share the link in your confirmation email with your networks by text, email, and social media.

If you have any questions, email us at [dayofservice@teamkennedy.com](mailto:dayofservice@teamkennedy.com).
Let’s show the world that **we the people** are ready, willing, and able to heal our country!
Warm Regards,
Team Kennedy
[Dayofservice@teamkennedy.com](mailto:Dayofservice@teamkennedy.com)
PS. [“Day of Service” t-shirts](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqcpC3Uu0TtfyErPHzkeABYjoC-VXKOry0umcl-b5ZjM4E8op1cOp14wjZfxVsUUuwQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=7) are available for order, and you may choose to wear yours with other volunteers during the event. If ordering a t-shirt, the order must be placed by Monday, September 4th in order to receive it before the weekend of Saturday, September 9th, 10th, 11th.
Can't attend in person? Check out one of the virtual projects:
1. Holiday Cards for Our Military \- [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unusualamerican/holiday_cards_for_our_military?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=8)
2. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/earthbody/holding_space_for_my_community_with_a_free_virtual_earth-body_reclamation_circle?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=9)Activities throughout central Texas to protect water resources and to feed people in need - [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/texaslinda/activities_throughout_central_texas_to_protect_water_resources_and_to_feed_people_in_need?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=10)
3. Spread Love through "Open Heart Origami" - [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/olifeclass/spread_love_through_open_heart_origami_with_oho_lab?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=11)
4. Virtual Reclamation Circle \- [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/earthbody/holding_space_for_my_community_with_a_free_virtual_earth-body_reclamation_circle?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=12)

[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=13) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=14) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=15) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=16)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_1&n=17).

name: Angela
subject: silver lining
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=413%2E52803%2EeQ4lum)

| | I wish I were delivering happier news heading into the weekend, Peter, but unfortunately, we fell short of our August fundraising goal. It’s not great, but there is a silver lining: **September is the final month of the fundraising quarter, which means this month has the highest stakes we’ve faced in this campaign yet.** I know we’re capable of bouncing back, Peter, which means we have to pull together, boost our fundraising numbers, and show just how resilient this grassroots movement is. _And if we do that, nobody will even remember we fell short in August._ **[To reach the voters we need to win, September HAS to be our biggest month yet, so I’m hoping you’ll help us start it off right. Will you please consider pitching in $25 to my Senate campaign so we can set the tone for the rest of the month?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5269?t=9&amount=25&akid=413%2E52803%2EeQ4lum)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5269?t=10&amount=25&akid=413%2E52803%2EeQ4lum)

name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 closer to victory in Wisconsin and beyond →
body:
Gerrymandered maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain ground in the legislature – but since Janet Protasiewicz’s victory this year, we’re one step closer to fairer maps and Democratic power! | | |
---
| | **You can help capitalize on a HUGE opportunity for Democrats in Wisconsin →** Wisconsin Republicans have been in power for decades, working to restrict abortion, attack voting rights, draw heavily gerrymandered maps, and elect their ultra-conservative allies. Wisconsin’s rigged maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain ground in the legislature – but with a new liberal majority on the WI Supreme Court, we’re one step closer to fairer maps and Democratic power. ** Here’s why: A recently filed lawsuit seeks to throw out Wisconsin’s Republican-drawn legislative maps. If this lawsuit is successful and new maps are drawn, every sitting lawmaker would be on the ballot in 2024. This would mark a _huge_ political shift and a chance for Democrats to _finally_ build power and loosen Republicans’ tight grip on Wisconsin. ** [We can’t let this opportunity go to waste. clean_body: Gerrymandered maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain ground in the legislature – but since Janet Protasiewicz’s victory this year, we’re one step closer to fairer maps and Democratic power! | | | | | You can help capitalize on a HUGE opportunity for Democrats in Wisconsin → Wisconsin Republicans have been in power for decades, working to restrict abortion, attack voting rights, draw heavily gerrymandered maps, and elect their ultra-conservative allies. Wisconsin’s rigged maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain ground in the legislature – but with a new liberal majority on the WI Supreme Court, we’re one step closer to fairer maps and Democratic power. Here’s why: A recently filed lawsuit seeks to throw out Wisconsin’s Republican-drawn legislative maps. If this lawsuit is successful and new maps are drawn, every sitting lawmaker would be on the ballot in 2024. This would mark a huge political shift and a chance for Democrats to finally build power and loosen Republicans’ tight grip on Wisconsin. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Wisconsin Republicans have long stood in the way of progress – targeting marginalized communities, get-out-the-vote efforts, and our progress in the legislature. It’s critical that we have the resources in place to help Democrats defeat extreme Republican strongholds in 2023, 2024, and beyond – we need to start laying the groundwork now. Let's go! body:
| Hi. Thank you to everyone who gave to my campaign’s August goal—grassroots supporters like you are what keeps us going in the face of misleading attacks against my record.

It’s no secret: The NRCC intends to target me just as heavily if not heavier than they did in 2022.

**That’s why we have to be ready.**

Today starts our FEC filing month, and my team is working hard to hit our grassroots goal of $40,000. If you weren’t able to give in August, click below to support our work in KS-03: | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

\------------_FWD-----------_
**Derek, early voting in Virginia starts in less than four weeks, and I’ve gotta tell you, I’m fired up!**
Virginia is one of the purplest states in the country, and that means we can’t fight back against right-wing outside spending without your support.
**My friends at the Virginia House Democratic Caucus are facing a critical battle for the future of Virginia this November.**
Right now, Republicans hold a slim House majority, but if we flip the chamber blue, we can deny MAGA Republicans any opportunity to jam through their destructive agenda to ban abortion, cut public school funding, and put more weapons of war in our schools and communities.
[**All we need is you, Derek: Can you split a $25 donation between CommonGood USA and my friends at the Virginia House Democratic Caucus? We’re facing a huge fundraising deadline at the end of August and every donation makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69050259/424960253/1590353957?refcode=20230901_CGUSA_VAHDEM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI4MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYxNTE0ZmQtZTM0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ik8X2O64Fo8rf0Xr9G8OHo3n6vavvXEPq7hLGKsRsLA=)
Virginia Democrats are planning for the biggest early voting push in Virginia’s legislative history because the stakes are historic.
**Why? Virginia is the only southern state left without a post-Roe abortion ban. Recently, a Republican running for the House of Delegates was caught admitting he supports a “100% ban.” **
That’s why I’m personally reaching out on behalf of my friends at the Virginia House Democratic Caucus.
**Getting Democrats out during the early vote could determine the outcome of the election. **
Our incredible Democratic candidates running for the House of Delegates are taking on the _entire_ Republican establishment and some of the most extreme Republicans our Commonwealth has ever seen – to do all that and win, we need to ensure every campaign is fully resourced _now_.
[**So, Derek, will you help us flip the Virginia House of Delegates blue with a donation of $25 – split between CommonGood USA and with Virginia House Democratic Caucus? Every dollar counts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69050266/424960289/1590353957?refcode=20230901_CGUSA_VAHDEM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI4MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYxNTE0ZmQtZTM0OC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ik8X2O64Fo8rf0Xr9G8OHo3n6vavvXEPq7hLGKsRsLA=)
It’s on us to forge a future where our freedoms are protected, our rights aren’t under constant threat, and our children have the promise of a better tomorrow.
Thanks for standing with our Commonwealth,
Terry McAuliffe
72nd Governor of Virginia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sam=20Brown?=
subject: These boots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Here’s something that D.C. elitists just don’t understand... | | | | | | | | |
---
Friend, I’ve been proud to wear boots my whole life. I wore combat boots during my time serving in Afghanistan Then, after I was caught in a roadside bomb explosion, my days of wearing combat boots were over. But I didn’t let that stop me. I traded them for a pair of work boots and got to work in a packaging warehouse to provide for my family. Now, these boots are working harder than ever as my wife and I raise our three children and travel across the rugged landscape of Nevada talking with everyday voters. **[If you ask me, Washington needs a lot more boots, and a lot less suits.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e43f6aa931&e=84ee529f47)** Out-of-touch, elitist politicians who have never put in a hard day’s work in their lives are making decisions that impact everyday Americans like you and me. They don’t understand what we go through. They don’t keep our best interests in mind. _Heck, most of them have probably never even owned a pair of boots in their lives._ If you think it’s long past time that people who wear boots, not people who wear suits, have a say in how things are run around here, **[I’d be honored to have your support.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=99b6e8bd3a&e=84ee529f47)**
---
[**Help the Boots Win: CHIP IN NOW**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b81e36a2b3&e=84ee529f47)
---
Elitists in Washington don’t understand people like us, and probably never will. It’s time that we take back control and build an America that works for all of us. Can I count on you to help me out? Duty First, Sam
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | Support LG! 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ddcd0ca962&e=84ee529f47)
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c0c1d28bd0&e=84ee529f47)
Dear Patriot,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f7a1c74be9&e=84ee529f47)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=653fc582da&e=84ee529f47)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=4e8f8968f5&e=84ee529f47)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Patriot, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=1518e78e96&e=84ee529f47)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=8c4b550513&e=84ee529f47)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Patriot, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2831a4e3e3&e=84ee529f47)**.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. body:
| | | Peter, At a campaign event in Iowa last Friday, a MAGA extremist and 2024 GOP presidential candidate called founding Squad member Rep. Ayanna Pressley a “grand wizard of the modern Ku Klux Klan,” despite being one of the most ardent champions for racial justice in Congress today. **Why would such a completely baseless, bad-faith comparison be made?** Because clout-chasing Republicans know that they can only trend by attacking prominent progressives like Ayanna and twisting history for their benefit. **[Can you make a contribution of any amount directly to Rep. Ayanna Pressley’s re-election campaign to show her that we all have her back? As we get closer to the 2024 elections, Republicans are going to be scaling up racist attacks like this against her — and she needs to be ready to fight clean_body: | | | Peter, At a campaign event in Iowa last Friday, a MAGA extremist and 2024 GOP presidential candidate called founding Squad member Rep. Ayanna Pressley a “grand wizard of the modern Ku Klux Klan,” despite being one of the most ardent champions for racial justice in Congress today. Why would such a completely baseless, bad-faith comparison be made? Because clout-chasing Republicans know that they can only trend by attacking prominent progressives like Ayanna and twisting history for their benefit. Let’s be clear here, Peter. When a right-wing** extremist compares a Black Congresswoman and her work uprooting the structural racism that’s keeping this country profoundly unequitable, to the conduct of the Ku Klux Klan, not only is it deeply offensive and blatantly false — it’s dangerous. Republicans are deliberately fanning the flames of white supremacy by obfuscating the truth about racism in the U.S. They’re spewing anti-Black rhetoric at their campaign events and designating prominent progressive Democrats like Ayanna as boogeymen to court MAGA voters and fearmonger their way through the 2024 cycle. These tactics are tired, but harmful nonetheless. And while we’ll always call out these racist and bad-faith attacks when they happen, we won’t be distracted. Even in the face of these defamatory attacks, we know Ayanna will remain squarely focused on the work of undoing the centuries of harm that has precisely been done to Black Americans, and charting a path of true restorative justice and racial justice forward. We’ll be standing alongside her in that fight — In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . * Pro-war in Ukraine
* Fine with political opponents getting arrested
* Anti-free speech
* Bought & paid for by Super PACs
* Pretends to be anti-establishment

It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign "bipartisanship" while still totally hiding from direct debate with me.

I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: Chuck Schumer is shaking in fear from this grave threat
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 01, 2023

Donald Trump may be
out of the doghouse after this massive plan was announced

Trump is currently in a
dogfight for the battle of the presidency with Joe Biden. Current
polls show them neck and neck.

And Donald Trump may be out of
the doghouse after this massive plan was announced.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Donald Trump admitted to
the unthinkable saying just two words

Former President
Trump has been playing nice for too long. Now he's on the
offensive.
➞ Continue Reading

BREAKING: A Republican
presidential candidate just dropped out of the race

Running for president
is not for the faint of heart. This candidate realized that
rather quickly.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump's 2024 hopes
may be crushed after this latest attack

Trump has been
fighting tooth and nail against radical Democrats. But now he's
going to have to fight even harder.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

personal information we may collect about you, including across

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.
And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $15 between Serve America and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie

clean_body: Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why. [] I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life. We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet. My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America. And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it. Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably. With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck. So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $15 between Serve America and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [] DONATE [] Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Debbie [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, friend. This is my story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWDN1QUDN9

Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like
to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWDN1QUDN9

Friend,

The
first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation
to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR
support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that
we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country.

If
you're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd
like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so
you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to
accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.

Here's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in
Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where
I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to
graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and
witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on
September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for
the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support
of SEAL Team 1.

Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of
prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of
Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my
wonderful wife, Casey.

As
Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction,
unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why,
in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance.
When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an
uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a
citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans.

Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself.
Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:

Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;

Ranks number one for new business formations;

Ranks number one for net in-migration;

Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;

Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the
national average and even lower than other large states like
California and New York;

Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;

Has NO state income tax;

Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I
have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep
red blueprint for freedom.

But
here's the problem, Friend.

Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical
ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get
pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let
Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to
murder Americans. This is NOT okay.

Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest
cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San
Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this
decline.

We
have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own
party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He
has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob.

These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly
impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American
Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my
wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the
balance. This election is not about me. It's about YOU and the
American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's
fraud.

Our
nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline.

That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while
Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four
years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things
as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous
policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the
decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country.

The
time to act is NOW.

Chip in to my campaign here

I
believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and
freedom is worth fighting for.

I
fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd
and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the
American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in
this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when
it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United
States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:

Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy
to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.

I
stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate
stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from
being your voice and your fighter. Please, join me in fighting
for the future-because freedom is always worth fighting for.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

| | Here comes Uncle Sam to cut you off at the bar. As if we don’t have enough lecturing and to-do lists from our federal overlords, the Biden alcohol czar is saying Americans would be better off sticking to just [two beers a week](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0979b6c2362f4d10832abd21d6cfa771&_e=anF2nVd72XEcBhCxU7dKelDaK3E-fUJaq5UrXukrT8IP7gCp7L8yNnoESsjRTyC7i8vk2BkdLqxYqcZzXoQhGZHxnTXxSVsVDrOeoxDt85YtzHzFZebL-UbXojGo3PSqo7ssYDT6jz8haRll4ntgjE3QRPr6SEwbMCqwwWUH5Y3vzk0_odUVxSJdyk8OS-xrp4A2AJ84NNpwVDTFiLkEKdJB3liVxkVickijrLDVHMPd8TfuiSrdqdNcyBx_Uvjz-UiyPO2ifLCRMJZJQMBRYGnMwJbbVvbYisCs5htRXA2ERNp_vsZ9WYo3lTl2HSFKheqDTvaPSdaGwbg8_juIJQ%3D%3D). All this comes on the heels of Canada changing their alcohol guidelines. But we’re the greatest country in the world, and I don’t give a hoot [what Canada does](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0979b6c2362f4d10832abd21d6cfa771&_e=anF2nVd72XEcBhCxU7dKejLRjsC82upuC3c2Ay0duYm469BqNsxdKJSrH6Lm5-Dok2M3GGBU9Fdg20WcSvviy0t45v2Dz9yYuMcecNaBcusMOc-5Y63GnkTveWES4CLH2215Nprz0ZKa637kCLGYA1XmrhBp7IkUUbRwawCI55J0d6bbJzaxVnnUdtCGZAiJUIp5uPSSSvGcUhZj-0V_GiKDxerWULtAduX8ayJY-cIYjo9_s7cnlo0yBbYPKAx38xjggSP7QmmM5NIDwqOg37P8xZ9-AOkwU0OmB7o8x_V7uX6r70hgpLkgDkOcVy03whx-rgApaAL4M4h7h-GLRQ%3D%3D). Why would we ever make them the poster child? As usual, when [Biden’s press secretary](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0979b6c2362f4d10832abd21d6cfa771&_e=anF2nVd72XEcBhCxU7dKeqlFw8NRNk8HABElDD80QBqiYzBOTF_9BpIHBqbN3Wokac04rMxBDVMngq-1EG12hLG72FKWYFSGvHxS8z-oWRS2YKUP9-iU4_2PMAPrnYllEOC74BoDZbFSko86Q6JgovE1NY4fVJhRwcL-pFLsDsohq8c_HsCEbM-AzB8UdFVoo8f1kMJwy_wgiqq2UNALpOCeTO4yAlqjrgKGsaJNqliMWSoVDBpDpW02XwMRoXJVhZycf9M6eMaxeQrqTYkwBA%3D%3D) was asked about it in a press conference, she replied that she "cannot speak to this" and "will leave it to the experts." Last time we left it to the “experts,” we were locked in our homes and muzzled with masks. Forgive me if I’m hesitant to follow the “experts” on this one. I want to be clear: I’m all for staying healthy and making responsible decisions—I don’t even drink myself—but this just comes down to more greedy government overreach. Americans are fully capable of making adult decisions without President Biden's time-wasting, money-burning, freedom-hating initiatives and recommendations. The federal government is already pickpocketing us in the name of taxes—and THIS is what they want to spend our money on? Give me a break. From a [crisis at our southern border](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0979b6c2362f4d10832abd21d6cfa771&_e=anF2nVd72XEcBhCxU7dKelDaK3E-fUJaq5UrXukrT8IbzhEipQyx8PdArEVvXgCOGyDlkXkdTkzU9BuOuT8BjUkNmkTCBG4z77Jbot4Ey82VItcGdXUFpR2N7teG_FvhYyUADmkxhM65fpCr9hXJtg-0McHpfOCCVoiGVZk795_-C5RNT0oh6R-Y4q6x94P0ueoXsiaN7yG6-ijDFM07B3tDQ_A5GuxZfmUOpqghj81If_h35MpeBZt82B4c12DOYGp1hCNla7gN50vgOwjAk3IL-g9yeCQQNlNt8wwo70aP26YqaAAS5IvY230IwzFcYRgb87fhGb7nhnKnSdbxvQ%3D%3D) to [devastating wildfires](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0979b6c2362f4d10832abd21d6cfa771&_e=anF2nVd72XEcBhCxU7dKelDaK3E-fUJaq5UrXukrT8LL1cGX-M4qgHY5uixB8wkrpQwnplHeJHKRlApbfCCzS19mvchnbfo9GOZCkw_srudNAhsKJuT8EO5SNNAetDoeZ3YMTrXJWvsgNdjyADqKo6Y9rMyNVnEtn0KRdfSkQoBAUXTUlmCpXmMY3e-45uwED3ru6xG4Tu9oPbU3Kmu06Atc0pRHQj-R7WIm8uap388xFwRfrhDoxeYtKE9luTQhHPkLm_-CGfW5wC04Q72Ueo-9MBOWe4o6PtY-KBs9m3g%3D), there are far more pressing matters we should be laser-focused on. This nation was founded on the principles of liberty and independence. America is the home of the free, and we can do whatever we dadgum please.

| | _Image courtesy of WATE_ A talented artist from Maryville is making waves with her beautiful depictions of Tennessee. From scenes of the Smoky Mountains to native woodland creatures, Pinkie Mistry is perfectly capturing what she calls “a little paradise.” Her love of the natural beauty of East Tennessee has led to murals like the one she painted in downtown Sevierville of colorful butterfly wings—or her latest piece of artwork pictured here, made specially for a local pediatrician’s office. Mistry also uses her talents to give back to the community. She’s created wine labels for fundraisers, as well as art that supports breast cancer research. Tennessee truly is one of the most scenic places in America, and I could not be prouder to call it my home state. I’m grateful for artists like Mistry who are dedicated to showcasing the beauty of The Volunteer State.

It's hard for me to see, Peter. After fighting for our right to compete, and the decades that it took to build a strong foundation for women's sports, it's on the precipice of all crumbling down. Transgender women (biological men) have infiltrated our sports and are taking away opportunities from passionate and devoted young women who have worked their entire lives to be successful. To prevent this, House Republicans recently passed a bill protecting the integrity of women's sports, but Joe Biden said he intends to veto it. _**As a woman, and the mother of a young girl who competes in track & field, I know where I stand on this issue and I know it's important to her.**__**⬇️**_

clean_body: | | | It's hard for me to see, Peter. After fighting for our right to compete, and the decades that it took to build a strong foundation for women's sports, it's on the precipice of all crumbling down. Transgender women (biological men) have infiltrated our sports and are taking away opportunities from passionate and devoted young women who have worked their entire lives to be successful. To prevent this, House Republicans recently passed a bill protecting the integrity of women's sports, but Joe Biden said he intends to veto it. As a woman, and the mother of a young girl who competes in track & field, I know where I stand on this issue and I know it's important to her.⬇️ | | I want to know what YOU think. | | I understand this is a polarizing issue, but I know what I believe and I'm not going to back down. As your voice in Congress, I will ensure that young women like my daughter have fair competition and opportunities in sports. Help me give women the RIGHT TO WIN in women's sports. Thank you, Mariela Roca | | | | | | |

| Peter,

Earlier this week, the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill became the latest site of a shooting.

My heart and deepest condolences go out to the victim's family and the entire UNC community.

I am immensely grateful to first responders for the swift response to stop the gunman. This incident, like the hundreds of other devastating mass shootings in our country, left our community at a standstill and students and faculty members fearing for their lives.

No student, faculty member, or parent should experience the horrific tragedy that UNC faced.

Today, I remain steadfast in my commitment to passing common sense lifesaving gun reform and urge my colleagues across the aisle to join us in reducing gun violence.

We simply can't afford to wait.

Onward,

Valerie
---

## Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan In October
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1101803.478.1.1434a16e5a383985fa7942559884895e)
---
I have always been a _major_ sports fan.
Recently, I watched a documentary on the great **New York Mets** baseball player **Darryl Strawberry**.
I knew of **Darryl Strawberry's** tremendous career and his unfortunate downfall to drugs later in his career.
What I did not know was how God restored him and called Darryl to the ministry.
Shortly after learning this, I began following **Darryl Strawberry** and his ministry and have been amazed at the preacher he is.
This is why I am excited to invite you to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1101803.479.1.5836c4deab4dc481875973b44640219d) Tulsa on **Sunday, October 8** to hear **Darryl Strawberry** preach the Gospel!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

subject: The Truth About “Gender-Affirming Care” for Minors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliX83GNAfwWIqtVYpesdrLACR7W5p1HOY2Y5RWxZvNryyGmHA7SPcK0ys04DnRmxV0OYYQwLMAlAX1xIbKf6Nuf-vhliFpTQ20pXHdCxxUBvHNzP-G32CdZCVMqYHkl1y6obD763bRQH8jfwfqHtCYoDUno4frMemZF3XOokLY9fdsu4EeZsf_25_gmrjRfNjalgcibMN4HkCIi0EBsTE6TYedVJWDH-IzeMasNyISO_zaCnQSHAz8HpJ6xdWLExM4MltUZiE9rYTir468x9x2qCM8Y2XqNC1C_PrJA91hQdA=&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==)
---
|
Peter –
Dan Crenshaw here. My regularly scheduled Friday campaign briefs are returning after a busy and productive month in the district. As you may know, Congress was out of session during the month of August. I've used that time to hear from constituents across my district, continue my work as Chairman of the Task Force to Combat Mexican Drug Cartels, and fight to end the growing social contagion of so-called "gender-affirming care" for children.
I want to give a special thank you to all my supporters who have donated their hard-earned dollars to support my re-election campaign. Team Crenshaw is unlike any other congressional campaign in the country. We employ a full-time staff of talented writers, video producers, and event coordinators. Your financial support makes this operation possible and allows us to share persuasive conservative messaging on a wide range of critical issues with millions of Americans every week. [If you would like to join Team Crenshaw and help us grow the conservative movement, please donate any amount you can afford at this link.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliX83GNAfwWIqtVYpesdrLACR7W5p1HOY2Y5RWxZvNryyGmHA7SPcK0ys04DnRmxV0OYYQwLMAlAX1xIbKf6Nuf-vhliFpTQ20pXHdCxxUBvHNzP-G32CdZCVMqYHkl1y6obD763bRQH8jfwfqHtCYoDUno4frMemZF3XOokLY9fdsu4EeZsf_25_gmrjRfNjalgcibMN4HkCIi0EBsTE6TYedVJWDH-IzeMasNyISO_zaCnQSHAz8HpJ6xdWLExM4MltUZiE9rYTir468x9x2qEvPFfU-Dto7fakY9RTPC2o=&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==)
Now, here's your campaign brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| "GENDER-AFFIRMING CARE" FOR MINORS IS A SOCIAL CONTAGION
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliO5qf8CqI4sFhQOYHvU_olnbdDsQ-2fH2Cc7nkSRucXWOLVMqIwvq8N1_rIDPnNCe1s6nQH0N1gAbC_2qaT8lMqwEXjmKEIMBJtvJnVnzX3LEZ6wgJjObW6LNH_q4trRU0bHBVcrUXZtQKZoEcSX_OPwE08HEHBMNCLmIc-rtwGfTxcGavmZOaA==&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MY OP-ED IN NEWSWEEK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliO5qf8CqI4sFhQOYHvU_olnbdDsQ-2fH2Cc7nkSRucXWOLVMqIwvq8N1_rIDPnNCe1s6nQH0N1gAbC_2qaT8lMqwEXjmKEIMBJtvJnVnzX3LEZ6wgJjObW6LNH_q4trRU0bHBVcrUXZtQKZoEcSX_OPwE08HEHBMNCLmIc-rtwGfTxcGavmZOaA==&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==)
---
| |
---
| Today the ban on so-called "gender-affirming care" for minors goes into effect in Texas. I'm seeing lots of hysteria from the left (as predicted) about how this will somehow harm kids. Time to set the facts straight:
There are no systematic reviews (which by the way, are the gold standard of evidence in science showing that these procedures have any long-term benefits on our kids. In fact, there are multiple systematic reviews showing just the opposite: that there is [low evidence](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliyt-cxRCwCM6BvGUhLOECbii8i8jJZd8VMYbYDKX3FW-kbqUs7TprYvCuT1zODrpq-bR1S-8gVTzhnSbuPv6d6gj0Pnbq_ySmRq1-2isCbM0=&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==) for clinical benefit.
There are serious, lifelong consequences involved with "transitioning" a child. We have a duty to abide by the "do no harm" principle here -- the risk is just too great.
This is a social contagion. Prescriptions for puberty blockers and cross-sex hormones more than doubled between 2017 and 2021 in children 6-17, and there were at least 121,882 unique pediatric gender dysphoria diagnoses for this [age group](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliLddmp-QH6svpQAxaFDSSXzwFYOm2xn6QOx9da36edfhN5vgHBmyxC1UOmTBczrFzUKnYQATHIuh9YRaHASg8P4g6saDwuhNGB4kQtZYhuhgkbG9N-IEeoF9Ri9I7CuHBXkML3baOQHuM1nEk9lZHPg==&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==). There's a rush from doctors, leaders, and parents to affirm a temporary ideation all under the guise of "compassion." I know one thing for sure: permanently mutilating a child is the furthest thing from compassion.
I'm glad Texas is banning this nonsense for kids and hope more states follow suit.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHAT COLOMBIA CAN TEACH US ABOUT US ABOUT HOW TO DESTROY THE MEXICAN DRUG CARTELS
---

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH MY MESSAGE IN SPANISH TO MEXICO'S PRESIDENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliU2bbnanLlHeBUcbh8Y41fQApOuPM_nL6T3rJZmaSgCUAKU2S19Un0tEhGzS0g2IoU4BOd8huwFdUS50d1yeCMKkyxRoe7_o2ArHTE3YRYsOVGzNcHYYqFA==&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==)

| Last month, the Jalisco New Generation Cartel kidnapped, tortured, and murdered [five young Mexican college students](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uOcCBoN4TUhcxJeFZkZUy0nHZtnwWESaajGPuNhQCOELRR2xYyICYZs6Su3yQyliZiGh1Iq_yeXXCrNkrjxTo867ljgF5z2undI4F-sLL3EFYvBVAtJbXjPdK95mJkActNTyr4ztvdKDrUgM9tNjvmabDVgjkQN9xh4kDdO5BNXXt9scvQyCez--j1ltZXySn_yOQ0HuSj7BLTT6cl1YDZnrWvDOBSo9UXztRH9g585OpmRFcSs2NFTLHSz4KNsZQyyO0ABg2rWUK6tXGpo0Fw==&c=SstgmLrY26unX5cOSbpjghBcpow3EoDsTA6VyB1a_NfPB4prkD3WhQ==&ch=On03usGy8P_VEgvTvS9dNSuM4Jfqk0apzyYeL1_3QqzFssXivaycHw==) who were lured into a trap by the promise of a fake job offer. According to a local outlet in Mexico, the students were deceived into meeting cartel members, who tried to recruit the victims. When the students refused, they were duct-taped, beaten, stabbed, and beheaded.
The cartels are an enemy to the American AND Mexican people. These criminals want to see innocent civilians suffer, so they can profit off of their torment, pain, and death. These cartels are poisoning American citizens too, with deadly fentanyl being laced into drugs. So what can we do about it? Look to Colombia for a good example:
It was only 30 years that Colombia looked very similar to how Mexico looks today. Cartels ruled the streets and the Colombian government was powerless to stop them. All of that changed when Colombia partnered with the United States. They utilized our intelligence and military capabilities to take down the cartels and end their reign of terror. That partnership never ended, and transitioned to "Plan Colombia" to fight the guerrilla insurgencies. Colombia is now one of the most successful countries in South America, and American support played a huge role in that success.
We could use that same model in Mexico to wipe out the cartels which are responsible for so much damage -- human trafficking, more than 70,000 American deaths from fentanyl every year, and an untold number of murders of Mexican citizens. As the Chairman of the Congressional Task Force to Combat Mexican Drug Cartels, part of my mission is to persuade the Mexican government to simply ask for the support of the U.S. military.
My message to President AMLO is this: let us help you defeat these cartels once and for all. We have the resources and capabilities. We have to act now, before more innocent people get killed. Your country is on the line.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – Dan Crenshaw here. My regularly scheduled Friday campaign briefs are returning after a busy and productive month in the district. As you may know, Congress was out of session during the month of August. I want to give a special thank you to all my supporters who have donated their hard-earned dollars to support my re-election campaign. Team Crenshaw is unlike any other congressional campaign in the country. We employ a full-time staff of talented writers, video producers, and event coordinators. Your financial support makes this operation possible and allows us to share persuasive conservative messaging on a wide range of critical issues with millions of Americans every week. == Now, here's your campaign brief: | | | | | | | | "GENDER-AFFIRMING CARE" FOR MINORS IS A SOCIAL CONTAGION | | | == | == | | | Today the ban on so-called "gender-affirming care" for minors goes into effect in Texas. I'm seeing lots of hysteria from the left (as predicted) about how this will somehow harm kids. Time to set the facts straight: There are no systematic reviews (which by the way, are the gold standard of evidence in science showing that these procedures have any long-term benefits on our kids. In fact, there are multiple systematic reviews showing just the opposite: that there is == for clinical benefit. There are serious, lifelong consequences involved with "transitioning" a child. We have a duty to abide by the "do no harm" principle here -- the risk is just too great. This is a social contagion. Prescriptions for puberty blockers and cross-sex hormones more than doubled between 2017 and 2021 in children 6-17, and there were at least 121,882 unique pediatric gender dysphoria diagnoses for this ==. There's a rush from doctors, leaders, and parents to affirm a temporary ideation all under the guise of "compassion." I know one thing for sure: permanently mutilating a child is the furthest thing from compassion. I'm glad Texas is banning this nonsense for kids and hope more states follow suit. | | | | | | | | WHAT COLOMBIA CAN TEACH US ABOUT US ABOUT HOW TO DESTROY THE MEXICAN DRUG CARTELS | == | == | | | Last month, the Jalisco New Generation Cartel kidnapped, tortured, and murdered == who were lured into a trap by the promise of a fake job offer. When the students refused, they were duct-taped, beaten, stabbed, and beheaded. The cartels are an enemy to the American AND Mexican people. That partnership never ended, and transitioned to "Plan Colombia" to fight the guerrilla insurgencies. Colombia is now one of the most successful countries in South America, and American support played a huge role in that success. We could use that same model in Mexico to wipe out the cartels which are responsible for so much damage -- human trafficking, more than 70,000 American deaths from fentanyl every year, and an untold number of murders of Mexican citizens. As the Chairman of the Congressional Task Force to Combat Mexican Drug Cartels, part of my mission is to persuade the Mexican government to simply ask for the support of the U.S. military. Peter,

Joe Biden and Montana Senator Jon Tester have failed time and again to fulfill the most basic function of government: **Keeping America SAFE AND SECURE.**

**Thanks to your support last month, our grassroots campaign surpassed our August fundraising goal.**

As the summer comes to an end, I am energized by the amount of volunteers, supporters, and endorsers that have rallied behind our campaign. It’s a sure sign that our movement is gaining momentum when it matters most.

In a toss-up district like ours, every last dollar makes a difference. That’s why I’m so glad that we hit our fundraising goal -- now we need to build upon our progress.

name: Britt Gondolfi
subject: When I was 19 I had an abortion
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zRu3g-wRB9ZrzqGpZimVkYVPaEH9LaYSOVWHiOlKjL9oCOmVvQ701OgwGK-s7iz_S5f9hCPmYYnDZi65Qjb3KZAGgo6pzAVRDLIMc9sLZ1Y2UyzdwjOO3OiFgCZNLaBRPk6PjvvRg5dKBReL28svZVE4jVzYqO-cpDtj2ZCz8W1zaVwFmALLavnqLwB0_HV4ReZCNydY_a1pzb7N7rGNbDxlwtPdRI8V1HgkAjgR8S51oW-tiixBD-W_WIpPeILYkFhf5vNxXr3I9YWVscTwlu-cCZ0cau8HbZdmQGtD6WE1xbjcM1Msq-3r2ZDrP1qCU/3z8/WdX0QTEER3WT7RMGHlMGwA/h0/GjMJOZQRP3EhKJQ6eY_ErhWnyN8jY8EAfMH8_OaaraY)
---
Friend, At age 19 I walked into my Catholic college’s health clinic on Valentines Day. My period was late. The nurse walked into the exam room with my pregnancy test, congratulated me, and my stomach dropped to the floor. In shock, I walked out of the office and found my boyfriend. He could tell immediately that I had gotten news neither of us were ready to hear. I knew he wasn’t ready to be a father. I knew I was not ready to be a mother... I knew, deep down inside, that we did not stand a chance of raising a family together. I had a medical abortion at 6 weeks pregnant. I was confused when I was not depressed or sad afterwards, but relieved. My limited education of abortion had only given me the sense that all women who make this decision would be swallowed by regret for the rest of their lives. Up until this point I had identified as “Pro-life.” I grew up going to Catholic school and went to a Baptist church on weekends. But more than God or religion, what made me pro-life was my mother. My mother was a teen mom, and I had always told myself that If I ever found myself pregnant unexpectedly, I would do what my mother did. But my mother struggled. Young and with few resources, she had to work harder than _anyone_ I have ever known to support my brother and me. When I found out I was pregnant, the realities of my mother’s journey hit me square in the face. I was not ready to embark on that journey. I was in no place to provide for a child. My abortion experience changed me in a way I never saw coming, so much so that after I was recovered I interned at a Women’s health clinic in Atlanta that offered abortion services. In my role I would sit with women on the day of their abortion procedure. I helped them fill out their medical paperwork, I talked to them about the procedure, I offered them a compassionate ear, and I listened to their stories. I did this for two years. I have quite literally heard _hundreds_ of women’s stories on the day of their abortion procedure. That is why I am running for office; I know that when a woman walks into an abortion clinic, it is their saving grace. No one is there flippantly or gleefully. _**Women are there because they need to be.**_
---

---
_Watch my first campaign video here._
---
A woman having an abortion is in a crisis. Whether the crisis is borne out of money, career, existing children, or tragically a violent conception or medical emergency, abortion is necessary healthcare. I have never been a fan of the term “choice.” People choose abortion like people choose car accidents. People can drive as safely as they can, and still, sometimes accidents happen. You can take any number of precautions in your life, but things will still happen that are out of your control. I am now a proud 35 year old single mother of a beautiful six year old daughter. I have just graduated from law school and work for a wonderful environmental non-profit. I have a children’s book coming out next year. And for the first time in my life, I do not have to work two jobs to make it and life is absolutely wonderful. _So why mess it up by running for office?_ Because if Louisiana’s current abortion laws had existed when I was 19, I would not have had the chance to build my life to a place where I was truly ready to provide for a child. The Louisiana State Legislature has [passed a law](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHxMFYkKnUFaILCcOQyL90ZV-1t6Mt8I-8S8h5qcAg7GjNzSgyGMkdUfUlLhaMwJGJeDfWUDjkmNISJ2SYxOklYFMhCWIyV4GdQSluSyr4UaHWk8ohMQRHoXQzCerYzoZmAa6Xsm3yUx0Mxx0FuKVMMVZHM1z2nLNp9K2e1YSU5mYm94MP2DxFSGRtMhnRk7meYcBlXfwi_KdwTAccN3PG8iiHCx6pvFDQ4BrQESXETOvzbSM9BD2xx_04C3es0T28_XEZpF7XTm5tO7Oo4VahVWsySND29qwgrq92FYJydcv96N0_dn1jeVgPUPagC52q5TQRWdiD5ZXf2hpxoYXil9/3z8/WdX0QTEER3WT7RMGHlMGwA/h2/2LHNIIubsZSiQO8UntchUUIWtWt3poy1oWAUX6UAd7w) stating that every woman who falls pregnant is forced to give birth. **Louisiana has the harshest abortion law in the country.** Too young or too old? Too bad. Too sick? Too bad. No partner? Too bad. Bad partner? Too bad. Financially struggling? Too bad. Rape? Too bad. Incest? Too bad. If anyone, doctor or otherwise, helps a woman have an abortion, they are liable to face up to 15 years in jail and 200k in civil penalties. **This is a disgrace to the women and families of Louisiana and we must dismantle Louisiana’s cruel abortion landscape before it is too late.**

clean_body: | | Friend, At age 19 I walked into my Catholic college’s health clinic on Valentines Day. My period was late. The nurse walked into the exam room with my pregnancy test, congratulated me, and my stomach dropped to the floor. In shock, I walked out of the office and found my boyfriend. He could tell immediately that I had gotten news neither of us were ready to hear. I knew he wasn’t ready to be a father. I knew I was not ready to be a mother... I knew, deep down inside, that we did not stand a chance of raising a family together. I had a medical abortion at 6 weeks pregnant. I was confused when I was not depressed or sad afterwards, but relieved. My limited education of abortion had only given me the sense that all women who make this decision would be swallowed by regret for the rest of their lives. Up until this point I had identified as “Pro-life.” I grew up going to Catholic school and went to a Baptist church on weekends. But more than God or religion, what made me pro-life was my mother. My mother was a teen mom, and I had always told myself that If I ever found myself pregnant unexpectedly, I would do what my mother did. But my mother struggled. Young and with few resources, she had to work harder than anyone I have ever known to support my brother and me. When I found out I was pregnant, the realities of my mother’s journey hit me square in the face. I was not ready to embark on that journey. I was in no place to provide for a child. My abortion experience changed me in a way I never saw coming, so much so that after I was recovered I interned at a Women’s health clinic in Atlanta that offered abortion services. In my role I would sit with women on the day of their abortion procedure. I helped them fill out their medical paperwork, I talked to them about the procedure, I offered them a compassionate ear, and I listened to their stories. I did this for two years. I have quite literally heard hundreds of women’s stories on the day of their abortion procedure. That is why I am running for office; I know that when a woman walks into an abortion clinic, it is their saving grace. No one is there flippantly or gleefully. Women are there because they need to be. | Watch my first campaign video here. A woman having an abortion is in a crisis. Whether the crisis is borne out of money, career, existing children, or tragically a violent conception or medical emergency, abortion is necessary healthcare. I have never been a fan of the term “choice.” People choose abortion like people choose car accidents. People can drive as safely as they can, and still, sometimes accidents happen. You can take any number of precautions in your life, but things will still happen that are out of your control. I am now a proud 35 year old single mother of a beautiful six year old daughter. I have just graduated from law school and work for a wonderful environmental non-profit. I have a children’s book coming out next year. And for the first time in my life, I do not have to work two jobs to make it and life is absolutely wonderful. So why mess it up by running for office? Because if Louisiana’s current abortion laws had existed when I was 19, I would not have had the chance to build my life to a place where I was truly ready to provide for a child. The Louisiana State Legislature has stating that every woman who falls pregnant is forced to give birth. Louisiana has the harshest abortion law in the country. Too young or too old? Too bad. Too sick? Too bad. No partner? Too bad. Bad partner? Too bad. Financially struggling? Too bad. Rape? Too bad. Incest? Too bad. If anyone, doctor or otherwise, helps a woman have an abortion, they are liable to face up to 15 years in jail and 200k in civil penalties. This is a disgrace to the women and families of Louisiana and we must dismantle Louisiana’s cruel abortion landscape before it is too late. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: or Thank you for support at this critical stage of our campaign. Together we will make abortion legal again in Louisiana. Sincerely, Britt Gondolfi | To contribute via check, please address to: P.O. Box 2481, Hammond, LA 70404 britt@gondolfi.com | | Sent via .
