clean_body: The Texas Tribune has reported,** Peter: A Texas judge ruled that Texas Republicans’ “Death Star Bill”—which will block local protections like the right to a water break for construction workers—is unconstitutional. Extremist Republicans are likely to appeal the ruling to the right-wing Texas Supreme Court, so it’s critical that we keep up the pressure RIGHT NOW. = = = Thank you for being in this fight, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Unimaginable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
In this new ad, Prosecutor Erin White says that Daniel Cameron’s view that survivors of rape or incest—sometimes girls as young as nine—should be forced to give birth, is "extreme, and it’s dangerous.” Peter,

Today, my campaign is launching a new TV ad, and I want to tell you why we’re running it. In it, Erin White, a Kentucky prosecutor, says that Daniel Cameron’s view that survivors of rape or incest – sometimes girls as young as nine – should be forced to give birth is “extreme, and it’s dangerous.” She's right.

She says, “Nobody – **no child** – should _ever_ have to go through that.”

Cameron has repeatedly been clear that he supports Kentucky’s extreme law that does not include exceptions for survivors of rape or incest. And his running mate – Robby Mills – even voted against an amendment that would provide these exceptions under Kentucky law.

As attorney general, I worked to get justice for survivors of some of the most heinous crimes imaginable. Kentuckians need to know how extreme and dangerous Daniel Cameron’s views are.

Please watch; it’s important. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69053734/424971920/-1023724715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlmNmQxNS1lYjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1zVehLr8p_v630Aw12dMhokgkXX9O8kHxm0jGzg6nA=&emci=d4b9b5aa-da48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=599f6d15-eb48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1437603)
---
Thank you,

Andy

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

subject: Couldn't do it without this grassroots team

body:
This is the last time you’ll hear from us this month.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69054241/424973832/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2MxNjQzMS1lZDQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zx1EVNNx9Jtzr5fcU3qA5kMv0zu0yYguOIbss2dCxlA=) | I want to take a moment to express my gratitude and say **thank you** for your support, team.

Yesterday, we faced an important end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I am happy to share that, thanks to the dedication of folks like you, we exceeded our goal!

Thank you for being an integral part of our ongoing battle for reproductive rights and our collective voice on Issue 1. Because of this grassroots team, we're in a good spot as we look ahead to September and prepare to protect abortion rights in November. **But let me be clear, team: This fight is far from over, and the road ahead isn't going to be without its challenges.**

Ohio's potential knows no bounds, but we've been held back by out-of-touch politicians for far too long. In a landscape where extremist, anti-choice legislators will say, spend, and do whatever they can to try and silence Ohioans, as Democrats, we stand united against their attacks, and will never stop fighting for the fundamental right to reproductive choice.

Thanks for all you do,

Liz Walters
Chair

| | | Friend, Congress has been in recess the last few weeks, and I’ve been meeting with folks from across Texas’s 22nd District.

_We’ve been discussing Biden’s border crisis, my work on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, and the looming government funding deadline that Congress must address by the end of the month. _ I’ve heard the concerns of Texans like you and will take them to Congress when we reconvene on Tuesday. It’s a privilege to fight for you, Friend. But I can’t do it alone. It’s going to take all of us working together to defeat the Biden administration and the Radical Left. **If you’d like to join this fight and make a difference in the lives of your fellow Texans, please pitch in today. **

[**But here’s what we’re facing:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69054393/424974167/1707618179?source=20230901_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2MxNjQzMS1lZDQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29Y4OErTSW20fHM2JISZplvOho5izfpwsLOkVSSMc_A=&emci=4ba680b8-6d47-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f3c16431-ed48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)

**[_**At this critical juncture, I need to hear from my strongest supporters. It would mean so much if you could take 10 seconds right now to tell me your priorities for the remainder of this year. name: Will Rollins

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69054974/424976289/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTI3ZjE0Ni1lZjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zi-dEiyLOU2ehO6oz_iFcVZ6LeLA43Njl0qfjGYTsSo=)
Peter,

Before you log off for the holiday weekend, I wanted to reach out and **thank you** for your incredible support over the past month.

I'm always so humbled and grateful for the support this community shows for our campaign. You step up when we need you most, and I'm proud to report that we met our August fundraising goal.

**I also want to express my gratitude to everyone who answered our call to support local families in the wake of Hurricane Hilary.** Last week, Desert communities here in the Coachella Valley saw massive flooding that caused road closures and led to dozens of residents being trapped due to the dangerous flood conditions.

**With your help, Team Rollins was able to raise enough money to provide over 6,000 meals to Riverside County food banks offering assistance to families in need.**

I was happy to see this team come together with a spirit of cooperation to support neighbors in a time of crisis. It's my hope we continue living up to these values -- not only in our campaign, but also in the halls of Congress.

Thanks again, and I hope you enjoy the long weekend.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69054975/424976290/-1669222325?refcode=em-9.01.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTI3ZjE0Ni1lZjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zi-dEiyLOU2ehO6oz_iFcVZ6LeLA43Njl0qfjGYTsSo=)

I also want to express my gratitude to everyone who answered our call to support local families in the wake of Hurricane Hilary. Last week, Desert communities here in the Coachella Valley saw massive flooding that caused road closures and led to dozens of residents being trapped due to the dangerous flood conditions. With your help, Team Rollins was able to raise enough money to provide over 6,000 meals to Riverside County food banks offering assistance to families in need. I was happy to see this team come together with a spirit of cooperation to support neighbors in a time of crisis. It's my hope we continue living up to these values -- not only in our campaign, but also in the halls of Congress. Thanks again, and I hope you enjoy the long weekend. = P.S. With the holiday coming up, we're expecting our fundraising numbers to tick down a bit over the next few days. = | = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress If you wish to donate by check, you can make it payable to Will Rollins for Congress and mail the check to: Will Rollins for Congress PO Box 6282 414 W Grand Blvd Corona, CA 92878 United States

body:
To find out everything you need to know about a candidate, follow the money.
Team–I know you’ve received a lot of emails in the past few days, as we approached our end-of-month deadline. **(If you’ve already donated, thank you immensely![If you missed your chance, you can help us start September off on the right foot and chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69055607/424978741/13284604?refcode=em23_230901_EOMTY_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230901_EOMTY_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&refcode2=26cecf60-f148-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmNlY2Y2MC1mMTQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EY1k0gRZC9ns2QF4cb8EMZ7PCNPcoGlUM3tBPTEJ6ao=))**

It’s not lost on me that these emails can get a little annoying and tedious—believe me when I say how grateful I am for your understanding. If I had it my way, dark money and corporate PACs wouldn’t be allowed to shell out fortunes trying to influence our elections, and **grassroots campaigns like ours wouldn’t be forced to compete with billionaires who try to sway elections in their favor.**

The truth is, while Mike Lawler is out here amassing a war chest of shady, far-right PAC and Big Oil money, I’m here reaching out to you to support our campaign through these—admittedly somewhat _annoying_ —emails.**I wouldn’t have it any other way.**

Every time you donate—whether it’s $1 or $100—it gives power to our movement and shows Big Oil, corporate PACs, and all of their sycophants that we don’t need a penny from them.

Thousands of grassroots supporters stepped up to the plate to donate what they could, and as a result, we crushed our $70,000 end-of-month goal.

So thank you, from the bottom of my heart. You’re showing us and our political system the power of a grassroots movement, and I couldn’t be more proud or more grateful.

Let’s keep it up all the way to next November.

—Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: When you join my team, I want to send you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c73d3221d62062557d4a23b29a6f991b530cf813cd7931c93572abbb4ceaa666728f708158df1271eb00ff0e6c144a486ffe4960d99457521655cb8404a288a68d9dbbe605860c24d0395ce824ef7660

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeac336593c1d23dc815e16c7cb58059774d0e7a730f4de30347c5cc27474084c8fd58880097adaee9bf593eb03f2027987

Peter,

Every donation to my campaign makes an incredible impact.

That’s why, when patriots across the country send in donations, I treat them as a member of my team, not like a personal piggy bank.

When my team grows, I like to make sure that every new donor understands how much I value their support. That’s why it’s important to me that you get these perks:

With a donation of $47 or more, I want to send you an official Team DeSantis membership card to show off your place on this campaign

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeac336593c1d23dc815e16c7cb58059774d0e7a730f4de30347c5cc27474084c8fd58880097adaee9bf593eb03f2027987

This card opens the door to all of the shows of appreciation I give to every one of my donors. Not only does this card signify your generosity and dedication to fighting for freedom, but it also carries with it a number of additional team benefits, such as:

Donor-exclusive merch releases, discounts, and promotions

Invitations to tele-townhalls

VIP media alerts and first access to campaign updates

Access to password-protected campaign content

Personalized videos for you to share your membership status with your social network

Exclusive meet & greet opportunities

A Team DeSantis email signature and digital badge

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeac336593c1d23dc815e16c7cb58059774d0e7a730f4de30347c5cc27474084c8fd58880097adaee9bf593eb03f2027987
DONATE $47: GET YOUR NEW MEMBER PACKAGE

>From investor-exclusive special merchandise to tele-town halls and meet-and-greet opportunities with me and Casey, you’ll have a true insider look at how this campaign operates when you join my team.

I want you in this fight with me.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeac336593c1d23dc815e16c7cb58059774d0e7a730f4de30347c5cc27474084c8fd58880097adaee9bf593eb03f2027987
JOIN MY TEAM TODAY

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeac336593c1d23dc815e16c7cb58059774d0e7a730f4de30347c5cc27474084c8fd58880097adaee9bf593eb03f2027987

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eea6ce473b2f36cef7fa131d329785b34886d42a6297134aef2800a6f770c6bc86c6ec80ee1a0796ce017ed880d20117c03
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeae539d7a413bc097073970ea7e4c154b9e8a77b037e24751ac7c6125e0aa267d47d97680f3d34ef83aeb1dec00e34ebd7
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd22f21521608eeac336593c1d23dc815e16c7cb58059774d0e7a730f4de30347c5cc27474084c8fd58880097adaee9bf593eb03f2027987

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, Every donation to my campaign makes an incredible impact. That’s why, when patriots across the country send in donations, I treat them as a member of my team, not like a personal piggy bank. When my team grows, I like to make sure that every new donor understands how much I value their support. That’s why it’s important to me that you get these perks: With a donation of $47 or more, I want to send you an official Team DeSantis membership card to show off your place on this campaign This card opens the door to all of the shows of appreciation I give to every one of my donors. Not only does this card signify your generosity and dedication to fighting for freedom, but it also carries with it a number of additional team benefits, such as: Donor-exclusive merch releases, discounts, and promotions Invitations to tele-townhalls VIP media alerts and first access to campaign updates Access to password-protected campaign content Personalized videos for you to share your membership status with your social network Exclusive meet & greet opportunities A Team DeSantis email signature and digital badge DONATE $47: GET YOUR NEW MEMBER PACKAGE From investor-exclusive special merchandise to tele-town halls and meet-and-greet opportunities with me and Casey, you’ll have a true insider look at how this campaign operates when you join my team. I want you in this fight with me. JOIN MY TEAM TODAY In Freedom, Ron DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. |
# SECOND CHANCE
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter, We came so close, but we missed our August goal. Our fundraising deadline last night passed, and we came up short. **But since we only missed our goal by $5,500, our team is extending it by one more day.** [**Please make your FINAL August contribution TODAY, so that we can hit our August goal – although one day late – and ensure we have the funds we need to spread our conservative message throughout the month of September.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=310c321703&e=0be619cbaa) **That message is clear: We’ve got a country to save. But I need your help to get there. Your donations and support allow us to confront the issues that are tearing our great country apart.** **Will you stand with me? Your support helps us to get on that next debate stage, where we can take our appeal directly to the American people and confront the establishment head on.** **[With your help, we can restore America!](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=130d71e5b1&e=0be619cbaa)** Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

clean_body: We missed our goal, but we’re extending once more day! | | | | | | | SECOND CHANCE | | | | | Dear Peter, We came so close, but we missed our August goal. Our fundraising deadline last night passed, and we came up short. But since we only missed our goal by $5,500, our team is extending it by one more day. That message is clear: We’ve got a country to save. But I need your help to get there. Your donations and support allow us to confront the issues that are tearing our great country apart. Will you stand with me? Your support helps us to get on that next debate stage, where we can take our appeal directly to the American people and confront the establishment head on. Thank you, Larry Elder GOP Candidate for President | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24 | 650 Town Center Drive, Suite 1500 Costa Mesa, CA 92626 USA No more emails? name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The next best way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I want to hear directly from you about the issues that matter most to you and your family.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1089%2E35263%2EOUHVlt)
Hi Peter, Wealthy Republicans armed with personal warchests to bankroll their own campaigns are considering jumping into the race for Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat — so defending this toss-up seat and our Democratic majority won’t be easy. As our race heats up, I’m so grateful to know I have folks like you in my corner. **You’re an integral part of this team, which is why today, I want to hear directly from you about the issues that matter most to you and your family.** I wish I could sit down and chat over a cup of coffee with each and every one of you personally, but the next best way for our campaign to learn your concerns is through our September Priorities Survey. **[We’re running a campaign centered around the needs and priorities of the people, so your input today is critical. Will you fill out our September Priorities Survey? It will only take a minute (or two max!).](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Sept_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230901_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1089%2E35263%2EOUHVlt)** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Sept_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230901_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1089%2E35263%2EOUHVlt)
---
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me. I really value your feedback, and I’m looking forward to reviewing your responses with my team in the coming days!
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1089%2E35263%2EOUHVlt) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1089%2E35263%2EOUHVlt)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Cori Bush
subject: RE: Ayanna and I are the first Black women elected to Congress from our states.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I’m standing with my sister in service, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, after she faced a racist, anti-Black attack from a GOP presidential candidate this week. | |
---
Peter, I’m standing with my sister in service, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, after she faced a hateful, racist attack from a GOP presidential candidate. **As Black women in Congress, Ayanna and I have faced a particular type of hate: Misogynoir.** Our country was founded on anti-Blackness and white supremacy, which is still entrenched today. Ten out of the first 12 US presidents all enslaved Black people, and one even traded and sold Black people from the Oval Office. **Ayanna and I are the first Black women elected to Congress from our states.** Since Congress was founded, 1,700 members of Congress have enslaved Black people -- that’s more than the number of Black people who have ever served in Congress. As Black women progressives in Congress, Ayanna and I carry in our hearts the Black women activists and leaders who sparked movements before us. We are not giving up amidst hate and dehumanization. Instead, we continue to lead with love as we work to dismantle oppression, advance justice, and create a society that values people’s lives and well-being. [**Will you join me and Ayanna Pressley in the push to dismantle white supremacy and to advance racial justice? Please donate $5 today to help us stand strong against anti-Black hate.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3gxnqkzEqIMNVVxfHI45dJGO-QpGDMpoPJDN2Pb4C_H6Es5Y1TrI18-YliYd7sm3gtTkOY9MLwW07lZt8-mK0JSeezg9lMD4uGnmE8dAlm9BxE1gSKHf07N4v9yBPPU9Iv13M4fdURsk8PxDk3vRvO6DzMqgtFwWFAVzgyGKdADDNjkhENXaZ8mO0RutFUf0Q7YSOFcQWVOUF6F3IkwvXG5Cu4kB4PmhwA6MJ-GlpS9MLjO8s_C9b6n0jEu3mFz7Vdz0v8QO4eYMjF7ef-cw5zmo4ta7E1CAYaS6Y22gpxHdaxkYdFzw4ikD2ZajBZeYZuQZHVqbDXVScyixJhNNjmjTYf59qOos0BGBkOKoWi-WRP-FXgl6PCDyBS4DAC59F2kEMJDILzCAxqrgb_-iWWHMqWbBPpziY6oRfui-45Tr0QP9YeWqjUGget80AQfQ/3z8/BkklqDxGSRy-L95WWtbOdA/h0/LVmCu6cVfVsq43VGvjICaZeISxS-no9QGLTCqFWEVUM) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Cori Bush and Ayanna Pressley:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3gxnqkzEqIMNVVxfHI45dJSim-OZNAe24eNP58oIS5fBoTU5zHj-L2_fJ1qU-utKiPSkgIFf_yJFbYraAze7CYlmPVrE5YJjNy3F2WTAHswPnPnpHZi7Iw9Wq8EKxltI1jxdXpusibSTCFkXx5knHHb_JuEXBKiE99BYPJaG5VM8EQid4DnlsJacOsJeKJKm4h7KQJOaDptXr6IsFJp25-8g-R9VLy64JPWMw4mMMOsUqtbJqNzPICfNIdSCc7UwuvL6lQ3yHIRtUZ3gJUEr2qpEPRf0qXqyCpKpnk89OxOHpKbosXC2A8vP2hLEzN7j4dUmW90euDbRiOGtdr1a2Rx7_B_XWCj8wlK4XUZEOxFpfxKPMRg22Dmof1hIU0cxXBNFwn93cajjH2Lzu7V34pjNfr9wstL1dTcRv5xwq425vBbPgbK-v9AV8vtxtfzMk81e_q21orw9h2nmL833XXDQzJG7tpb4fFGqLZsl8Lg/3z8/BkklqDxGSRy-L95WWtbOdA/h1/TnnN_heVP_tAopKVXQL_4ihSDmKULWVxQFPyjBMia7s)

Ayanna and I will continue to fight for reproductive justice, health equity, reparations, closing the racial and gender wealth gaps, safe and thriving communities, and freedom from white supremacy.
May we heed Harriet Tubman’s prophetic orders when she urged us: _“If you hear the dogs, keep going. If you see_ _the torches in the woods, keep going. If there's shouting after you, keep going. Don't ever stop. Keep going. If you want a taste of freedom, keep going.”_
Keep going. [**We’ll get to freedom together.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3gxnqkzEqIMNVVxfHI45dJGO-QpGDMpoPJDN2Pb4C_AHPKkdVxOlGTgD4wh8h3lqE6tk-7B_bNjrGhcCoFAkKwDZ8SVKzSLiQm7Qhs0raMnHn3sjtnsQAkPhoO4pgxaYZJUfMRLIRgBfhJ1chiF4cE29-EgLvWoqnfe1659T680E4VEeV4wbJpe0BXpe_lAJ_6Z7l-bamDVG2g8rKI01yoSytfAEpx2Djn6owHRIAg9OdmR1d5tmBfDRJQ40CEb0fMAu--xYnNbzFr74iph3iK03QWFbXwZTS_L-bUupQtUff0Vdsfd6v8DKXlSXz_IWxMaMZFa-WiOxBah1nJPPEd_syv9xNy_zJvposIOseuwfK9oNpcSxhaCJYhUISaqsCNUfFv1B7M57_w6jNQrbLPicMyPjZMPKDtZy4Jv6uHt_m1LG6ts4zRNatDascRYM/3z8/BkklqDxGSRy-L95WWtbOdA/h7/g2oLg-LkRBGl7_FDClD6omMvHUFygfaKkKV-bRv5qgg)****

clean_body: I’m standing with my sister in service, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, after she faced a racist, anti-Black attack from a GOP presidential candidate this week. | | Peter, I’m standing with my sister in service, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, after she faced a hateful, racist attack from a GOP presidential candidate. As Black women in Congress, Ayanna and I have faced a particular type of hate: Misogynoir. Our country was founded on anti-Blackness and white supremacy, which is still entrenched today. Ten out of the first 12 US presidents all enslaved Black people, and one even traded and sold Black people from the Oval Office. Ayanna and I are the first Black women elected to Congress from our states. Since Congress was founded, 1,700 members of Congress have enslaved Black people -- that’s more than the number of Black people who have ever served in Congress. As Black women progressives in Congress, Ayanna and I carry in our hearts the Black women activists and leaders who sparked movements before us. We are not giving up amidst hate and dehumanization. Instead, we continue to lead with love as we work to dismantle oppression, advance justice, and create a society that values people’s lives and well-being. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Cori Bush and Ayanna Pressley: | | | | | | | | | | Ayanna and I will continue to fight for reproductive justice, health equity, reparations, closing the racial and gender wealth gaps, safe and thriving communities, and freedom from white supremacy. May we heed Harriet Tubman’s prophetic orders when she urged us: “If you hear the dogs, keep going. If you see the torches in the woods, keep going. If there's shouting after you, keep going. Don't ever stop. Keep going. If you want a taste of freedom, keep going.” Keep going. ** In solidarity, Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . So much is at stake in Wisconsin, that is why I am in this to win. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057651/424985464/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&refcode=em-9-1-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDMxYWVjOC1mNjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAf3XeVMcILDMYvbDO0iRx9XFY0m0rVKjTzjvjq-9-o=) | You have been with me through so many tough fights, and I wanted to ask that you join me for another one. I made the announcement that I will be seeking re-election to the Wisconsin State Senate, because we still have so much work to do together. Serving the people of Wisconsin is an honor and I’m fortunate to be able to fight for our shared values and represent this wonderful place my family calls home. [**I can't do this without you, and I'm asking you to join me by pitching in whatever you can as we continue this fight together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057654/424985465/-225449112?refcode=em-9-1-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDMxYWVjOC1mNjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAf3XeVMcILDMYvbDO0iRx9XFY0m0rVKjTzjvjq-9-o=) **Next year brings the potential for real change coming to Wisconsin. **We can strengthen our economy and invest in family farmers and small businesses. We will fight like hell to restore reproductive freedom for women in our state. We can provide affordable healthcare to more people, and we can help working families and expand our workforce by making childcare more accessible and affordable. We have the chance to fight for a new Democratic majority next year, and that is why I am in this to win. [If you can give $10, $20, $50 or more today that will help us make that happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057655/424985466/-225449112?refcode=em-9-1-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDMxYWVjOC1mNjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAf3XeVMcILDMYvbDO0iRx9XFY0m0rVKjTzjvjq-9-o=) I look forward to continuing to be a good neighbor for the people I represent in the Wisconsin State Senate. Thank you so much for your support. Sincerely, Brad Pfaff
---
* * *
Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057656/424985467/-225449112?refcode=-footer-&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDMxYWVjOC1mNjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAf3XeVMcILDMYvbDO0iRx9XFY0m0rVKjTzjvjq-9-o=) Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about Brad's campaign to advocate for working families! However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057657/424985468/-545313239?refcode=em-9-1-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDMxYWVjOC1mNjQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAf3XeVMcILDMYvbDO0iRx9XFY0m0rVKjTzjvjq-9-o=&emci=5b7a07a9-ef48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b431aec8-f648-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=3200050), or you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Hs-RxSUm10eJ6E1zaOzltA2?unsubscribedata=oDZEOp2hs9%2BdD836VkGI%2FzZffXbjpsajXvHdpRzCO986%2B8AQ79qhUHs2A50DzAJ5IexcSc3bXYu7B7SFLygpU0co3DLq7KyBjL3fDXcGnm4k%2B5JkTBUvJry%2BtmDDlJ5PobyQKDMKfco2slcAp2N5PkJFtsDbwzm4L0K6fhZe%2BUS%2BStzTj6OLEUwJbGI6KWjCt0yf6tcRD28%2B%2FgsBj2TNlkLcZVWwxdUf7jMO2x1lf6U3PMKA3e%2B3XYcvUtnrRDP9T0g49wKrF6mltw%2FEEWnqFBXckz3IdzFyXM1MNBRdqmVSH04N1ICjkhIW%2BTstqSPRAF5jyXi%2FgwfqZPy7lpGg29uE%2BB7qzlTQ7RnSUX7vNV2pOxhxgtLNKPe2kkwvHOh88IHTfPwFM4UC82Ovi%2FCX0kapIxkIg7V0Tdouf5HI928%3D). | Paid for by Pfaff for State Senate

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Secretary Pete, First Lady Biden Visit Indiana to Highlight Progress for Hoosiers_ Both Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg and First Lady Jill Biden visited Indiana during separate trips this week to highlight the Biden/Harris administration’s work on critical infrastructure projects and mental health initiatives. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057682/424985536/-1643062120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057683/424985537/-1643062120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) First Lady Dr. Biden [visited](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057684/424985538/1166118952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Westfield High School in Hamilton County along with the Surgeon General to speak to students going back to school about the importance of mental healthcare in schools. Secretary Pete made three stops across the Hoosier State, including viewing progress [to the Gary-Chicago Airport](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057685/424985539/517331615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) with Rep. Frank Mrvan. In Elkhart, he met with local officials to discuss federal dollars which will [upgrade a busy railroad crossing](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057686/424985540/915248133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), and in Indianapolis he met with Mayor Joe Hogsett and Rep. Andre Carson to [view investments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057687/424985541/-524556368?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) made to the city by the Jobs Act. ****_Exceptions to Republican Abortion Ban Proving to be Just on Paper_ We are just over a year from the passing of SB1 by the Republican excessive supermajority in a rushed process that ignored a majority of Hoosiers. Now, thanks to [reporting from the Indiana Capital Chronicle](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057688/424985542/-280311340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), it is increasingly clear that this law will make it nearly impossible for rape victims to receive abortion care. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057689/424985543/-1360890651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057690/424985544/-1360890651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Seven of eight of Indiana’s hospital systems said they would not perform abortions in cases of rape, forcing victims to travel out of state to receive care or to carry the child of their abuser. Simply put, this policy is dangerous for Hoosier women and must be repealed. Republicans keep showing they do not care about how the majority of Hoosiers feel about this issue. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057691/424985545/-2076647285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057692/424985546/-2076647285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) With Secretary Pete Buttigieg in Indiana this week, we are highlighting the work of the Inflation Reduction Act and the Infrastructure and Jobs Act for Hoosiers. Only Indiana’s Democratic members of Congress voted for these investments, with all Indiana Republicans voting NO on both bills. Both of these bills are investing billions of dollars directly into Indiana’s future, repairing roads and bridges, and also replacing water infrastructure. [According to Invest.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057693/424985547/-646232311?utm_source=invest.gov&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), over $15 billion worth of private investment has been dedicated to Indiana since President Biden took office. Most recently, the administration announced that thanks to the IRA, it is taking on Big Pharma and [directly negotiating](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057694/424985548/-1103577468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) the price of prescription drugs. ******[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057695/424985549/-1392694171?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Rep. Frank J. Mrvan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057696/424985550/-1392694171?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69057697/424985551/527343836?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNmMGYxYS1mNzQ4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n670IfOabmxn9cx6NEEHsdai-h93firVsQY6x8i03B8=&emci=1b205604-e248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=683f0f1a-f748-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share State Rep. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Secretary Pete, First Lady Biden Visit Indiana to Highlight Progress for Hoosiers Both Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg and First Lady Jill Biden visited Indiana during separate trips this week to highlight the Biden/Harris administration’s work on critical infrastructure projects and mental health initiatives. First Lady Dr. Biden Westfield High School in Hamilton County along with the Surgeon General to speak to students going back to school about the importance of mental healthcare in schools. Secretary Pete made three stops across the Hoosier State, including viewing progress with Rep. Frank Mrvan. In Elkhart, he met with local officials to discuss federal dollars which will , and in Indianapolis he met with Mayor Joe Hogsett and Rep. Andre Carson to made to the city by the Jobs Act. Exceptions to Republican Abortion Ban Proving to be Just on Paper We are just over a year from the passing of SB1 by the Republican excessive supermajority in a rushed process that ignored a majority of Hoosiers. Now, thanks to , it is increasingly clear that this law will make it nearly impossible for rape victims to receive abortion care. Seven of eight of Indiana’s hospital systems said they would not perform abortions in cases of rape, forcing victims to travel out of state to receive care or to carry the child of their abuser. Simply put, this policy is dangerous for Hoosier women and must be repealed. Republicans keep showing they do not care about how the majority of Hoosiers feel about this issue. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. With Secretary Pete Buttigieg in Indiana this week, we are highlighting the work of the Inflation Reduction Act and the Infrastructure and Jobs Act for Hoosiers. Only Indiana’s Democratic members of Congress voted for these investments, with all Indiana Republicans voting NO on both bills. Both of these bills are investing billions of dollars directly into Indiana’s future, repairing roads and bridges, and also replacing water infrastructure. , over $15 billion worth of private investment has been dedicated to Indiana since President Biden took office. Most recently, the administration announced that thanks to the IRA, it is taking on Big Pharma and the price of prescription drugs. ** Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! Upcoming Candidate Trainings Wednesday, Sept. 6: 1-2 p.m. ET: So You Want to Run for Office?: Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free virtual live training to help your campaign lay the groundwork to win if you’re thinking of running in 2024! Power to the Polls: An Interactive Event by IDAAC on Sept. 9 Join the Indiana Democratic African-American Caucus (IDAAC) for Power to the Polls, an event featuring food, live music, candidate meet and greets, and more. There’s no shortage of great candidates running this year to meet. This is a fun family event, so please bring along any friends, family, or colleagues who may be interested in getting involved. This event will take place on Saturday, Sept. 9 from 12- 3PM ET. name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: If this is true, he needs to be impeached

body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Fellow American,

There are bank records showing that the Biden family and associates took MILLIONS of dollars from corrupt officials in foreign governments (Russia, Ukraine, and Kazakhstan) during Joe Biden’s time as the United States’ vice president.

**_These allegations are serious, and they deserve to be investigated._** However, so long as Joe Biden and his allies run the Justice Department, there aren’t going to be any investigations into the president’s business dealings.

My colleagues in the House, James Comer, and Jim Jordan, have uncovered mounds upon mounds of records, bank statements, and emails that provide more than enough evidence of wrongdoing to open such proceedings.

I want to know where YOU stand, Fellow American. [**Do you believe we have enough evidence on Joe Biden’s corrupt business dealings to open impeachment proceedings?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f52a63ce2ac048bf8ea76f98c3f843f8&_e=ECJQqPZ1zUNm58QDwNDDzmIK-t3D6dQsvViVe30vVeUfCJaGqTbcEUXOnbxlFK6YVRhMaeIL2cM-FI-IJ5t62fudpPstIbbTVWImI9U9tIw3LP0HXzpirq5rVcA0gOZZqA0QOulfFaT2Mq3x2AVVU-uZDijacrVYEO28JSQwCSo9fxdbXJWcYUTagAqmn60bthmDzNLzp84OWPMyHrvrI_fhB3CdKnkJ5ZDxHuG_uVn9NSN1qTegqCBtSkA2MwDYfKxhT-kMYjNfa9E-NnLgPFuD3AS99hfSwx9jAsRgH-eRkfwyxo4XBrw4j3bRU89rDSjlQO9hiNA9aZBAGfLHFuR9gdv8NW5H78Bck4aC0iWBzdIIKXi87Gv30Ch9doaX4wAF4o4kxgVsiDtmttbasmWxeQI0RiHrPpya32R7duZnC8qFioQ3dgBXgE4aWjPPmLMOwMGG8sAKg7mXKzwxtw%3D%3D)

[**YES**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f52a63ce2ac048bf8ea76f98c3f843f8&_e=ECJQqPZ1zUNm58QDwNDDzmIK-t3D6dQsvViVe30vVeUfCJaGqTbcEUXOnbxlFK6YVRhMaeIL2cM-FI-IJ5t62fudpPstIbbTVWImI9U9tIw3LP0HXzpirq5rVcA0gOZZqA0QOulfFaT2Mq3x2AVVU-uZDijacrVYEO28JSQwCSo9fxdbXJWcYUTagAqmn60bthmDzNLzp84OWPMyHrvrI_fhB3CdKnkJ5ZDxHuG_uVn9NSN1qTegqCBtSkA2MwDYfKxhT-kMYjNfa9E-NnLgPFuD3AS99hfSwx9jAsRgH-dI7IJ-rAor6Pj8LRAvjTeFmyzYwrmIYg3eEZ9OkXhAO1YnzC7KrSL5WSz_1MlwdTyhMdn40j9gV0eoSjEjxI2_6j1DifhDlE_4c73W_BBIZiujf_yLUikhaGSbj4vUrP1siJvus2zv3qu14DqZgTSXGa7TCoSr0qGmhyT1EyJ0ww%3D%3D)
[**NO**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f52a63ce2ac048bf8ea76f98c3f843f8&_e=ECJQqPZ1zUNm58QDwNDDzmIK-t3D6dQsvViVe30vVeUfCJaGqTbcEUXOnbxlFK6YVRhMaeIL2cM-FI-IJ5t62fudpPstIbbTVWImI9U9tIw3LP0HXzpirq5rVcA0gOZZqA0QOulfFaT2Mq3x2AVVU-uZDijacrVYEO28JSQwCSo9fxdbXJWcYUTagAqmn60bthmDzNLzp84OWPMyHrvrI_fhB3CdKnkJ5ZDxHuG_uVn9NSN1qTegqCBtSkA2MwDYfKxhT-kMYjNfa9E-NnLgPFuD3AS99hfSwx9jAsRgH-dU1TZySuL4BGrUeNij7o3e6EceAywCOnGbQWsI2Hgvq5k1nrtwG0rNhhe4R1DqItG01cdGsnJNmI8W524T1c7oBjkNVZJz3mt2bKZjodc71BB6kfVxjUQP76BAbyIig-HYB3G-TI1qrMgHTs75aspIYxXcmPQLWcpFQpD03VqRXA%3D%3D)
If these allegations are true, this is corruption at the highest levels of government.

**_Thanks for taking the time to let me know where you stand today._**

For Liberty,

name: Ro Khanna
subject: The heart and soul behind the screen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

As Americans prepare to soak up the last of summer this Labor Day weekend, I want to take a moment to remember why we celebrate.

I recently had the honor of standing on the picket line with writers and actors in New York City in their ongoing battle against Hollywood’s biggest media companies. These are the people who have entertained and moved us, the heart and soul of the industry, and all they’re asking for is a small share in the success they’ve created. Yet these major corporations refuse to negotiate with the WGA and SAG-AFTRA in good faith, choosing instead to wait striking workers out until they can no longer afford to stop working.

Sign if you agree: Hollywood executives must engage in good-faith negotiations with the writers and actors that make their work possible. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition?contactdata=N7NYpbs5Md6pgODPV9a4qr4Kny1jEKzhXtrqvD2bsrv/BRoll2ztBT9l+VV6gLM0ILIp5+bJW7tUyVxHAwzEd0dmPLlZdrkfRcZllb/9Ur4lCL7OPM8QuIlWK1bcMHp5L+rK+zq5z0JOU4gJjK21Ew==]

WATCH: Standing in Solidarity with Writers and Actors [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H7fGN1Ct1sI]

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H7fGN1Ct1sI [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H7fGN1Ct1sI]

With the advent of streaming services, major media outlets are finding new ways to exploit writers and actors by failing to compensate them for the residuals [https://fortune.com/2023/07/19/what-are-residuals-hollywood-writers-actors-strike-streaming/] created by streaming their work. Meanwhile, the rise of artificial intelligence puts creatives at risk of losing their jobs in what is a fundamentally human industry.

Striking writers and actors, the forces behind Hollywood for generations, are not asking for a lot. They seek only dignity and respect in the form of fair compensation and job security, and what they’re fighting for reflects a greater pattern in the modern labor movement.

Right now, workers across the country are standing up for their right to better wages, better working conditions, and a seat at the table. Employees at Starbucks, Trader Joe’s, UPS, and elsewhere are making their voices heard and highlighting the value they bring to the companies that have exploited them. And they’re winning despite the efforts of powerful corporations to prevent changes affecting their bottom line.

Now it’s Hollywood’s turn. Tell the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers: Listen to the Demands of the WGA and SAG-AFTRA. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition?contactdata=N7NYpbs5Md6pgODPV9a4qr4Kny1jEKzhXtrqvD2bsrv/BRoll2ztBT9l+VV6gLM0ILIp5+bJW7tUyVxHAwzEd0dmPLlZdrkfRcZllb/9Ur4lCL7OPM8QuIlWK1bcMHp5L+rK+zq5z0JOU4gJjK21Ew==]

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230901-labor-day-wga-sag-aftra-strike]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/cIVR7XfUT02sRbeEdob-Og2?unsubscribedata=920NG2yv3wQj7hmFMtcM%2BgYiuASvK%2BNxSyRHa8YZfxixLmtwLuqx1wSy7jst9vZKwQ1pF8mLrIw%2F%2FyfCcaz7bhn5w38Qc%2FnKCby6KtND1IxEmCW5Om%2FBLnTzClauIYO6XG2mwoAX%2BvxIMSk88WBf%2F%2BUbZLXh4P1VInrE5fgoCPrMJZ86f2rFtHRdpnKE5IxhvfCc1qBWGJdZsPEGtS7W9KKyO7R0LElFv%2BaDxQcjYD461A9ZTWNOHtxTRMzYG%2By2UlecxB9ioIRJXpT%2FUWUJmjKFpOXf8S4%2BtnR%2Fn1YpNE54QwYS67%2BLyQoyka2qaJBLQtv4SzutE%2BQhc%2BAl8LFRemyvyAG1ylUT0X0Z6e1rc%2BCAzROdIURcZfO%2Fa1cCLZctmd69CATrwmYDR1oXm8VDZUgagc9z1fvYhCP2PgGzwclnzVYBtvx2L7bvs7gCWqd7 .

| The Washington State Republican Party has officially endorsed the 6 initiatives being sponsored this year by _Let's Go Washington._ All **6 initiatives will be available for you to sign** at the State Fairs, whether you go to or Puyallup or Monroe.

**Washington State Fair in Puyallup (September 1 - 24)**
Look for the Pierce County Republican Party booth in the NW corner of the 'Showplex Building'.

**Evergreen State Fair in Monroe (Aug 31 \- Sept 4)**
Look for the Snohomish County Republican Party booth located in 'Building 604'.

If you have Democrat legislators representing you in Olympia, signing these initiatives is a great way to send a strong message that you’re fed up with their failed policies. We need to **fix what's broken now!** Sign the initiatives, get involved, get others to join you, and in 15 months we will elect more Republicans to replace those Democrats and we will **bring common sense back to our state**.

**Initiatives **
I-2113 > Reasonable Police Pursuit
I-2117 > Stop the Hidden Gas Tax
I-2124 > Opt Out of State-Run Long Term Care Coverage Act
I-2109 > Repeal the Capital Gains Tax
I-2111 > No State Income Tax
I-2081 > Parental Notification
**_Upcoming Local Republican Events Below_**

Peter,_I have some concerning news..._
**We fell short of our $65,000 end-of-month fundraising goal**
_Last cycle our far-left opponent outmatched us dollar-for-dollar.
_
_**And just remember – Democrat PACs have pledged to spend millions to unseat me...
**_
There’s no way to sugarcoat this.

If I’m going to stand a chance at keeping this seat next November we have to pick up the pace on our fundraising.

_That all starts right now –_ _our_ __**August End-of-Month Deadline**__ _has been extended by 1 MORE DAY.
_
The end of Q3 is right around the corner - We have to finish strong if we want to stay ahead of our opponent.

_**It’s simple Peter: Whoever raises the most money, usually wins.
**_
Last cycle we got lucky - we can’t let that happen ever again.

So if we relax for just one week, we risk not being able to combat the millions being spent against me – and if I lose, Republicans will almost certainly lose control of the House as well.

Don’t let me down,

clean_body: | | | | Are you willing to take that chance again? I’m not... Peter,I have some concerning news... We fell short of our $65,000 end-of-month fundraising goal Last cycle our far-left opponent outmatched us dollar-for-dollar. And just remember – Democrat PACs have pledged to spend millions to unseat me... There’s no way to sugarcoat this. If I’m going to stand a chance at keeping this seat next November we have to pick up the pace on our fundraising. That all starts right now – our August End-of-Month Deadline has been extended by 1 MORE DAY. The end of Q3 is right around the corner - We have to finish strong if we want to stay ahead of our opponent. | | | It’s simple Peter: Whoever raises the most money, usually wins. Last cycle we got lucky - we can’t let that happen ever again. So if we relax for just one week, we risk not being able to combat the millions being spent against me – and if I lose, Republicans will almost certainly lose control of the House as well. Don’t let me down, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

body:
| | Peter – Last night marked the end of another month for this campaign, and I want to thank you for your unwavering support.

So many of you joined this campaign on Day 1, building a team that is ready to challenge the political status quo. I’m working every day to bring my years of frontline experience to Washington to create life-saving change, but this effort is not possible without your support.

From our launch to every fundraising deadline, I couldn’t be more proud to have you by my side.

Together, we can make history by electing the first trauma surgeon to Congress. Thank you for standing with me in this effort.

– Brian

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action, CHC Bold PAC, New Dems Action Fund, Dems Serve, IBEW, Voter Protection Project, JStreet, and over 40 local elected officials.

subject: Minivan tour pics 🚙☀️

body:
Derek, we put a lot of miles on the minivan this August!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29161%2E3422442%2E5Az5c_)
Derek, we put a lot of miles on the minivan this August! From meeting with SEIU members in San Diego, to hosting meet-and-greets in Northern California, it was a busy month connecting with voters up and down the state. And while on the minivan tour, my kids and I found a little time to enjoy Sequoia and Kings Canyon National Parks.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230901-1?refcode=EMAL01_1_TRAV_20230901_V1_F&refcode2=29161_3422442_5Az5c_&akid=29161%2E3422442%2E5Az5c_)
Thank you to all of the supporters who made our August campaign events possible.
Onward!
Katie

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I’m so grateful for this community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This morning, I woke up with a feeling of immense gratitude for all of you who are a part of this progressive movement.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)

This morning, I woke up with a feeling of immense gratitude for all of you who are a part of this progressive movement.
Because of the outpouring support of so many people in this grassroots community, we were able to reach our August fundraising goals.
When I was a young child, I was a refugee. My family was forced to escape civil war in Somalia and took sanctuary in a Kenyan refugee camp for four years.
If you had told me back then that I would someday be a member of Congress in the United States — nevermind become the first African-born member of Congress — I wouldn’t have believed it.
But here I am today, fighting for progressive change with the greatest community of supporters helping to build this people-powered movement every step of the way.
I am so grateful for your trust and support.
We still have so much work to do, but I am confident that with people like you on my team, we will be able to create a better and more just future for all in our nation.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
Before you go...
**[If you didn’t have a chance to make a contribution to Ilhan Omar last month, we hope you’ll consider making a donation today. We have an important FEC deadline at the end of September, and it is going to take all of us chipping in what we can, whenever we can, to keep fighting for the progressive values we believe in.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230901-2-t2&t=3&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23.SIEpKD&refcode=em230901-2-t2&t=4&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=505_791427_N6aFKB&akid=505%2E791427%2EN6aFKB)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Our average donation is WHAT?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our movement of thousands of people is undeniably grassroots.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20230901-8541-header&t=1&akid=8541%2E434096%2El7NB4y)
We’ll keep this simple, Derek — THANK YOU.
With your help we were able to reach our August fundraising goal and continue running this people-powered campaign to support John’s work in Washington.
With an average donation of **just $13.87 this year** , our movement of thousands of people is undeniably grassroots. It’s how John is able to take $0 from corporate PACs and focus his effort on fighting for the working people of Pennsylvania.
So thank you, Derek. We’re glad you’re on this team!
💛 Team Fetterman

name: Liz
subject: can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/MYVOZ4KcDEWY9i98RJm9xg2?unsubscribedata=bNXDNSJlxKlCaFeKq8WPBgSc2jtaxwTRp%2F1%2BSRj3S9YhQPJJxfN2xfd4kgfJ36czh0Ott2AwE8WZ850aWEQ7k3AeELC6KV7ptOS5Zu%2Fc5o%2FfF94QH%2FYFv1KVcb95JU0zbyFB4SQaK4L8WkE15fa8FHlu%2FxUZLz8SiecPYlC4rdCiDmchqKqGdDqXl3x5R2AtLPJy7QNk5%2BbzP2Xg%2FS8J5UdCaqJ4cBZa%2BheTCnZuHQSzVNMNtkv%2Bwn7hveNCVWhy%2FyG2k7GXETxxw2Xkn8ehw18Uu7e9YnhCr%2F%2B8KQFiXEoWJCW2bgnz8Q6%2BjkusSUwcUkRM4p1qwTZlZ9eU6vGDFUw9TR%2Fqq0fbQgIG7cCznBdHDc8uXTZ6FtZ9Ns%2BlML1KCqMzgVm16W92mUUSL74V5lZdbN17t6TLAP8tpT2ar5FB1ZDlXRWbKV33o3twCIaN)

Peter,

I know you’ve been hearing from us a lot lately, but let me just thank you for your support last month, and over the past few months as we build up this campaign.

Like you are, I’m sick and tired of leadership that prioritizes political games over the people of this district. I’m not a career politician, but a mother who knows what’s at stake for our families across the district. That’s why I raised my hand to run to protect our rights from extremism and actually put in the work for NY-17.

Lawler has made it clear that he doesn’t want to face me in the general election because I’m not only a woman who has been impacted by his failed leadership – but a woman who knows how to fix it. Now, let’s make sure together that Lawler is a one-term Congressman.

**This fight wouldn’t be possible without you, Peter, and I can’t thank you enough for your constant support.**

Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom with a lifelong commitment to public service. Liz served on her local school board overseeing over a $100 million budget, working to improve school facilities and finding common ground to get things done for our kids. **Liz is running for Congress to make the Hudson Valley more affordable, help small businesses thrive, and always fight for women’s rights.**

name: Emily Busch
subject: Ahhh fall!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter! It’s now officially September, and I couldn’t be more excited for a Michigan fall! There’s nothing I love more than driving through the mitten state and watching all the leaves change color, going to a Lions game, or even an MSU or U of M game! And of course, who could forget about visiting some of the many delicious cider mills across the state?! Donuts and hot cider? body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69063492/424996520/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTczZGYzMmItMDI0OS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GtvjNRyhpvhpevSk9SR2NekXHxYBtvZJETyTQ-pFL7A=)
Friend,

Before we break for the holiday weekend, I wanted to take a moment to say **thank you** for your generous support for my campaign, _and for all the heartfelt birthday messages!_

With your support, our campaign met -- _then narrowly exceeded_ \-- our August fundraising goal. That was the jolt of momentum we needed to close out the summer months. Thanks to you, we’re one step closer to our ultimate goal of unseating David Schweikert and giving AZ-01 the local leadership it deserves.

I’m looking forward to a relaxing weekend, but come Tuesday I’m ready to move full steam ahead into September. The end of this month marks our next FEC reporting deadline, and we have a calendar packed with events and campaign stops.

It’s been the honor of a lifetime to run for Congress in this district I call home. I look forward to meeting more voters in the months ahead, and hopefully we get the chance to meet too, friend!

Again, thank you for standing strong with our campaign. It’s credit to you that our momentum keeps building.

Have a safe and restful Labor Day weekend.

With thanks,

Marlene

name: =?utf-8?q?Trump_Trial_Alert_=E2=9A=96=EF=B8=8F_=28via_Courier_Newsroom=29?=
subject: Sign the petition: ✍️Televise Trump’s trials
body:
For the sake of transparency and fairness, we think so.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1493%2E120351%2Eg3khOA)
This week, it was announced that the first of Donald Trump's pending criminal trials will begin on March 4th, 2024, for his alleged actions in attempting to overturn the 2020 election.
Trial dates have additionally been set for March 24th and May 20th over Trump’s purported hush money payments to adult film actor Stormi Daniels and for Special Counsel Jack Smith’s case for Trump’s alleged mishandling of classified documents.
Peter, we know that Trump and his allies at Fox News and other conservative-friendly outlets are going to do everything they can to push out a steady stream of disinformation in a blatant attempt to undermine the judicial system and the criminal cases against him.
But there’s one solution that would cut through the right-wing’s lies and false spins and give the public a transparent look into an unprecedented criminal trial — _televising Trump’s trials live._
**[Peter, if you agree that Trump's trials should be televised, can you take a moment and add your name to our petition?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230901&t=2&akid=1493%2E120351%2Eg3khOA)
We’re not the only ones calling for Trump’s trials to be televised. Earlier this month, a group of 38 House members sent a letter asking for an exception to be made to both the D.C.-based 2020 election case and Florida-based case involving Trump’s improper handling of classified documents given the extraordinary importance to our democratic institutions and the need for transparency.
Currently, cameras are not allowed in federal courtrooms or in New York state courtrooms, where Trump’s hush money payment trial is taking place. Georgia is a different story however — earlier this week, Fulton County Superior Court Judge Scott McAfee granted a request from four local Atlanta news stations to allow cameras in the courtroom.
**For the sake of transparency and for our democracy, Trump’s trials must be televised in full to allow the public to witness these historic proceedings.** This will not only serve to uphold the rule of law but also reaffirm faith in the process of finding out the truth.
The dangers of choosing not to televise these trials cannot be understated, Peter. Outlets like Fox News and bad actors like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson are engines of misinformation for right-wing propaganda and we cannot allow their narratives to become dominant.
At a moment when our democracy’s future is at stake, we must fight to demand the truth.
**[You can join us in our demand for transparency by signing our petition to have Trump's trials televised:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230901&t=3&akid=1493%2E120351%2Eg3khOA)
**[Sign the petition ➡️](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230901&t=4&akid=1493%2E120351%2Eg3khOA)**
Thank you for taking action today.
More to come,
— Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1493&t=5&refcode2=1493_120351_g3khOA&akid=1493%2E120351%2Eg3khOA)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1493%2E120351%2Eg3khOA)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

subject: Solidarity forever ✊

body:
🇺🇸 It's almost Labor Weekend, folks! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69063836/424996792/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230901_fr_laborday_cand_kw_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTAzMzQ1MS0wMjQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n4qgwO2BDn4NxrlI9pktbmw300USTdV5vw3xNAnz_s=)
