🇺🇸 It's almost Labor Weekend, folks! While it might mark the end of summer for some – there's no denying #HotLaborSummer is still on and will become #HotLaborFall very soon. **This Labor Day feels like one of the first in decades where organized labor is top of mind for everyone in the country.** Whether it's:
* Historic union drives at Amazon and Starbucks,
* Over 340,000 UPS teamsters winning a historic contract that raises wages across the board,
* American Airline pilots ratifying a contract that guarantees them more than $9 billion (with a B!) in increased wages and benefits,
* UAW and airline attendants voting overwhelmingly to authorize a strike as they bargain with powerful industries,
* Writers and actors in film and TV on historic simultaneous strikes to win a living wage, or
* The National Labor Relations Board issuing a new guideline that says any company that union busts during an election will be forced to automatically recognize their union

... the labor movement is on the rise, **and I stand in solidarity with all workers who are demanding to be treated with dignity and paid fair wages.** **It's why I'm not taking a single cent from corporate PACs – and I'm the only candidate in PA-01 who's made that commitment.** We need pro-union, pro-worker leaders in Congress who aren’t afraid to stand up for workers' rights. Whether in Congress or at the picket line, I will always fight for the workers’ right to form a union and collectively bargain in their workplace. ✊ Have a great Labor Day Weekend. Solidarity forever, Ashley Ehasz 🚁 [**P.S. It might go without saying, but not taking any money from corporate PACs means I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to fuel this campaign. If you can, please pitch in whatever you can – this is a campaign of, by, and for workers!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69063837/424996793/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230901_fr_laborday_cand_kw_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTAzMzQ1MS0wMjQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6n4qgwO2BDn4NxrlI9pktbmw300USTdV5vw3xNAnz_s=) | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

clean_body: 🇺🇸 It's almost Labor Weekend, folks! | = 🇺🇸 It's almost Labor Weekend, folks! While it might mark the end of summer for some – there's no denying #HotLaborSummer is still on and will become #HotLaborFall very soon. This Labor Day feels like one of the first in decades where organized labor is top of mind for everyone in the country. Whether it's: Historic union drives at Amazon and Starbucks, Over 340,000 UPS teamsters winning a historic contract that raises wages across the board, American Airline pilots ratifying a contract that guarantees them more than $9 billion (with a B!) in increased wages and benefits, UAW and airline attendants voting overwhelmingly to authorize a strike as they bargain with powerful industries, Writers and actors in film and TV on historic simultaneous strikes to win a living wage, or The National Labor Relations Board issuing a new guideline that says any company that union busts during an election will be forced to automatically recognize their union ... the labor movement is on the rise, and I stand in solidarity with all workers who are demanding to be treated with dignity and paid fair wages. It's why I'm not taking a single cent from corporate PACs – and I'm the only candidate in PA-01 who's made that commitment. We need pro-union, pro-worker leaders in Congress who aren’t afraid to stand up for workers' rights. Whether in Congress or at the picket line, I will always fight for the workers’ right to form a union and collectively bargain in their workplace. ✊ Have a great Labor Day Weekend. Solidarity forever, Ashley Ehasz 🚁 = | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Look, I’m **not** running for President, friend, I’m running for Governor of the great state of North Carolina. But it needs to be said... The first Republican Presidential debate was a huge swing and a miss. This is coming from a place of tough love: we **MUST** hold our party and our country to a higher standard. Inflation has **consistently** polled as **THE TOP ISSUE** for Republicans, and if you blinked, you would’ve missed any mention of it during the debate. I’ve had **ENOUGH** of the government taxing American families to the bone and destroying the value of our dollar through inflationary policies. **That’s why, as your next Governor of North Carolina, ABOLISHING the state income tax will be MY TOP ISSUE.** [**Will you join my campaign to make North Carolina the happiest, healthiest, and wealthiest it’s ever been? # Republicans Impeaching Joe Biden — Is It Worth It?
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=118a342c1c&e=f6564bbe3b)
As Republicans hold a razor-thin majority in the house, Speaker Kevin McCarthy initiates a GOP-led impeachment strategy for Joe Biden. But is this the right move at the right time? I break down the timeline of corruption that has built the Republicans’ case and outlines the potential ramifications a move such as this could have on the House, the Senate, and the White House leading up to a critical election. Plus, Trump weighs in on "Crooked Joe Biden."

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Fox News & Lauren Boebert attacked my family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69065169/424998176/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZhZTUzMC0wMzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQnbFhs1aVm4P1xdU3hFJ1T4L6j-VoQBuOM-i8iSrP0=&emci=d12f9613-0249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=32fae530-0349-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69065172/424998177/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZhZTUzMC0wMzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQnbFhs1aVm4P1xdU3hFJ1T4L6j-VoQBuOM-i8iSrP0=&emci=d12f9613-0249-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=32fae530-0349-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If Lauren Boebert wants to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how she supports big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how Boebert supports a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how Lauren Boebert is so extreme, she even wants to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about Lauren Boebert’s fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**Lauren Boebert is scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating her and ending her political career once and for all. I’m ready to finish the job in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69065178/424998178/1610638071?refcode=em20230901pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=32fae530-0349-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZhZTUzMC0wMzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQnbFhs1aVm4P1xdU3hFJ1T4L6j-VoQBuOM-i8iSrP0=)

| **[Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69065192/424998184/1610638071?refcode=em20230901pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=32fae530-0349-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmZhZTUzMC0wMzQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQnbFhs1aVm4P1xdU3hFJ1T4L6j-VoQBuOM-i8iSrP0=)**

I knew this campaign was going to get nasty, but I never expected it this early – or for Lauren Boebert to go after my family.
Thank you for being on this journey with me, through thick and thin.
With gratitude -
Adam
P.S. I love you, Dad and little sis.

It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions. But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado. If Lauren Boebert wants to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support freedom and liberty – and how she supports big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how Boebert supports a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how Lauren Boebert is so extreme, she even wants to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades. I am willing to talk all day about Lauren Boebert’s fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. But what I won’t accept is Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister. I am incredibly proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose. Lauren Boebert is scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating her and ending her political career once and for all. I’m ready to finish the job in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I knew this campaign was going to get nasty, but I never expected it this early – or for Lauren Boebert to go after my family. Thank you for being on this journey with me, through thick and thin. With gratitude - Adam P.S. I love you, Dad and little sis. ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Hi there!
I don’t think we’ve met yet. My name is Sarah Gutierrez – I’m Roland’s wife and the mother of our amazing two daughters, Izabella and Victoria.
Roland would never say it, so I will: He’s the greatest husband and father to our family. Even when he’s busy fighting Republicans in the Texas Senate or traveling across the state to hear the voices of all Texans, he still makes it a priority to be a part of our daily family activities.
Today is Roland’s birthday – and I want to do something special for him. Will you sign Roland’s birthday card? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/g-dc_GDFtki0aOzsbfuTCg2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/g-dc_GDFtki0aOzsbfuTCg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/g-dc_GDFtki0aOzsbfuTCg2]
As you know, Roland represents Uvalde in the Texas State Senate. After tragedy struck Uvalde on May 24th, I’ve watched in awe at his dedication for their community. I’ve watched him speak honestly about the needs of his constituents, and I have never been more proud of him as a father, husband, and Texas Senator.
He’s a great man, and he will make a great U.S. Senator with your help.
Thanks for reading,
—Sarah ❤️🫶🏼

Peter, We just finished crunching the numbers and I wanted you to hear it from me first: We hit our August fundraising goal! That was only possible because of your generosity, so **thank you.** We know that a flood of emails around fundraising deadlines can be overwhelming. That’s why we’re so grateful to have your support — whether you chipped in or just opened an email like this one, it really helps us out. But the work is far from over. We’re still in the fight to defend our frontline Congresswomen and win back the House majority. Now we’re just getting started on our new monthly fundraising goal, and we’re anticipating a slower September. clean_body: | = Peter, We just finished crunching the numbers and I wanted you to hear it from me first: We hit our August fundraising goal! That was only possible because of your generosity, so thank you. We know that a flood of emails around fundraising deadlines can be overwhelming. That’s why we’re so grateful to have your support — whether you chipped in or just opened an email like this one, it really helps us out. But the work is far from over. We’re still in the fight to defend our frontline Congresswomen and win back the House majority. Now we’re just getting started on our new monthly fundraising goal, and we’re anticipating a slower September. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your help, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: There’s no debate: Bold action to prevent gun violence cannot wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It shouldn’t be easier to buy an assault weapon than buy tickets to a movie or a concert.
#
_Content Warning: This email discusses the topic of gun violence. Please read with discretion._
Peter,
Last week, in Jacksonville, FL, a gunman took the lives of three Black people in a racist, white supremacist attack.
This event was enabled by Florida's weak gun laws and amplified by its governor's hateful rhetoric and attack on marginalized communities. And now yet another community must heal, rehabilitate, and rebuild its sense of safety.
Peter, the best time to take action against gun violence was yesterday. **The second best time is right now.[Add your name to our petition to urge Congress to pass comprehensive common sense gun laws to keep our communities safe. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/common_sense_gun_laws_petition/?source=em20230901-2877&t=1&akid=2877%2E420207%2E_6pUh0)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/common_sense_gun_laws_petition/?source=em20230901-2877&t=2&akid=2877%2E420207%2E_6pUh0)**
Gun violence is an epidemic — and communities across the country are begging for our help. Instead, MAGA Republicans are loosening gun laws and endangering our communities.
Make no mistake: Extremist rhetoric from the far-right is fueling violent attacks like the shooting in Jacksonville this weekend. Florida's lax gun laws only make it that much easier for violent individuals to arm themselves and cause harm.
It shouldn't be easier to buy an assault weapon than buy tickets to a movie or a concert, Peter. And by putting pressure on those with the power and moral obligation to protect the people, we can work to ensure events like Jacksonville never happens again.
There's no debate: Bold action to prevent gun violence cannot wait. **[Add your name to our petition and urge Congress to pass common sense gun laws, ban assault weapons, and ensure the safety of our communities and our futures.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/common_sense_gun_laws_petition/?source=em20230901-2877&t=3&akid=2877%2E420207%2E_6pUh0)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230901-2877-footer&t=4&refcode2=2877_420207__6pUh0&akid=2877%2E420207%2E_6pUh0)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: The heart and soul behind the screen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

As Americans prepare to soak up the last of summer this Labor Day weekend, I want to take a moment to remember why we celebrate.

I recently had the honor of standing on the picket line with writers and actors in New York City in their ongoing battle against Hollywood’s biggest media companies. These are the people who have entertained and moved us, the heart and soul of the industry, and all they’re asking for is a small share in the success they’ve created. Yet these major corporations refuse to negotiate with the WGA and SAG-AFTRA in good faith, choosing instead to wait striking workers out until they can no longer afford to stop working.

Sign if you agree: Hollywood executives must engage in good-faith negotiations with the writers and actors that make their work possible. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition?contactdata=xV0O+MvY9Ajct+1o2XNTKmg7+KRk0RPQkfep5ge8dB+wieORDem/wX/sntS8O24m8k6H+YATVuJL4s0t0hoF3WrJhLl7pVOnGBNUKVMRhFmmevuqhFGli7boTdNdiOmwnoDmuwMVcAYTuJq00RpA2A==]

WATCH: Standing in Solidarity with Writers and Actors [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H7fGN1Ct1sI]

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H7fGN1Ct1sI [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H7fGN1Ct1sI]

With the advent of streaming services, major media outlets are finding new ways to exploit writers and actors by failing to compensate them for the residuals [https://fortune.com/2023/07/19/what-are-residuals-hollywood-writers-actors-strike-streaming/] created by streaming their work. Meanwhile, the rise of artificial intelligence puts creatives at risk of losing their jobs in what is a fundamentally human industry.

Striking writers and actors, the forces behind Hollywood for generations, are not asking for a lot. They seek only dignity and respect in the form of fair compensation and job security, and what they’re fighting for reflects a greater pattern in the modern labor movement.

Right now, workers across the country are standing up for their right to better wages, better working conditions, and a seat at the table. Employees at Starbucks, Trader Joe’s, UPS, and elsewhere are making their voices heard and highlighting the value they bring to the companies that have exploited them. And they’re winning despite the efforts of powerful corporations to prevent changes affecting their bottom line.

Now it’s Hollywood’s turn. Tell the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers: Listen to the Demands of the WGA and SAG-AFTRA. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition?contactdata=xV0O+MvY9Ajct+1o2XNTKmg7+KRk0RPQkfep5ge8dB+wieORDem/wX/sntS8O24m8k6H+YATVuJL4s0t0hoF3WrJhLl7pVOnGBNUKVMRhFmmevuqhFGli7boTdNdiOmwnoDmuwMVcAYTuJq00RpA2A==]

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230901-labor-day-wga-sag-aftra-strike-welcome-sublist-opens-june-present]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/cIVR7XfUT02sRbeEdob-Og2?unsubscribedata=VetLiq59Yi3mm7N612BQvuhyGhv1Q76HfDO4mRnctUYTa6yD%2FOPzWlJKmt0cJqG8HOlPNl79msstW36LfuX80kJ09EMrBWDyUM9zZTCEeN5Uu%2F6pR66twP1A3Da9Lc5LNvbQGsAE1e6XBJZW5XGr2i%2B%2BiDkUHN5sPozNumZVEzkGnFQ6hFYPUF0Rmhj4zNJRQdqUvSuR9XWqNn%2FuP6pg6GJOYGpLyoWs78o7d%2BG2k0rB96h8Qj%2FgJENf8hHZaM6R5VBDhgGMwBs2%2BcbhtRhLxCR4zPcKF8Tlhf7n2mdFoeznvKNDV4t33Ww2r9FZgTMXnzYXaxwwzDjw2ztJqYrDb4gtnHT%2BTTgmWKfTveVIaOh307dBcX5r41kJw1h3rg%2FQlFO2OOYpKUA7rMzc5%2FS1cOQDaOlawFs5fe8SdOFLTCrd0hgSJYbxsa1PP8mt%2Ff9L .

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: 1,000 Times Over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I’d do it again and again. For this country. For you. | | |
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2edfa662a9f94e2c83b313bf60b7a652&_e=e-HBpl5xs4u50bMKeHVh9EuO9kg8ytVDdWaajpklqWDSjnAxPFg88U6KnknzukV-6GB2fwrVEQhUNdvoIcrBDB8MK54eBKDXq8qndkIsG-uTpr2rV4CoBuo5CKJbB-V3V8SU27XWbnAzn8ZgPu6grxQRzrOm0L2Kf7MsZZ74IRVL_1eeJfLIYiXnysm8c38xJ6CRT6AGQAQYNNv7jUn-jsaSFKUVcV9U4kZAoVYacx6TnASwFEVZ2b6xCmfldb7SscXSFuYvZQD6ul7oxjBvDue3S-wuhHC6Kc-23Qr0fwIHFbkm0Tb9CbMkUI_mzYVc_275do7g6nA21vzsAeSKj60TNWtiYnnrKkPkujEMExbNh169cdHPHrUlRDh1mWRoqIhxt_Fx7vvSw1LzK14ZtZ9eyx_VauRv_pvu65Gdl6THGcpJwxyG2gVaKBDcPXoggMgAf7_z8bdA704oDgiXPA%3D%3D)
---
When we join the military, we all know the risks we're taking. Friend, this is me in the image below.
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2edfa662a9f94e2c83b313bf60b7a652&_e=e-HBpl5xs4u50bMKeHVh9EuO9kg8ytVDdWaajpklqWDSjnAxPFg88U6KnknzukV-6GB2fwrVEQhUNdvoIcrBDB8MK54eBKDXq8qndkIsG-uTpr2rV4CoBuo5CKJbB-V3V8SU27XWbnAzn8ZgPu6grxQRzrOm0L2Kf7MsZZ74IRVL_1eeJfLIYiXnysm8c38xJ6CRT6AGQAQYNNv7jUn-jsaSFKUVcV9U4kZAoVYacx6TnASwFEVZ2b6xCmfldb7SscXSFuYvZQD6ul7oxjBvDue3S-wuhHC6Kc-23Qr0fwIHFbkm0Tb9CbMkUI_mzYVcla-n_HosM-rE5y2jcRkz1IitWu0W_Cm8BFvulNT22hTa2XFkhWcr6oUEmzYX02Ns9qX3EJz5QfGrNvTpopobbytTXnP-CLawLJy5TgkK5EdQUAapYoEteajq49XsUvyMVVVhZT7HcJDtHBM3KOeX8A%3D%3D)
---
It happened when I was on my way to support another platoon that needed some extra firepower in a nearby engagement zone. My vehicle rolled over a roadside bomb. In the 60 seconds following that explosion my life changed in ways I could have never imagined. I'm not a victim or a hero. I'm just one of many other soldiers who've made a sacrifice for their country. **_And it 's a sacrifice that I'd make a thousand times over for this incredible country._** But I'll be honest with you- the people in charge of our country today are an utter disappointment to me and millions of veterans across the country. Our leaders are taking us in the wrong direction. And the freedom that we fought to defend is under attack from within.

Our country desperately needs new leaders who know what it means to serve, to sacrifice, and to overcome. **[That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2edfa662a9f94e2c83b313bf60b7a652&_e=e-HBpl5xs4u50bMKeHVh9EuO9kg8ytVDdWaajpklqWDSjnAxPFg88U6KnknzukV-6GB2fwrVEQhUNdvoIcrBDB8MK54eBKDXq8qndkIsG-uTpr2rV4CoBuo5CKJbB-V3V8SU27XWbnAzn8ZgPu6grxQRzrOm0L2Kf7MsZZ74IRVL_1eeJfLIYiXnysm8c38xJ6CRT6AGQAQYNNv7jUn-jsaSFKUVcV9U4kZAoVYacx6TnASwFEVZ2b6xCmfldb7SscXSFuYvZQD6ul7oxjBvDue3S-wuhHC6Kc-23Qr0fwIHFbkm0Tb9CbMkUI_mzYVcfYdspnoGt5Miz6Ew9EdNfNkmhyA9pC5WU4IiSAcQgx71xZKh06qNnTpL-Bu7QdhjRfKDZIs0Ma025tdcni5bIyIIezKKJ_hIYBTkOSzuuMKVf10VMOVk1L1oaAbOo0qdn9lc4myZBAApTuPo4JnhhQ%3D%3D)** Friend, do you agree with me that the radical left-wing policies that Joe Biden has pushed on the American people are taking us in the wrong direction? Do you agree with me that America needs leaders who will put their country before themselves? Do you agree with me that America is the greatest country on earth? **[If so, would you consider chipping in anything you can to my campaign for U.S. Senate?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2edfa662a9f94e2c83b313bf60b7a652&_e=e-HBpl5xs4u50bMKeHVh9EuO9kg8ytVDdWaajpklqWDSjnAxPFg88U6KnknzukV-6GB2fwrVEQhUNdvoIcrBDB8MK54eBKDXq8qndkIsG-uTpr2rV4CoBuo5CKJbB-V3V8SU27XWbnAzn8ZgPu6grxQRzrOm0L2Kf7MsZZ74IRVL_1eeJfLIYiXnysm8c38xJ6CRT6AGQAQYNNv7jUn-jsaSFKUVcV9U4kZAoVYacx6TnASwFEVZ2b6xCmfldb7SscXSFuYvZQD6ul7oxjBvDue3S-wuhHC6Kc-23Qr0fwIHFbkm0Tb9CbMkUI_mzYVcqLkPb9eGGYWjFP7kHP0_xtxM8PrbiTTQbwoa6eYt796NDXqYi8NLordiIQygfDddmFtLpYJxGrmjQLMlZxKfKUAOvlIatd6otvE_-hIRIILgAhyE1VyWeW4FH24lFQu-6tgqyYYJc6wdXnhGVDUMjA%3D%3D)** I'm only asking because my seat is going to be the most competitive Senate race in the country. To win- I'll need everyone who agrees with me on those three questions to step up and work as a team to take our country back.

Thank you in advance for helping in any way that you can. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown
---

body:

Hi Derek, Part of what makes our Western PA communities so vibrant is our small businesses. Yet many of these small businesses are getting squeezed by big corporations with junk fees. Small businesses can lose 30-40% of a sale due to junk fees, and consumers are often forced to pay a higher price too. This is just another example of big corporations ripping off the little guy, and it’s time to stand up for small businesses and consumers, and fight back against these corporate jagoffs. That’s exactly what [I’m doing in Congress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69073888/425003038/2046990827?ms=230901_cd_junk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2YyYjQ5ZS0wYTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8zX-27amiog-QS5wkpGfclrvWovuk0FsychJ1BpXb0=&emci=d1832abd-0349-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dcf2b49e-0a49-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894). But without a House majority, the GOP is standing alongside their corporate bosses and friends and against these bills. They’re standing against small businesses, consumers, and the people of Western PA. [_**I will always stand up for the people of Western PA in Congress, Derek. And to put an end to these junk fees and stick it to corporations we’ve got to take back the majority and keep PA-17 blue. The GOP is coming for us, this seat is a top target, and their ultra-wealthy corporate donors don’t like us calling them on their crap. Can you help us get a head start toward our $20,000 September online fundraising goal by making a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69073889/425003039/-1807168276?refcode=230901_cd_junk_l1&ms=230901_cd_junk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2YyYjQ5ZS0wYTQ5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8zX-27amiog-QS5wkpGfclrvWovuk0FsychJ1BpXb0=) name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Endangered monarch caterpillars are losing their only food source
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962437?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT PETITION: Glyphosate, the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup, is wiping out monarch caterpillars’ only food source.**[**Take action now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962438?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Do you remember the classic children’s picture book The Very Hungry Caterpillar? Unlike the fictional character in that story, monarch caterpillars don’t feed on cheese or apples. Their only food source is a plant called milkweed — and it’s being DECIMATED by glyphosate, the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup. Monarch butterflies are ENDANGERED. And without milkweed to reproduce and feed their offspring, they are at even further risk of EXTINCTION. If monarchs are going to have a chance at survival, Bayer-Monsanto must own up to the harms that Roundup poses to pollinators and our planet. But instead, the greedy corporation continues to prioritize profits. _**Friend, will you demand accountability from Bayer-Monsanto and help save the last of the endangered monarch butterfly population before it’s too late?**_[**Add your name now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962439?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962440?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The widespread use of pesticides in our food system has had far-reaching detrimental impacts on monarch butterflies. A recent study found every single sample of milkweed tested was _contaminated with harmful pesticides_ — including _**ONE THIRD**_ with levels that are _**DEADLY**_ to monarchs. **So, while baby monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-covered milkweed, their first meal could be their last.**
It’s not just monarchs that are at risk from glyphosate use either, Friend. Farms and homeowners are currently _SUING_ Bayer-Monsanto due to their _**non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma**_ that’s been linked to the Roundup they’ve used on their farms and lawns. **And the toxic pesticide has also been connected to reproductive harm, gut microbiome disruption, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease! **
Meanwhile, Bayer-Monsanto has avoided accountability. Instead, the powerful pesticide company has made active efforts to COVER UP the dangers of Roundup — manipulating science and evading pesticide regulations! Bayer-Monsanto must answer for its dangerous lies that have put pollinators, people, and the planet at risk. _**Friend, we can’t let Bayer-Monsanto get away with this.**_ [**Can we count on you to speak up today and fight back against the pesticide industry’s corporate greed right now?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962441?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1962440?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for joining the fight to protect pollinators and the planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Will you take a chance?
body:
If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | |
---
| | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=ecb8f0d297a34ba7a668376cc80e7af3&_t=B9IFDc-7bNxlrABSnLzy79Hime0YrVzhjixQabYAuyn5fByq5MeyZ0zAYaKo4adoyZkIseH_MiwL_PDGuJCeDOyOPKqiWkgrj-9lIjBp3U4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=ecb8f0d297a34ba7a668376cc80e7af3&_t=B9IFDc-7bNxlrABSnLzy79Hime0YrVzhjixQabYAuyn5fByq5MeyZ0zAYaKo4adoyZkIseH_MiwL_PDGuJCeDOyOPKqiWkgrj-9lIjBp3U4%3D)

|
Hi Fellow Conservative,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ecb8f0d297a34ba7a668376cc80e7af3&_e=QG_BS64ir02itSQo8sPWQgQtbdgezQ5H0kRUyEzophCtyPQjDVa7U9gC5mVd7XK4jbZPwDtTrJ4XvCYy-nUy8Hr-Mm5GoHX-DaUDi8OIUGTCFZQaebo2Md6McKBGCT9aT2fZyBd4dNupIT-5TtTH-tED_K86UR0tVyLp0zL4O_4gReOgj214X80lt-7e_cnHPID_67VWEKiww0J0DRbIZ7_djyvKFT0TQZ5nCBBvx_ht8RdHw9GrgJr-cp7GzqPuTUVy1dtYHzspwWFi1zrclXuj_wwbL2YR8x127pykLE2i1nRXkN3BahTiOU4j9rFLaSdRe3wXA-8bHlTor1csSlE5AHbhZgb8B_PRptufE5w3G7FUfB7jXOz0be-nEKnm "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ecb8f0d297a34ba7a668376cc80e7af3&_e=QG_BS64ir02itSQo8sPWQgQtbdgezQ5H0kRUyEzophCtyPQjDVa7U9gC5mVd7XK4jbZPwDtTrJ4XvCYy-nUy8Hr-Mm5GoHX-DaUDi8OIUGTCFZQaebo2Md6McKBGCT9aT2fZyBd4dNupIT-5TtTH-tED_K86UR0tVyLp0zL4O_4gReOgj214X80lt-7e_cnHPID_67VWEKiww0J0DRbIZ7_djyvKFT0TQZ5nCBBvx_hJNI4xcFl0SMyePl9hvq7VMSr4bQhe8egPyYFJKJejZkjMDuKIHVuLYT-whtGvY0JwQetuk0TiCBwvAhbbBH3vCa6CGT0RnX0T54tdRSr1WDLgiNEvMf1NvDxA5zRyQS-Ms-w1CACzDwskvnx922wY)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ecb8f0d297a34ba7a668376cc80e7af3&_e=QG_BS64ir02itSQo8sPWQgQtbdgezQ5H0kRUyEzophCtyPQjDVa7U9gC5mVd7XK4jbZPwDtTrJ4XvCYy-nUy8Hr-Mm5GoHX-DaUDi8OIUGTCFZQaebo2Md6McKBGCT9aT2fZyBd4dNupIT-5TtTH-tED_K86UR0tVyLp0zL4O_4gReOgj214X80lt-7e_cnHPID_67VWEKiww0J0DRbIZ7_djyvKFT0TQZ5nCBBvx_jDCxnNmYdtyB1lQce-BkHOHteQ_b-TWjcxeXBoXA00C5KBXjI52B3qA5kwqxZCpm_aK3lW-bfZffwu4VGNlynr3MRvdVC8fxlMq5Qr2DCjTnlVEwsASw9glUKLs64W2H2-Kwuv2RUfvA_SXfR7samL)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ecb8f0d297a34ba7a668376cc80e7af3&_e=QG_BS64ir02itSQo8sPWQgQtbdgezQ5H0kRUyEzophCtyPQjDVa7U9gC5mVd7XK4jbZPwDtTrJ4XvCYy-nUy8Hr-Mm5GoHX-DaUDi8OIUGTCFZQaebo2Md6McKBGCT9aT2fZyBd4dNupIT-5TtTH-tED_K86UR0tVyLp0zL4O_4gReOgj214X80lt-7e_cnHPID_67VWEKiww0J0DRbIZ7_djyvKFT0TQZ5nCBBvx_gLbY-11HhGdTO4zDgcDs5rWzAfsr9BQnPaHCCIW46QX01HsqVP_rqObLMQ5jVAxAIGzo9kFI5puJFzG0GeXYbglLDmPAgkjKhVh3lSZitP-uWn5GQ2siy3muBAnLMhHUSoSwd0oMOivJlnzMvKoe6x)
---

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. subject: My friend Raquel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
Because of your past support for Democratic candidates, we thought you would be interested in hearing about our campaign to send Democrat Raquel Teràn to Washington to fight for progressive values and take on the Republican bullies who want to take us backward. If you do not wish to join our historic movement to elect Arizona’s first Latina to Congress , please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/quHjdOlmTESlm5aDEC5Smg2?unsubscribedata=BrdFqHYKjNYZ0ge%2FklD0rTYbAJn59sT19F5mz2czASkx5J8p1O%2BHIypU9xRdHuBw9CDJihbYyznKFrgpguNyN4jUsNTPrTdaV7J%2FR1i4nS9zFsiqr6xsmkt1xVSGY9ok9AxX6vm8n0PSxaaEFbRPiejT7lkvicuZ2J%2BGM12pt8uOb7fnmKCklXfVPXrBURebPUNFcBfaTlJOGvdUbUV5E4DVfDCS%2BMKUFgqZQMMn%2BhE66SQSQMzg3BcBUmRRnyMWRS2pKYN3PQp%2FfBJubxb11ZWQEq4o7aWdoy2%2FtUyqHkowlK6RL47oAMZKOH1SU4dZLWw0iiBpDku52qYCvRagM7hxokOguLCN%2FaDKzhNljOr%2BsGyQ%2BEPiyRJMeU10FPiQxQvdlcx7HhZ5BLaKuPtErHuVp1DmAOji81oQfR%2Fk0L3q5IZ6cKrz1cd2yZSXbMX9 .

Hey Peter,
Senator Mark Kelly here. I wanted to tell you a little bit about my friend Raquel Terán and why I’ve endorsed her campaign for Congress in Arizona’s 3rd District. I’ve watched Raquel time and again build broad coalitions of voters in our community to do things we’ve heard couldn’t be done. It’s that can-do attitude we need more of in Washington, and that’s why I’m on Team Terán.
If you’re ready to join me on Team Terán, can you chip in $20 or whatever you can afford to give Raquel the resources we need to send Raquel to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_090123_JH_MK_welcome_E&amount=20]
One of the most important lessons I’ve learned in my life is the value of teamwork. And I know Arizonans need Raquel on our team in Washington. Her tireless advocacy for working families has been a driving force behind her accomplishments. And together, we can fight for policies that uplift our communities, create opportunities, and protect the most vulnerable among us.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_090123_JH_MK_welcome_E&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_090123_JH_MK_welcome_E&amount=20]
Raquel knows how to win – she was an integral part of our winning campaign last year! And the secret to winning campaigns is you. Without your support, your encouragement, and, yes, your contributions, none of this would be possible.
So Peter, will you join me on Team Terán and make a $20 contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_090123_JH_MK_welcome_E&amount=20]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Together, we can shape a future where every Arizonan has the opportunity to thrive, where our environment is protected, and where everyone is treated with dignity and respect.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

[] One of the most important lessons I’ve learned in my life is the value of teamwork. And I know Arizonans need Raquel on our team in Washington. Her tireless advocacy for working families has been a driving force behind her accomplishments. And together, we can fight for policies that uplift our communities, create opportunities, and protect the most vulnerable among us. [] Raquel knows how to win – she was an integral part of our winning campaign last year! And the secret to winning campaigns is you. Without your support, your encouragement, and, yes, your contributions, none of this would be possible. So Peter, will you join me on Team Terán and make a $20 contribution today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $20 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Together, we can shape a future where every Arizonan has the opportunity to thrive, where our environment is protected, and where everyone is treated with dignity and respect. Thank you, Mark Kelly [] [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [] Terán for Congress PO Box 1041 Glendale, AZ 85311 United States Paid for by Terán for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=27s=20Kids?=
subject: Our Mom's Birthday Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
You know Becky as a candidate, former legislator, and as a productive problem solver. We know her as mom. | | | | |
---

Dear Friends,
You know Becky as a candidate, former legislator, and as a productive problem solver.
We know her as mom. She has been an inspiration to us, even before she began her career in public service. And tomorrow is her birthday!
Most people don’t usually celebrate birthdays four days out from a congressional primary election. But our mom is not like most people.
[](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=a21fb64675&e=6484bb6dd5)
And that’s why we’re asking for a bit of an unusual present. [_**Will you help our mom get elected to Congress for her birthday by donating to her campaign today?**_ ](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=d950d24963&e=6484bb6dd5)
[DONATE $25](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=51367e5837&e=6484bb6dd5)[DONATE $100](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=e555d3aee9&e=6484bb6dd5)[DONATE $250](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=6cf3ff9963&e=6484bb6dd5)[DONATE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=74215bff81&e=6484bb6dd5)
We are so glad that Utah has gotten to see what we know about our mom. She is tenacious, kind, and a fantastic listener–good qualities for a parent and for a legislator.
Help us celebrate her birthday by giving a donation today!
AnnieMatthewSarahJayne

name: Nikki Haley
subject: taking a few minutes to share my story
body:
If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | |
---
| | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_t=urkMTF2FJHaMttYjL3qGeNfsk6JnmQtzi9310ExWQfVrxnHdtvR9bO5gD4v-WflQoDK3hPTAVGWEmzfppekjKWvGfXAwhilflJ54mCQ28i4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_t=urkMTF2FJHaMttYjL3qGeNfsk6JnmQtzi9310ExWQfVrxnHdtvR9bO5gD4v-WflQoDK3hPTAVGWEmzfppekjKWvGfXAwhilflJ54mCQ28i4%3D)

|
Hi Fellow Conservative,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_e=2z8qv9IanXCnl7ZcM6fS96-GVpcAFM8PHlvT8pJsLIZbtt4iT4Odj8kv_69OFhUy1CUVJIIcTXOdZ2NX8LQPcO7vVDwbsOyAUU1bUzSSjkS1jt0nkUye10PesYo2ffMNy_CoMDg5jcxrd-mxMS8OCsmdUhWFgE9wBbHgvtDPSboiDbTWL6Tu7RVWNh0KwuKMWq0sg4ruZGOBYFwY_nXh4Ky8g4wua94pKNEMNvGfXFBC_f22lZJJcpcUiB-KNvcq_tPOE1ufiscxrVuPAhs55HcCQESsyVvvy3mgk7LGrxn34o4U1vdUFMykxhq-aCZD9C7YBAvpgT7ksdXrTjglKYAKwOjxdsV2vLhx18O73j1hA0gSwSHm_L64PbP-6dZs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_e=2z8qv9IanXCnl7ZcM6fS96-GVpcAFM8PHlvT8pJsLIZbtt4iT4Odj8kv_69OFhUy1CUVJIIcTXOdZ2NX8LQPcO7vVDwbsOyAUU1bUzSSjkS1jt0nkUye10PesYo2ffMNy_CoMDg5jcxrd-mxMS8OCsmdUhWFgE9wBbHgvtDPSboiDbTWL6Tu7RVWNh0KwuKMWq0sg4ruZGOBYFwY_nXh4Ky8g4wua94pKNEMNvGfXFABjmNSmst8uWxCU7lphVVtwXTzsga2pF-YOUDy3_Cevod6zehHJ5VZev0n0ApiBo8WMN5rFaHt3gqs8jshZuh-oj_707nfr5JrLrANphidYSYBtZc3C-J_z_Mb0CRE-YMIUGidKxyPPsF9Gp9G3nX4)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_e=2z8qv9IanXCnl7ZcM6fS96-GVpcAFM8PHlvT8pJsLIZbtt4iT4Odj8kv_69OFhUy1CUVJIIcTXOdZ2NX8LQPcO7vVDwbsOyAUU1bUzSSjkS1jt0nkUye10PesYo2ffMNy_CoMDg5jcxrd-mxMS8OCsmdUhWFgE9wBbHgvtDPSboiDbTWL6Tu7RVWNh0KwuKMWq0sg4ruZGOBYFwY_nXh4Ky8g4wua94pKNEMNvGfXFD-eSjVwwtsEt4T582WNXac6Yt7AUiC7NXsYhMj1W2Gj-G5bmsqv3T-Bq4733fekBGpb4aye55QBhA-cm3wZAJk3hktcGGerKkZ9g8WLU5viEcYCY_Z_264RYEy1afdx-hZD_SCbkavg_w8h-aNxAPC)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_e=2z8qv9IanXCnl7ZcM6fS96-GVpcAFM8PHlvT8pJsLIZbtt4iT4Odj8kv_69OFhUy1CUVJIIcTXOdZ2NX8LQPcO7vVDwbsOyAUU1bUzSSjkS1jt0nkUye10PesYo2ffMNy_CoMDg5jcxrd-mxMS8OCsmdUhWFgE9wBbHgvtDPSboiDbTWL6Tu7RVWNh0KwuKMWq0sg4ruZGOBYFwY_nXh4Ky8g4wua94pKNEMNvGfXFC85yHFYpkRyAXtW68N6yip17X5l8CAP3r9lLmgT3CiRGdcUhliP3QZoRQ5E8CBy7bCYPQifIh_1r3rDMoc9n5viuGMs652D1StocJrgkrKLN2wIvhh0KwcW-BuVJKCw8ZYI-D8odkb4tZNEQdUgfXe)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=71150e8338684374a8486b5add3235f1&_e=2z8qv9IanXCnl7ZcM6fS96-GVpcAFM8PHlvT8pJsLIZbtt4iT4Odj8kv_69OFhUy1CUVJIIcTXOdZ2NX8LQPcO7vVDwbsOyAUU1bUzSSjkS1jt0nkUye10PesYo2ffMNy_CoMDg5jcxrd-mxMS8OCsmdUhWFgE9wBbHgvtDPSboiDbTWL6Tu7RVWNh0KwuKMWq0sg4ruZGOBYFwY_nXh4Ky8g4wua94pKNEMNvGfXFCaabtx24-JCOHsaglxXB8StYfiUJ8bn8A6r_ys8AoKTd1KDJHM4Qp1LqzCh5QkiOFCjxtRmgz-lcAwxM-TyYtu20ffcK8H81lbwJenFz73I-eLu8zWxIPa09qnzR9sO4mcf3ZbEh84KWthfcc7V2Q6 "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

clean_body: If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | | | | | | | | | Hi Fellow Conservative, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
Hi all,

As we move closer to vote-by-mail kick-off, as well as election day in November, this week we’d like to share Tom’s thoughts on how to play offense when talking about education issues. We hope you find it helpful, and encourage you to share it with like-minded folks as we all work to support so many excellent school board candidates this year.

***Earlier this year, I helped launch Districts for Democracy, a PAC that is helping non-partisan school board candidates in New Jersey who oppose book bans and school censorship. We have been watching for months as national right wing groups have tried to inject education culture war politics into our elections — in part because they are genuinely threatened by our public schools’ mission of teaching history, science, and critical thinking, and in part to boost MAGA voter turnout for this fall’s legislative elections.

It is important to recognize that no matter what we do, education issues will be on the ballot and on voters’ minds this November. The only question for supporters and candidates is whether to play defense or offense.

Right wing groups want the education debate to revolve around their framing: the false slander that teachers and librarians are sexualizing or even “grooming” young children, and that public schools are denying parents the right to make legitimate choices about their kids’ educations. Whether we deny their accusations, or agree with some aspects of their “parental rights” message while trying to change the subject, we are reinforcing their electoral frame, and losing the argument.

Playing offense is a far better approach, because what the culture warriors are actually doing — banning books, attacking librarians, and hurting the quality of public education — is overwhelmingly unpopular.

*
According
to
an
NPR/Ipsos
poll,
69%
of
Americans
(including
51%
of
Republicans)
oppose
state
lawmakers
“banning
certain
books
and
removing
them
from
classrooms
and
libraries”
—
while
only
17%
support.
*
*
According
to
the
American
Family
Survey,
65%
of
Americans
believe
“it
is
important
for
public
school
libraries
to
have
books
that
represent
a
variety
of
perspectives
about
controversial
issues,
even
if
it
makes
some
people
uncomfortable.”
Only
12%
of
Americans
believe
that
school
libraries
should
remove
a
book
because
a
parent
objects.

We should talk about the outrageous book banning happening in places where culture war candidates backed by groups like “Moms for Liberty” have won. Every person who runs on this agenda should be challenged to defend these actions, and asked if he or she wants to see them taken here. *
In
Ron
DeSantis’s
Florida,
public
schools
are
censoring
Shakespeare
plays
that
include
mild
references
to
sex,
and
banning
references
to
racism
in
a
children’s
book
about
Rosa
Parks.
Florida
teachers
are
leaving
their
jobs
due
to
incessant
political
interference.
*
*
Florida
schools
have
banned
kids
books
about
male
penguins
raising
babies,
while
an
Ohio
school
district
banned
a
book
titled
It’s
OK
to
be
a
Unicorn,
accusing
them
of
having
subliminal
LGBTQ
themes.
*
*
Across
the
country,
under
pressure
from
Mom’s
for
Liberty
activists,
public
schools
have
removed
several
books
for
young
readers
about
the
Holocaust,
and
a
graphic
version
of
Anne
Frank’s
diary.

Where culture war politicians have taken over in New Jersey, they are targeting not just what they consider inappropriate sexual content, but civics, and even youth mental health programs.

In Bernards Township, NJ, a Moms for Liberty backed school board majority banned several advanced high school sociology textbooks because it didn’t like their treatment of current events.

In Ramapo Indian Hills, NJ, a pro “parental-rights” school board majority defunded school mental health services , apparently because mental health counseling involves students having conversations with counselors that are confidential from their parents. Moms for Liberty has actually said that mental health care “has no place in public schools.”

There is absolutely no reason to play defense when running against people who are banning Shakespeare and books about the Holocaust, while defunding mental health services for kids. They should be the ones forced to defend their policies. We are on solid ground arguing that New Jersey has the best schools in America, that they should not be brought down to the level of Florida, and that our kids should be protected from the culture wars roiling other states.

This does not mean there can’t be sincere concern or room for disagreement about what children encounter in schools and popular culture. Every parent believes schools should teach content that is age appropriate, and that parents have a right to know and to influence what is being taught. But most New Jerseyans will agree that no single parent — or politician — should claim a right to dictate what someone else’s child is allowed to read or learn. That will bring conflict and controversy to every school district in our state, drive teachers away, and diminish the quality of education for every child.

MAGA voters are already motivated by the lies they hear about what is being taught in schools. But there are many mainstream voters who might also turn out in this off-off-year election if motivated by a message of protecting our schools and our kids from crazy culture war book banning. Given that they are the majority in this debate, it would be malpractice not to try.

***Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation.

Sincerely,

Darcy
Executive Director
Districts for Democracy
Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

clean_body: Hi all, As we move closer to vote-by-mail kick-off, as well as election day in November, this week we’d like to share Tom’s thoughts on how to play offense when talking about education issues. We hope you find it helpful, and encourage you to share it with like-minded folks as we all work to support so many excellent school board candidates this year. *Earlier this year, I helped launch Districts for Democracy, a PAC that is helping non-partisan school board candidates in New Jersey who oppose book bans and school censorship. We have been watching for months as national right wing groups have tried to inject education culture war politics into our elections — in part because they are genuinely threatened by our public schools’ mission of teaching history, science, and critical thinking, and in part to boost MAGA voter turnout for this fall’s legislative elections. It is important to recognize that no matter what we do, education issues will be on the ballot and on voters’ minds this November. The only question for supporters and candidates is whether to play defense or offense. Right wing groups want the education debate to revolve around their framing: the false slander that teachers and librarians are sexualizing or even “grooming” young children, and that public schools are denying parents the right to make legitimate choices about their kids’ educations. Whether we deny their accusations, or agree with some aspects of their “parental rights” message while trying to change the subject, we are reinforcing their electoral frame, and losing the argument. Playing offense is a far better approach, because what the culture warriors are actually doing — banning books, attacking librarians, and hurting the quality of public education — is overwhelmingly unpopular. According to an NPR/Ipsos poll, 69% of Americans (including 51% of Republicans) oppose state lawmakers “banning certain books and removing them from classrooms and libraries” — while only 17% support. According to the American Family Survey, 65% of Americans believe “it is important for public school libraries to have books that represent a variety of perspectives about controversial issues, even if it makes some people uncomfortable.” Only 12% of Americans believe that school libraries should remove a book because a parent objects. We should talk about the outrageous book banning happening in places where culture war candidates backed by groups like “Moms for Liberty” have won. Every person who runs on this agenda should be challenged to defend these actions, and asked if he or she wants to see them taken here. In Ron DeSantis’s Florida, public schools are censoring Shakespeare plays that include mild references to sex, and banning references to racism in a children’s book about Rosa Parks. Florida teachers are leaving their jobs due to incessant political interference. Florida schools have banned kids books about male penguins raising babies, while an Ohio school district banned a book titled It’s OK to be a Unicorn, accusing them of having subliminal LGBTQ themes. Across the country, under pressure from Mom’s for Liberty activists, public schools have removed several books for young readers about the Holocaust, and a graphic version of Anne Frank’s diary. Where culture war politicians have taken over in New Jersey, they are targeting not just what they consider inappropriate sexual content, but civics, and even youth mental health programs. In Bernards Township, NJ, a Moms for Liberty backed school board majority banned several advanced high school sociology textbooks because it didn’t like their treatment of current events. In Ramapo Indian Hills, NJ, a pro “parental-rights” school board majority defunded school mental health services , apparently because mental health counseling involves students having conversations with counselors that are confidential from their parents. Moms for Liberty has actually said that mental health care “has no place in public schools.” There is absolutely no reason to play defense when running against people who are banning Shakespeare and books about the Holocaust, while defunding mental health services for kids. They should be the ones forced to defend their policies. We are on solid ground arguing that New Jersey has the best schools in America, that they should not be brought down to the level of Florida, and that our kids should be protected from the culture wars roiling other states. This does not mean there can’t be sincere concern or room for disagreement about what children encounter in schools and popular culture. Every parent believes schools should teach content that is age appropriate, and that parents have a right to know and to influence what is being taught. But most New Jerseyans will agree that no single parent — or politician — should claim a right to dictate what someone else’s child is allowed to read or learn. That will bring conflict and controversy to every school district in our state, drive teachers away, and diminish the quality of education for every child. MAGA voters are already motivated by the lies they hear about what is being taught in schools. But there are many mainstream voters who might also turn out in this off-off-year election if motivated by a message of protecting our schools and our kids from crazy culture war book banning. Given that they are the majority in this debate, it would be malpractice not to try. *Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. Sincerely, Darcy Executive Director Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. Friend, As we head into Labor Day weekend, let’s lift up working mothers. **Moms make just 62 cents for every dollar dads make**. We often face bias, career interruptions and lower pay after having a child. Mothers of color―who are disproportionately low-wage workers―face additional disparities and struggles in providing for their families. To center moms in policy-making, I founded the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress in partnership with the grassroots group Mothering Justice. **Mothering Justice pushes for policies that working mamas need, such as paid leave, affordable and quality childcare, reproductive justice and Black maternal health, and equal pay.** [**Please donate today to support Mothering Justice’s advocacy for working mothers.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lK0MV-nB2inDaPwrhTexMSJXjbuI-8XEgYunuMjTY5Z3rCMjjc5CX7i9DJa0-whebdTxF0rNvoaXSQVxm5oEYYHuBR3G_vFyMx3R0yIOMBzP2qcWLkj-6xyqQkcnryboCjwyy_IPkb7U6VkOpGQzcHkSyd_XP6QUkAAdcou0pZBhufOWdTWWLUs_3hfbyiFW-ehopnj0WMT67GO6j9E1gfQnIBBxnDi9stgVaTeeP5DB-FmYoxUrqaOs7c9Jlf4b2jbXtmgDgDeEFAwRBio2HFvAvuvjEEhIjCmbCXprH_SVkhfdGT05jbOtEmhFDZl7IT4uHxTD1lUhku5TLfiLk49xga30UOczjuRVRV8W4AHnziaNq97_GNXLWPyn2mZvm-t40pr2tNA4kRS5k_3XicrEzWn2WYhA8QBdvfdyLQ0O8/3z8/5ueyxnM6RJGVkZ9lPlqgPg/h1/akIqLgbRg_fWCyOHq_obE_GmduqcxrN6PguoYHr2Iu8) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Mothering Justice_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lK0MV-nB2inDaPwrhTexMSJT3iXiN8qaFtwOhfnPfy9R-EOno8YjMcI5eu-mZCd1ZYnDJOeLjFzov2dZpHdfTrzRMJYhyCe1rcNTheyROvFYenUfFR6IDF03FvVaBNuHbLgh60rdnJyFrxvl09VAkMH12TOH2iXP58KDVho6vWFyHDlXcygDJmXO7Sia-Dlf8y_3BqG75I0M4chTSoBrKpu5MPTohQsyyk0egsOIJTEI8D9N4Sv5KnwwAmDHdpR_4NVCHD1xzOfpWkHcnejTPlpU4NE97MWO9M5jd76aqFMS7_D3ZIQjkR9nAAmuBCMF7-iOvk427K16tfnbpCQVLum0Ak4Bt8WGKYvnPfOqBGN260TAHU-nutcfe-6oS9LiEkK4sl0__69QwMcO_aY6t7fk3IP2D3KfaFRi9aOT5xlOXNrw_L26_WmTTO74sKxtqF4v5Adxd_m2_BsQW_ysUlJQ/3z8/5ueyxnM6RJGVkZ9lPlqgPg/h2/DyW94GoddG9HkoQ5qKswM7vaYeo-YsNc3N5loOP6f4Y)

| |
Friend,

Today was Opening Day, and I was blessed to share that with my eldest son before school.

We had a great time with friends. This tradition is an important part of Central Valley ag culture. I’m running for Congress to protect that right and tradition and ensure my children can enjoy this blessing and resource.
---
|
---
| Help me fight for and protect our Central Valley by making a $5 weekly contribution to our campaign for Congress.
---
| [$5 FRIDAY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=899731ea1f&e=1722d05e10 "$5 FRIDAY")

---
| [ONE-TIME DONATION](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=8941107821&e=1722d05e10 "ONE-TIME DONATION")
---
| Help me win this Central Valley Congressional Seat in 2024, and I will be YOUR ADVOCATE to protect our rights, traditions, and beautiful Central Valley farmland.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
