name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Biden Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Fellow American,

There are bank records showing that the Biden family and associates took MILLIONS of dollars from corrupt officials in foreign governments (Russia, Ukraine, and Kazakhstan) during Joe Biden’s time as the United States’ vice president.

**_These allegations are serious, and they deserve to be investigated._** However, so long as Joe Biden and his allies run the Justice Department, there aren’t going to be any investigations into the president’s business dealings.

My colleagues in the House, James Comer, and Jim Jordan, have uncovered mounds upon mounds of records, bank statements, and emails that provide more than enough evidence of wrongdoing to open such proceedings.

I want to know where YOU stand, Fellow American. [**Do you believe we have enough evidence on Joe Biden’s corrupt business dealings to open impeachment proceedings?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9b798b750a6c40148e2b84b09af41e2c&_e=4GJOa2u1ix7hy-kfoWXMA37k1X-Atbhy6D6d_NHDjT0ctokPh6bOWpeJu8fMhzgG3oZ98GZpXMXNMzlzb-ud23I_pFYVYxkq527o-Y9VbhlWbdzIqXjxw6y56Jor5l6mSLyc4g97xxUTycwFz2hK8Ei-ygcxAmFmqnctxMvr5JQBYWLyUPEbmZHtyh2YPFVId8TOaiV25Algu8X110Zvto1AyH9OG2E2hAk3qAUaDB4o2gw-gegW0uF7M43QPLdKBRba3CS9vUJfZUaXdBOfJp6Jwxub9hAQ5IRmyrl-BK3g5OWd0v2t9AtAjeC9IKXmbCfBMUL1ct4Oby-vwVM6yFtRPcxdeF5itzThBLYIG-pjGwtxOI5KUUlUdDsIym8JIN9rqADYbdMza2e5FU6WqvwH-bCXMoMG0Q38jEcPTZTzii2tcgaX28bdKlr569IW4gbqdomxBro4yQRqjS5sdg%3D%3D)

[**YES**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9b798b750a6c40148e2b84b09af41e2c&_e=4GJOa2u1ix7hy-kfoWXMA37k1X-Atbhy6D6d_NHDjT0ctokPh6bOWpeJu8fMhzgG3oZ98GZpXMXNMzlzb-ud23I_pFYVYxkq527o-Y9VbhlWbdzIqXjxw6y56Jor5l6mSLyc4g97xxUTycwFz2hK8Ei-ygcxAmFmqnctxMvr5JQBYWLyUPEbmZHtyh2YPFVId8TOaiV25Algu8X110Zvto1AyH9OG2E2hAk3qAUaDB4o2gw-gegW0uF7M43QPLdKBRba3CS9vUJfZUaXdBOfJp6Jwxub9hAQ5IRmyrl-BK3g5OWd0v2t9AtAjeC9IKXmoHIILQwP6xMmjyzhY-fnocczQaghvxNK7kmvd6_4tlZWUXE9Qcs5hIBhzvYxntpvlrubZQGTVm-W3g4A_m2PgejOv6taZGFviz76xLcxesRn4scZwxm3T-y39AhIeoOVBxQm1394p6i0UncH5sYm0w%3D%3D)
[**NO**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9b798b750a6c40148e2b84b09af41e2c&_e=4GJOa2u1ix7hy-kfoWXMA37k1X-Atbhy6D6d_NHDjT0ctokPh6bOWpeJu8fMhzgG3oZ98GZpXMXNMzlzb-ud23I_pFYVYxkq527o-Y9VbhlWbdzIqXjxw6y56Jor5l6mSLyc4g97xxUTycwFz2hK8Ei-ygcxAmFmqnctxMvr5JQBYWLyUPEbmZHtyh2YPFVId8TOaiV25Algu8X110Zvto1AyH9OG2E2hAk3qAUaDB4o2gw-gegW0uF7M43QPLdKBRba3CS9vUJfZUaXdBOfJp6Jwxub9hAQ5IRmyrl-BK3g5OWd0v2t9AtAjeC9IKXmMXX_SnbVpUw-DMmQ5_vioZaUnVwRwIn4foyGKOAILQciNo-8tyffzwJxbt9J5v7BUPxJY40cM7KL3Imtt9Y1sQnxLnjTURDXggCUL4dNeK9YKfy3h0PyZRny61FtFjS7Jmrp377vamaGvwk_ML4n5w%3D%3D)
If these allegations are true, this is corruption at the highest levels of government.

**_Thanks for taking the time to let me know where you stand today._**

For Liberty,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9b798b750a6c40148e2b84b09af41e2c&_e=4GJOa2u1ix7hy-kfoWXMA37k1X-Atbhy6D6d_NHDjT0ctokPh6bOWpeJu8fMhzgG3oZ98GZpXMXNMzlzb-ud23I_pFYVYxkq527o-Y9VbhlWbdzIqXjxw6y56Jor5l6mSLyc4g97xxUTycwFz2hK8Ei-ygcxAmFmqnctxMvr5JQBYWLyUPEbmZHtyh2YPFVId8TOaiV25Algu8X110Zvto1AyH9OG2E2hAk3qAUaDB4o2gw-gegW0uF7M43QPLdKBRba3CS9vUJfZUaXdBOfJp6Jwxub9hAQ5IRmyrl-BK3g5OWd0v2t9AtAjeC9IKXm9cgmumvemNNIF8iTTTE4nU_WXwx7RpfOXOBCLKUjeHHCobe-n0zd1Lk0ov-W1H_pJEkcYyFQiF-CgWygURoIb0K0DbeRyUoRSK_gaflPoCMU_6AXH9QKc8Hfl4Q2Xs8VunOL_A_HMrJfGB1zwuv1xA%3D%3D)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: The GOP presidential candidate attacking Ayanna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Ayanna is focused on dismantling systems of oppression and advancing racial justice.
#
Ayanna Pressley is one of the strongest champions for racial justice in Congress today.
She’s bold. She’s effective. She’s committed.
And that’s why clout-chasing Republican presidential candidates are attacking her.
Let me be clear: when a candidate for President calls a Black Congresswoman a leader of the modern KKK not only are they dead wrong, **but they are wielding deeply dangerous rhetoric, the kind of rhetoric that has cost Black folks their lives.**
It would be laughable if it weren’t so serious. The GOP is trying to stir up animosity, seed violence, and get their faces on the news — any way they can.
**We’ll always call out these racist and bad faith attacks when they happen, but we won’t be distracted.**
Even as Republican candidates are invoking her name to fan the flames of white supremacy, I know Ayanna will stay focused on advocating and legislating to dismantle systems of oppression and advance racial equity.
[I’ll be standing alongside her in that fight. Will you join me and Ayanna Pressley in the urgent push to fight white supremacy and advance racial justice? Please chip in $5 today to help us stand strong.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230901-ap.3xI_Bb&refcode=em20230901-4917-P_FND_SPL_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4917%2E2526796%2EZAdgGL)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230901-ap.3xI_Bb&refcode=em20230901-4917-P_FND_SPL_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4917%2E2526796%2EZAdgGL)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230901-ap?refcode=em20230901-4917-P_FND_SPL_GFM&t=21&refcode2=4917_2526796_ZAdgGL&akid=4917%2E2526796%2EZAdgGL)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230901-4917-P_FND_SPL_GFM&t=22&akid=4917%2E2526796%2EZAdgGL)**

| | Patriot,

---
I told you I want to wrap up the Republican primary as quickly as possible so that we can focus 100% of our efforts on the REAL mission of firing Biden and saving America.
---
Well, I’ve got a great update for you to kick off the new month of September._
_
---
The disloyal Republicans, who have been working on a $370 MILLION scheme to sabotage us in the primary, are now _**RETREATING**_.
---
A $50 MILLION Super PAC CLOSED DOWN after stating that their candidate was guilty of making “rookie mistakes.”
---
And on the very same day, _another_ __ Super PAC was forced to SHUT DOWN its operations in the early primary state of Nevada and in some Super Tuesday states.
---
That Super PAC is nothing but a _shadow campaign_ that skirts FEC laws to raise dark money with the sole mission of destroying our MAGA movement.
---
Meanwhile, the candidate’s _actual_ _campaign_ is facing a serious **_threat of “SOLVENCY,” according to NBC,_** after reviewing last quarter’s reports filed with the FEC.
---
_At a time when the Deep State is trying to assert total domination over America, our country cannot afford to have someone making “rookie mistakes” in the White House._
---
**We need a**** _battle-tested warrior_****to lead the fight to SAVE AMERICA.**
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=048272f7578346b5b642fec2971bfcc8&_e=JI5kJTc26VQuNn4W4hoSJC7zOjpGTC5DEQ6RsW16ydzDaY21zQ1rYFnSwrSW__0AZCZPGs5q07NK0Zu0cx-9OI-63f_DRt1ZXAtTh2IbT2KSl0csAd_cRZSeap-T17zDlReFJfuH3I2qNQfhJxA5jYZmkjZrjlsxRBSEZYR7O7Df9zNC7nwU_Ld_qWyps9p6uk8QD7sCTomhxZ9_6iMrrvFb23zY_J3j1BZbPhyXEzvZ5Pp78_Pys5vjVUHzhqEAOaYB9mlLOmVOeY44Gt5ehzM9CZJFnh_praprV9ecaOGY4zi0jlP3cZarXMEdx9a-c1_0LhHYQFOCbwipiB4vIvUvtGBnBNnt15kfQ6yePi78RJwLpjB9Zcz3vZEK1uGPjM7TASMjTG4MZanUruF8YaOljAxjg3a2FHcnARansCgOV6EJOO9iaI5TaYtYhqf_vOiEiLoii8WCsS9Khw2Ac5bSZiA-grfw7b7yPB5zJbvaCMEKXGTJOA1AazgpGA8k)
---
But while the RINOs are currently retreating, we cannot claim victory just yet.
---
_Since I’m not one to make “rookie mistakes,” I know perfectly well that when dealing with backstabbing RINOs, you always need to sleep with one eye open._
---
They’re always scheming ways to try and sabotage us – and right now, they are reportedly working on a plan to get _Democrat_ voters to _infiltrate_ our Republican primaries to vote against me.
---
**But even with all of the RINO special interest money raised against us, we’ve prevailed against all of their many schemes thanks to our incredible movement of grassroots donors like YOU.**
---
**We may not have special interest checks flowing into our accounts, but we do have a movement packed with over 74 MILLION grassroots donors who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny.**
---
_That’s why I’m asking you to give just $1 to drown out these RINO attacks and ensure we can continue to stay 100% focused on the REAL mission of firing Crooked Joe and saving America._
---

clean_body: A great way to start the new month.| | | | | Patriot, I told you I want to wrap up the Republican primary as quickly as possible so that we can focus 100% of our efforts on the REAL mission of firing Biden and saving America. Well, I’ve got a great update for you to kick off the new month of September. The disloyal Republicans, who have been working on a $370 MILLION scheme to sabotage us in the primary, are now RETREATING. A $50 MILLION Super PAC CLOSED DOWN after stating that their candidate was guilty of making “rookie mistakes.” And on the very same day, another Super PAC was forced to SHUT DOWN its operations in the early primary state of Nevada and in some Super Tuesday states. That Super PAC is nothing but a shadow campaign that skirts FEC laws to raise dark money with the sole mission of destroying our MAGA movement. Meanwhile, the candidate’s actual campaign is facing a serious threat of “SOLVENCY,” according to NBC, after reviewing last quarter’s reports filed with the FEC. At a time when the Deep State is trying to assert total domination over America, our country cannot afford to have someone making “rookie mistakes” in the White House. We need a battle-tested warriorto lead the fight to SAVE AMERICA. But while the RINOs are currently retreating, we cannot claim victory just yet. Since I’m not one to make “rookie mistakes,” I know perfectly well that when dealing with backstabbing RINOs, you always need to sleep with one eye open. They’re always scheming ways to try and sabotage us – and right now, they are reportedly working on a plan to get Democrat voters to infiltrate our Republican primaries to vote against me. But even with all of the RINO special interest money raised against us, we’ve prevailed against all of their many schemes thanks to our incredible movement of grassroots donors like YOU. We may not have special interest checks flowing into our accounts, but we do have a movement packed with over 74 MILLION grassroots donors who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny. That’s why I’m asking you to give just $1 to drown out these RINO attacks and ensure we can continue to stay 100% focused on the REAL mission of firing Crooked Joe and saving America. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Peter,

There are bank records showing that the Biden family and associates took MILLIONS of dollars from corrupt officials in foreign governments (Russia, Ukraine, and Kazakhstan) during Joe Biden’s time as the United States’ vice president.

**_These allegations are serious, and they deserve to be investigated._** However, so long as Joe Biden and his allies run the Justice Department, there aren’t going to be any investigations into the president’s business dealings.

My colleagues in the House, James Comer, and Jim Jordan, have uncovered mounds upon mounds of records, bank statements, and emails that provide more than enough evidence of wrongdoing to open such proceedings.

I want to know where YOU stand, Peter. **Fellow American - the DC Establishment is coming after me.**

> _**FIRST:**_ Chris Christie was on MSNBC to attack me and then went on Fox News calling me "dangerous."
>
> _**THEN:**_ Nikki Haley attacked me, mischaracterizing my stance on Israel.
>
> _**NOW:**_ Mike Pence (after swinging and missing on the debate stage) is fundraising using a video of me as an 18-year-old questioning Al Sharpton.
It’s clear that the establishment is worried about the campaign we’re running, Fellow American.

> _"Vivek Ramaswamy quickly emerged Wednesday night as the punching bag in the first Republican presidential debate, finding himself in the midst of nearly all of the most fiery clashes."_
> - Politico 8/24/23

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ->**](../August Christe MSNBC Attacks/')
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](../August Christe MSNBC Attacks/')

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. clean_body: 🤫🤫🤫 | | | | | I’m going to let you in on a little secret, Friend. Tom Kean, Jr.’s birthday is right around the corner, and we here at Team Kean are going to surprise him with the best gift of all - a card signed by all of his top supporters! 🥳 We want Tom’s birthday to be extra special this year, and we know he’d be thrilled to see your name on the bottom of his card! Thank you for helping us make Tom’s birthday surprise one to remember! Thank you, CarolineTeam Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation.
